Improve rankings for key search terms

Create and optimize website pages

Set up and manage Google Ads campaigns

Help increase inbound leads and engagement

Can you improve rankings?

Can you turn that traffic into action?

Have experience with SEO and Google Ads

Can show real examples of results

Work independently and focus on outcomes



Skills Required:

SEO (Search Engine Optimization)

Google Ads / PPC

Landing Page Optimization

Basic Copywriting



How to Apply:



Please include:



Examples of SEO or Google Ads work you’ve done

What results you were able to achieve

The tools you typically use



???? Applications without examples will not be considered.

Final Note:



We are looking for someone who can figure things out and produce results, not just follow instructions.

title: Expert Credit Repair Specialist & Disputes Team Leader (Remote – Full-Time)
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based credit repair company looking for an experienced, detail-oriented, and leadership-ready Credit Repair Specialist to manage and oversee our disputes department. If you're a real expert, know how to use advanced laws and strategies, and are committed to helping clients restore their credit the right way — we want YOU.





We’re Looking for Someone Who:



Has extensive hands-on experience removing:

Collections

Charge-offs

Inquiries

Late payments

Bankruptcies

Evictions

ChexSystems entries

Understands credit laws and uses them to dispute accurately and ethically:

FCRA §1681i & §1681e(b)

FDCPA §1692g

GLBA §6802(b)

CFPB and FTC complaint filing protocols

Knows advanced dispute strategies:

Metro 2 Compliance

Opt-Out Method

Debt Bondage Method





Can oversee and lead a team 

Has a deep understanding of credit-to-funding processes (credit cards, personal/business loans, funding prep)

Fluent in English (spoken + written) with excellent grammar



Proficient with:

Client Dispute Manager (CDM)

Slack

Click-up

Highly organized, proactive, and independent (we don’t micromanage)

Can follow our SOPs and meet daily KPIs

Has a strong, reliable internet connection and a working camera for Zoom calls

Must be comfortable clocking in/out daily (non-negotiable until trust is earned)

Can provide ID verification for security and compliance



BONUS: If you’ve previously worked for or with any of the major Credit Bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion), that’s a major PLUS and will qualify you for higher pay





AVAILABILITY:

Must be flexible but available for daily communication and updates

Preferred working hours:

2:00 AM – 8:00 AM EST 

and/or 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST

(We can discuss this if you’re a great fit)



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:



Manage and execute client disputes using advanced techniques

Oversee day-to-day dispute workflows for our dispute specialists

Train and guide the team on new dispute strategies and updates

Communicate directly with clients (Dispute Fox + GHL)

Communicate inside team chats (Slack)

Provide accurate updates and help support front-end sales & funding team

Use CDM & Clickup to track dispute progress and team activity

Lead and attend monthly Zoo
etings

Support other departments as needed for urgent client tasks, document sending, etc.





TO APPLY, INCLUDE:



Answer these questions in addition to your own message, DO NOT "ONLY" ANSWER THE QUESTIONS.....



How long have you been doing credit repair?

How many client profiles can you dispute in one day?

What strategies/techniques/methods are you familiar with?

What’s the fastest you’ve ever removed items from a report?

How do you handle inquiry removal?

Are you familiar with the 4-day collection removal method?

How do you handle bankruptcies?

What software have you used for disputing?

Have you ever worked for or with any credit bureaus? (If yes, please describe.)

Share any results, wins, or leadership experience you're proud of

Let us know your availability and timezone



PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF:



You do not meet the qualifications above

Looking for Short term employment 

You lack leadership, communication, or time management skills

You are not ready to take ownership of your role and lead a team

We’re ready to hire IMMEDIATELY.

If you’re ready to grow, lead, and change lives — APPLY NOW.

title: Automation Assistant — AI & Workflow Automation (Full-Time)
description:
Premura Corp is a U.S.-based consulting and marketing company. We help businesses scale through automation and AI-powered systems.



We are hiring a full-time Automation Assistant to build, manage, and optimize automation workflows and AI agent deployments across our client projects.



REQUIRED SKILLS (must have hands-on experience):

- Claude Code — building and shipping projects with AI-assisted coding

- OpenAI — setting up and configuring AI agents

- Go High Level (GHL) — CRM workflows, automations, and funnels

- n8n — building and managing automation workflows

- Supabase — database setup, API management, and backend work

- GitHub — version control, repositories, and collaboration



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

- Building and maintaining automation workflows across n8n and Go High Level

- Setting up AI agents and integrating them into business processes

- Managing databases and APIs in Supabase

- Deploying and iterating on projects using Claude Code

- Collaborating via GitHub with clean version control practices

- Troubleshooting, optimizing, and scaling existing systems



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- Proven experience with real completed projects — not just theory

- Strong English communication (written and spoken)

- Self-starter who takes initiative without being told what to do

- Reliability and consistency — this is a long-term position



HOW TO APPLY:

1. Record a Loom video FIRST (4 MINUTES MAX) — walk through 2-3 of your best projects using the tools listed above. For each project, explain what it does, what tools you used, and how you built it.

2. Go to this link to complete the application: 

3. Paste your Loom video link in the "Website/Portfolio URL" field on the form

4. Answer the 2 short on-camera interview questions



Applications without a Loom video will NOT be considered.

title: Sales Closer/Sales Representative
description:
Remote High-Ticket Sales Closer (Wellness / Healthcare)



Compensation

• $8.00/hour base + uncapped high-ticket commissions

• On-Target Earnings (OTE): $4,000–$7,000+ per month



Job Type

• Full-Time

• Remote (Work from Home)

• U.S. Eastern Time hours required



________________________________________

Who This Role Is For

This role is exclusively for proven high-ticket closers.

If you consistently close premium offers through phone or video consultations and thrive in a performance-driven environment, this opportunity is built for you.

Tesla BioHealing is rapidly scaling in the bioenergy wellness space with strong inbound demand. We are looking for disciplined, ethical sales professionals who can confidently guide clients through high-value purchasing decisions while delivering a consultative, trust-based experience.



________________________________________

What You’ll Be Closing

• High-ticket wellness and therapeutic solutions

• Deal sizes typically $1,000–$5,000+

• Qualified inbound leads + strategic outbound opportunities



________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Close high-ticket inbound and outbound sales calls

• Lead structured virtual consultations (phone & video)

• Diagnose client needs and present tailored solutions

• Handle objections confidently and close decisively

• Consistently hit or exceed weekly and monthly revenue targets

• Maintain accurate CRM records and pipeline visibility

• Deliver a premium, white-glove buying experience



________________________________________

Required Qualifications (Non-Negotiable)

• 5+ years of phone or virtual sales experience

• Proven success closing high-ticket offers ($1K+)

• Availability to work U.S. Eastern Time hours

• Strong objection-handling, persuasion, and closing skills

• High emotional intelligence and consultative sales approach

• Self-managed, disciplined, and results-oriented

• Comfortable working in a metrics-driven environment



________________________________________

Strongly Preferred

• Healthcare, wellness, or medical-related sales experience

• Experience in inbound, high-intent lead environments

• Proficiency with CRM tools (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

• Social media influencer sourcing + sales experience

•
 Ads or digital marketing familiarity

• Medical office or healthcare service sales background

• Shopify or web-related experience

• Hospitality or event sales (lead generation ? closing ? upselling)



________________________________________

What We Offer

• Hourly base + uncapped commissions

• Realistic $4K–$7K+ monthly OTE

• Fully remote work environment

• Qualified leads and strong market demand

• Ongoing product and sales training

• Long-term growth and leadership opportunities



________________________________________

How to Apply

This is a selective role. Only serious and qualified applicants will be considered.

Please send your application to

title: Design Architect
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW



MERCURIO DESIGN LAB S.r.l. (MDL) is an award-winning Italian design studio that creates avant-garde concepts inspired by the vibrancy of Asia. Our team is composed of passionate architects, engineers, designers, and artists who integrate art with technology in the design process while respecting the three fundamental criteria: the functional, the aesthetic, and the social.



JOB DESCRIPTION



We’re looking for a highly skilled and creative Design Architect to join our dynamic team. In this role, you’ll lead projects from concept to construction, blending creativity with technical expertise to deliver innovative, sustainable designs.



 What You’ll Do

Interpret the set out design criteria for projects. 

Distribute sketches, design intentions and design solutions including technical aspects of the design. 

Interact with design team to ensure that the interpretation of sketches and design requirements are fulfilled properly;

Daily review the design team work, do proper red marking and corrections when needed;

Coordinate the work of the 3D Team to ensure that the design tally with the 3D Model and the design intent;

Ensures that the rendering is of the expected quality for marketing composition and photography;

Adapt building codes, design and implement creative architectural layout





What We’re Looking For:

Bachelor’s degree in Architecture

7-10 years’ experience in architecture (luxury residential or hospitality a plus)

Strong background in design + technical detailing

Expertise in architectural software & international standards

mbers

Skills:

title: Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer
description:
Senior WordPress Developer & UI/UX Specialist

Buzz Digital Agency is hiring a Senior WordPress Developer with a strong eye for design and UI/UX to architect, build, and maintain client-facing websites. You'll leverage WordPress and custom front-end scripting to deliver polished, performance-optimized sites on time, every time. If you care about craft, thrive remotely, and love shipping beautiful, high-converting work, we'd love to talk.



What You'll Do

WordPress Development



Architect and build fully responsive WordPress websites using Elementor

Configure themes, templates, and page-builder layouts that faithfully match design comps

Write clean, maintainable JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for animations, sliders, form validations, and custom interactions





UI/UX Design & Aesthetic Craft



Bring strong design sensibility and aesthetic judgment to every project, since we don't have in-house designers, you'll be the one making layouts look and feel great

Translate briefs, references, and rough directions into pixel-perfect, polished interfaces

Apply strong UX principles (information architecture, user flows, visual hierarchy, micro-interactions) to every build

Make confident decisions on typography, spacing, color, and layout that elevate the finished product

Advocate for usability, accessibility (WCAG), and mobile-first responsive design across all projects





Hosting, Deployment & Security



Manage DNS, SSL certificates, staging/production environments, and backups

Oversee deployment workflows and rollback procedures

Harden sites against common vulnerabilities (XSS, SQL injection, brute-force attacks)





Integrations & Automations



Connect sites to GoHighLevel and payment gateways

Configure and test webhooks and RESTful API calls for seamless data flow





Performance & SEO



Optimize images, implement caching and minification, and hit strong Core Web Vitals scores

Ensure on-page SEO fundamentals (meta tags, structured data, sitemaps)





Quality Assurance & Maintenance



Conduct manual (and where feasible, automated) testing to catch regressions

Troubleshoot, debug, and provide post-launch support including uptime monitoring and error-log reviews





Documentation & Client Handoff



Prepare step-by-step documentation and training materials for clients

Deliver a 30-day post-launch support window and live handover sessions





Continuous Improvement



Research and recommend new tools or processes to boost efficiency and quality

Share knowledge via internal demos or lunch-and-learn sessions





Qualifications



5+ years of professional WordPress development experience

Advanced skills with Elementor

Strong UI/UX sensibility and aesthetic judgment, with a portfolio demonstrating design-forward, visually polished work

Strong command of JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for front-end customizations

Proven track record integrating third-party services via APIs and webhooks

Deep understanding of DNS, SSL, hosting platforms, and deployment workflows

Excellent written and verbal English

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and self-motivated in a remote setting





Nice to Have



Working knowledge of Divi and ACF

Experience extending CMS functionality with lightweight custom scripts and plugins

Experience collaborating with marketers and PMs to translate requirements into scalable solutions

Proficiency with Git and collaborative development practices (peer reviews, branching and merging workflows)

Familiarity with AI tools and integrations for WordPress

Experience with Figma or similar design tools

Familiarity with Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager

Mentoring junior developers

Experience with Notion

We will review and get back to you shortly.

title: Bookkeeper
description:
About the role

We are a CPA firm providing monthly bookkeeping services to 20+ clients across a diverse range of industries. This is a fully remote, salaried position for a self-directed professional who takes complete ownership of their client portfolio — delivering clean, fully reconciled books every month without being chased.



We need someone who communicates proactively, closes on time, and understands how the books connect to the tax return. If you do the minimum and wait to be managed, this isn't the right fit.



Key responsibilities

- Own the monthly close for a dedicated client portfolio, delivering fully reconciled financials on a consistent, timely schedule

- Perform complete balance sheet reconciliations — bank, credit card, loans, payroll liabilities, and other accounts — with no unresolved items

- Prepare book-to-tax adjustments including depreciation, accruals, and other entries in coordination with the tax team

- Communicate proactively with clients to gather documents, clarify transactions, and surface issues — before they become problems

- Maintain organized, well-documented workpapers for each engagement

- Escalate discrepancies or unusual activity to the supervising CPA promptly



What sets you apart

- You close books on time every month without reminders

- You leave no unreconciled items and document your work clearly

- You reach out to clients before issues escalate

- You can bridge the gap between book income and taxable income

- You thrive working independently and managing a varied client load

title: Restaurant Food Costing Toast/Xtrachef
description: Are you an organized and detailed person that loves solving riddles?  We have a chain of restaurants and are looking for a long term team player to learn our systems. This program if set up correctly will provide cost of goods insights based on recipes set up, scanned in vendor invoices and accurate food inventores from each location.  We would like to find a self learner that can communicate with toast/xtrachef during US hours  to become an expert at these 2 systems and how they integrate.  Plan would be to set up 1 location, get all the bugs worked out and then implement it accross all locations.  There will be an ongoing position of support for updating menus, recipies, making sure the scanned in invoices are mapped correctly etc.  This would be a part time position that would start low and as you show success, we would set up a pay structure showing consistant raises based on skills.

Together we make sure the targeted service levels are met and that we continue improving the overall customer experience.



What you will be doing as a Customer Service Representative:

As a customer service representative you are the face/voice of our brand. On a daily basis you answer customer requests by chat, and phone and you manage customer bookings with our international partners operationally. From helping customers making/changing their booking, to solving their problems at the counter of the pick-up location or post booking complaints: you will do everything you can to support our customers.



What we offer:

- An informal working atmosphere at a growing and dynamic company

- Remote working environment

- A competitive salary

- Very welcoming team

- Training & coaching with good opportunities for personal growth



What we expect from you

As a customer support representative we expect you to be customer oriented. You are always looking for the most customer friendly way to solve an issue or answer a question. You are able to adjust your tone of voice (written and verbal) based on the context of the situation (customer’s happiness level, urgency, etc.). This requires a great level of empathy and kindness. Furthermore, you are resourceful and able to quickly understand the cause of an issue and take action to resolve it.



Minimum requirements:

- Available for at least 32 hours/week

- Flexibility to work on European time zone

- A fast and secure internet connection

- Have previous customer service experience

- Fluent in English: written and verbal

- Excellent communication skills

- Proven ability to multi-task and manage priorities

- Bachelor work and thinking level



It is a BIG plus if you:

- Speak a second (or third) language

title: Full-Time Graphic Designer
description:
About the role



We're looking for a highly detail-oriented graphic designer to join our team full-time. You'll work directly with the founder/owner and own the visual identity of our brand across print, digital, and marketing channels. This is a long-term role for someone who takes pride in pixel-perfect work and sweats the small stuff.

Developing and maintaining brand identity systems (style guides, typography, color palettes)

Designing print and marketing materials (brochures, flyers, banners, business cards)

Creating social media graphics and visual content for multiple platforms

Ensuring consistency across all brand touchpoints

Managing multiple design projects and meeting deadlines independently



What we're looking for:



3–7+ years of professional graphic design experience

Strong portfolio demonstrating brand work, print, and social media design

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Figma

Ability to work US business hours and communicate proactively

Self-starter who can take direction and run with it

2. Describe a time you caught a design error that others missed. What was it and how did you fix it?



3. Write the phrase "DETAIL FIRST" at the top of your application. (Applications without this will not be reviewed.)



4. What is your available start date and your expected monthly rate in USD?

title: SENIOR ACCOUNT MANAGER
description:
Location: 100% Remote Type: Full-Time Experience: 7+ Years



About Jamtek

Jamtek is a leader in delivering cutting-edge technology and integrated security

solutions. We specialize in empowering organizations through high-performance

surveillance, access control, and smart infrastructure. As we continue to scale our

footprint, we are seeking a high-caliber Sales Account Manager to drive growth and

manage our most strategic technical accounts.



The Mission: You will act as a strategic consultant for our clients, bridging

the gap between complex security challenges and Jamtek’s innovative

technology suite. Your goal is to expand our market share while maintaining

world-class retention rates among high-value enterprise partners.



Key Responsibilities

Strategic Business Development: Identify and close high-ticket opportunities

within the security systems and technology hardware/software sectors.



Relationship Management: Serve as the primary point of contact for executive-

level stakeholders (CTOs, Directors of Security, Facility Managers), ensuring



long-term satisfaction and loyalty.

Solution Design: Collaborate with engineering and technical teams to propose

customized security architectures (CCTV, Cloud Access Control, AI Analytics)

that meet specific client needs.



Technology & Security Systems Division | Jamtek



•



•



•

responses to contract negotiation and final implementation.

Market Insights: Stay ahead of industry trends in cybersecurity, IoT, and

physical security to provide proactive advice to the Jamtek leadership team.



What We Are Looking For

experience, specifically within Security Systems (Low Voltage, SaaS Security,

or Integrated Hardware).

Technical Proficiency: Deep understanding of networked security systems, IP

video, and enterprise-grade integration.

Communication: Exceptional presentation skills with the ability to translate

complex technical jargon into business value for non-technical decision-makers.

Autonomy: A self-starter who thrives in a 100% remote environment and can

Compensation & Benefits

(commensurate with experience, references, and track record) plus an

uncapped commission structure.

Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits.

Remote-first culture with occasional travel for site visits and industry

conferences.

Exposure to the latest innovations in AI and security tech.

Opportunities for career advancement within a rapidly growing organization.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 355 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: REMOTE ADS SPECIALIST (PART-TIME) – ELEVATE YOUR EXPERTISE
description:
Are you an advertising expert who thrives on performance and freedom? We are looking for a seasoned Ads Specialist to join our team as a strategic partner. If you have a proven track record of scaling campaigns for diverse clients and prefer a results-oriented environment over a traditional office desk, this is for place for you.



THE ROLE

As a Remote Ads Specialist, you will take full ownership of the advertising lifecycle. We value efficiency and strategic thinking over hours logged. Your primary focus will be:



Developing and executing high-converting ad strategies across
 and Google.



Auditing and optimizing existing campaigns to lower acquisition costs and increase ROI.



Monitoring daily performance metrics and providing clear, actionable insights.



Scaling budgets effectively while maintaining healthy performance margins.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Proven Experience: You have managed campaigns for multiple individuals or agencies. You understand the nuances of different industries and can adapt your strategy accordingly.



Platform Mastery: Deep technical knowledge of
 Ads Manager and Google Ads. Experience with tracking pixels, API conversions, and GA4 is essential.



Strategic Mindset: You don't just "run ads"—you understand the entire funnel, including creative strategy and landing page optimization.



Autonomy: Since this is a 100% remote, part-time position, you must be a self-starter who can meet deadlines and deliver results without constant supervision.



WHY JOIN US?

Location Independence: Work from anywhere in the world. Whether it is your home office or a quiet workspace by the beach, we care about your output, not your location.



Competitive Compensation: We offer a premium base rate plus performance bonuses. Your earnings are directly tied to the value and growth you generate.



Flexible Schedule: This part-time role allows you to balance other commitments or personal projects while working on high-impact campaigns.



Direct Impact: Work directly with decision-makers in a streamlined environment. No unnecessary meetings, no bureaucracy—just growth.



HOW TO APPLY

If you are ready to apply your skills to a new set of challenges, please submit your application including:



Your updated CV or a summary of your professional experience.



A brief overview of a campaign you managed that achieved significant ROI.



Your availability and expected hourly or project-based rate.



Please send your details to: 



We look forward to seeing what you can build.

title: Shopify Landing Page Expert
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION

We are a fast-growing e-commerce operator running multiple DTC brands in the health, wellness, and fitness space. We build landing pages that convert — not pages that just look good.

We need a Shopify Landing Page Developer who thinks like a marketer first and a developer second. Someone who has built pages that actually sell products, not just pages that win design awards.

What you will work on :



Full product landing pages on Shopify from scratch

Above-the-fold sections optimized for mobile first

Custom sections — comparison tables, before/after sliders, ingredient breakdowns, review carousels

Speed optimization — pages must load fast

A/B testing setups with tools like Google Optimize or native Shopify

Integration of apps — reviews (Loox, 
), upsells (ReConvert), subscriptions (Recharge)



Tools you must know :



Pagefly or Shogun — advanced level

Shopify Liquid — at least basic understanding

HTML/CSS — comfortable editing custom code

Google PageSpeed — you know what a good score looks like

Figma or Canva — to read design briefs



You are the right person if :



You have a portfolio of Shopify landing pages for real products that were actually sold

You understand above-the-fold, CRO, and why the first 3 seconds on a page determine everything

You can take a copy brief and a set of images and turn it into a live page without hand-holding

You are fast — first draft within 48-72h

You are detail-oriented — spacing, mobile responsiveness, font sizes, button colors matter to you

You have worked on health, beauty, fitness, or supplement brands before — bonus points



You are NOT the right person if :



Your portfolio is full of general Shopify stores with no focus on conversion

You need a developer to help you with every custom element

You have never measured the performance of a page you built

You think a beautiful page and a converting page are the same thing



Working hours :

Flexible — we care about output not hours. Weekday availability required for communication.

Compensation :

Competitive, based on experience and portfolio quality. Per-page or monthly retainer depending on workload.



HOW TO APPLY

Do not send a generic application. Fill out our application form. We read every response personally.

 / Instagram lead handling

title: Automation Specialist
description:
About the Role



I'm looking for a sharp, technical virtual assistant who builds systems — not just follows them.



This is a part-time remote role focused on Airtable/ Supabase development and workflow automation. You'll work directly with me to build, improve, and maintain operational systems that run a real business.



This is not a general VA role. If you're not excited about building things and solving technical problems, this isn't the right fit.



What You'll Be Doing



Building and managing advanced Airtable/ Supabase bases (scripting, interfaces, complex relationships)

Creating and maintaining automations in Make and/or Zapier / n8n

Using no-code, low-code, and AI tools (including Claude Code) to build and improve workflows

Troubleshooting broken systems and improving existing ones independently

Clear communicator, reliable, and easy to work with



To Apply

Examples of Airtable/ Supabase systems or automations you've built (screenshots, Loom, links — anything that shows your work)

A quick summary of your experience with automation tools



Applications without examples will not be considered.

title: Accounting Specialist
description:
Job Description:



POSITION SUMMARY



The Accounting Specialist provides essential accounting and data entry support to ensure the accurate and timely processing of financial transactions. Core responsibilities include entering customer payments, vendor invoices, and billing documentation, as well as maintaining organized and accurate financial records within the company’s ERP system. This role requires strong attention to detail, reliability, and the ability to consistently follow established procedures while supporting the Accounting team with daily transactional activities. The Accounting Specialist plays a key role in maintaining data integrity and ensuring accurate financial reporting.



ABOUT TRC ELECTRONICS



TRC is a franchised distributor focused on power supply solutions for the electronics industry. We partner with OEMs to support their designs and help bring products to market across a wide range of applications, many of which directly impact how people live and work.



We are growing and focused on building a high-performance team. Our mission is to give our customers the power to succeed while creating an environment where our team can achieve personal, professional, and financial growth.



Our core values guide how we operate and who we hire: committed, trustworthy, disciplined, accountable, transparent, resilient, and intentional.



PERFORMANCE OBJECTIVES

Accounts Receivable Support

• Accurately post and apply customer payments received via check, credit card, ACH, or electronic transfer.

• Reconcile daily credit card deposits and identify discrepancies for resolution.

• Maintain accurate customer account records, including unapplied payments and short pays.

• Support collections activities by documenting payment follow-ups and resolving basic account discrepancies.

• Communicate with internal teams regarding customers on credit hold due to overdue balances.

Billing & Data Entry Execution

• Assist with selecting shipments and supporting documentation for invoicing.

• Ensure billing transactions are entered accurately and processed in a timely manner.

• Maintain organized records of billing activity and supporting documents.

Accounts Payable Support

• Accurately enter vendor invoices and credit memos into the accounting system.

Match invoices to purchase orders and receipts when applicable.

• Ensure proper expense coding and routing for approval to support timely supplier payments.

• Assist with resolving invoice discrepancies in coordination with purchasing and vendors.

Credit & Customer Setup Support

• Process incoming credit applications by verifying completeness and entering data accurately.

• Complete trade reference requests and document responses according to company guidelines.

• Assist with maintaining accurate customer risk classifications and account status updates.

Returns & Credit Processing

• Process Return Merchandise Authorizations (RMAs) and customer credits with proper documentation.

• Ensure returns and credits are accurately entered and aligned with policy.

Reporting & Record Accuracy

• Identify posting errors, missing documentation, or transaction mismatches and escalate as needed.

• Maintain organized electronic filing and documentation standards for audit readiness.

Compliance & Process Adherence

• Demonstrates working knowledge of Quality Management System procedures and knows where to locate role-relevant documentation

• Perform all tasks in alignment with internal controls and documented processes.





KEY COMPETENCIES



• Proficient in Microsoft & Google products: Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Google Slides, Google Sheets, & Google Docs

• Proficient in TRC’s ERP (SAP)

• Working knowledge of debits & credits

• Understanding of A/P coding and the impact on financial reports



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Associate’s Degree or equivalent experience

• Minimum 1 years of progressive experience of hands-on office experience in an administrative, coordinator, or related support role

PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

• Position may require travel: Up to 10%

• Requires ability to occasionally lift up to 25lbs

• Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential requirements

Job Type: Full-time (Hybrid Hours)

title: Customer Support
description:
Small but important addition — calling it a web app sets the right technical expectation from the start (browser-based issues, no installs, console errors, etc.). Here's the updated version with that woven in naturally:



Technical Customer Support Specialist — VidRush

Part-time · Remote · Philippines (PHT 7–11 AM, Mon–Fri)

About VidRush

VidRush is an AI-native video production platform — and a web application — that replaces an entire video team with coordinated AI agents. A creator writes a prompt directly in the browser; VidRush handles the research, script, voiceover, visuals, motion graphics, and rendering in under an hour. No installs, no timelines, no editing headaches. We're early, fast-moving, and already seeing real traction with serious creators and media teams.

About this role

This is a solo support seat on a lean startup team. There is no queue behind you, no escalation tier to pass tickets to, and no script to read from. You will be the first — and often only — person a frustrated user talks to when something breaks. If that sounds stressful, this isn't the right role. If it sounds like ownership, read on.

Your day-to-day covers live chat support via Crisp, billing and subscription troubleshooting via Stripe, community management on 
, and hands-on help with video rendering issues when users hit errors inside the platform.

Working hours

12:00 AM – 4:00 AM CET · 7:00 AM – 11:00 AM PHT · Monday to Friday · 20 hrs/week

Our tools

Crisp · 
 · Stripe · Slack · WhatsApp

What you'll actually do



Own the Crisp inbox — live chats, open tickets, and follow-ups. You triage by urgency, not arrival time.

Diagnose Stripe billing issues: failed charges, duplicate billings, subscription mismatches, and proration edge cases. You know the difference between a card decline and a webhook failure.

Run the 
 support channel — not just replying to threads, but proactively pinning announcements during i
, tagging issues by type, and keeping the community calm when something breaks at scale.

Help users directly with video render failures on the web platform: gather context, ask the right browser-level questions (device, browser version, network), attempt workarounds, re-render or swap media/templates when needed, and escalate with a full technical summary — not just "the user is upset."

Spot recurring patterns. If five users report the same rendering error or UI bug in a week, your job is to flag it, document it, and suggest a fix — not just answer it five times.



You need to have



Hands-on experience with Crisp for live support — not just awareness of it. You know how to use tags, chat history, and ticketing workflows.

Real Stripe experience: you have investigated a failed subscription charge, understood why it happened, and explained it clearly to a non-technical user. "Checking the logs" is the starting point, not the answer.

Professional 
 community management — you have handled a frustrated thread during a live i
, not just used 
 socially.

Comfort supporting a browser-based product. You know to ask about browser type, cache, extensions, and screen recordings — because most issues on a web app live there before they reach engineering.

Strong written English. You write clearly under pressure, without over-apologising or going vague when you don't know the answer yet.

A diagnostic mindset. When something breaks, your first instinct is to gather information, not escalate or apologise.



Good to have



Basic video editing experience (CapCut, Premiere, or any web-based editor) — enough to swap audio, trim a clip, or replace a template when a user hits an error.

Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) as research aids during live support.

Automation basics (Zapier, N8N) — useful as we scale our support workflows.

Experience supporting a SaaS or AI web product, even as a power user.



What we won't consider a fit



Support experience that is entirely e-commerce or logistics (shipping, order tracking, fulfilment) without transferable technical troubleshooting.


 use limited to personal or gaming contexts.

Candidates who need a supervisor to handle escalations.

title: Ai Engineer
description:
we are building the future of digital marketing. Our mission is to create a revolutionary, fully-integrated AI platform that empowers copywriters, marketers, and accountants to generate high-performance ad campaigns with unprecedented ease and speed.



We are developing an all-in-one solution where users can generate winning ad scripts, stunning visuals, and compelling videos through a simple, conversational chat interface. Our platform will not only create these assets but also deploy them directly to platforms like Meta 
, Instagram) and TikTok, and then provide intelligent, data-driven feedback to optimize performance. We are building the ultimate AI co-pilot for marketers, and we need a brilliant engineer to help us bring this vision to life.



The Role

We are looking for an exceptional Senior AI Engineer to be a foundational member of our technical team. You will be the chief architect and builder of the AI core that powers our entire platform. This is not just a development role; you will be a strategic partner in defining how we leverage multimodal AI, fine-tuned language models, and seamless automation to create a product that feels like magic to our users. Your primary focus will be on making the complex simple, translating powerful AI capabilities into an intuitive, chat-based user experience.



Key Responsibilities

Architect the Conversational Core: Design and build the sophisticated chat-based interface that will serve as the primary user control panel, using frameworks like LangChain or LlamaIndex to manage complex, multi-step creative workflows.



Fine-Tune for Performance: Lead the fine-tuning of Large Language Models (LLMs) on our proprietary dataset of high-converting ad scripts and marketing copy to create a world-class script generation engine.



Implement Advanced Multimodal AI: Integrate and manage state-of-the-art generative AI models for text-to-image, image-to-image, text-to-video, and image-to-video (e.g., via APIs from OpenAI, Midjourney, Runway, Pika, Stability AI) to produce diverse, ad-ready creative assets.



Build Ad Platform Integrations: Develop robust, reliable API integrations with key advertising platforms, specifically the Meta Marketing API and TikTok Ads API, to allow for direct campaign deployment from our application.



Develop the AI Analytics Engine: Create the system that analyzes ad performance data and uses AI to provide users with actionable suggestions and insights on what is working and what to improve.



Champion Accelerated Development: Utilize AI-powered coding assistants extensively to accelerate development cycles. You will be expected to write clean, efficient, and production-ready code at a rapid pace.



Must-Have Qualifications & Skills

Proven experience building and deploying complex AI-powered applications.



Deep expertise in fine-tuning and prompting LLMs (e.g., GPT series, Llama, Claude) on custom datasets for specialized tasks like copywriting or script generation.



Hands-on experience with multimodal AI, specifically integrating and utilizing models for text-to-image, image-to-image, text-to-video, and image-to-video generation.



Strong proficiency in Python and conversational AI frameworks such as LangChain or LlamaIndex.



Demonstrable experience working directly with advertising APIs, particularly the Meta Marketing API and/or TikTok Ads API.



Expert-level proficiency with AI-powered development tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or similar IDEs to write high-quality code at maximum velocity. This is a non-negotiable requirement.



A strong product sense and an obsession with creating simple, intuitive user experiences.



Preferred Qualifications

Professional experience in the MarTech (Marketing Technology) or AdTech (Advertising Technology) industry.



Experience with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for pulling information from specialized knowledge bases.



Familiarity with building data analysis pipelines and simple machine learning models for performance prediction.



Experience with deploying and managing AI models in a cloud environment (GCP, AWS, Azure).



Who You Are

An Innovator: You are excited by the challenge of building something that has never been built before.



A Pragmatist: You understand that speed is a feature and focus on delivering results quickly and efficiently.



User-Obsessed: You believe the most powerful technology is useless if it's not incredibly easy and intuitive for the end-user.



A Problem-Solver: You are adept at breaking down a massive vision into manageable, actionable technical steps.

title: Senior Google Ads (PPC) Strategist – Dietary Supplement & Health Brands
description:
ABOUT US



Nutra Marketers (
) is a specialized marketing agency working exclusively with dietary supplement and health brands.



We help direct-to-consumer (DTC) supplement companies scale profitably using Google Ads, Google Shopping, and AI-driven performance strategies that are compliant with Google’s policies for regulated health products.



- We do not work in multiple niches. Supplements and health brands are our only focus.



THE ROLE (READ THIS CAREFULLY)



- This is NOT a junior role and NOT a task-based execution job.

- We are not PPC experts — and that’s intentional. 

- We want someone who knows more than we do, can lead PPC strategy, and can tell us what to do, not wait for instructions.

- This role combines strategist + executor.



You will:



- Design PPC strategies

- Build campaigns from scratch

- Optimize performance daily

- Monitor compliance in a restricted niche

- Explain why decisions are made

- Improve results continuously



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES - Client Google Ads Campaigns (DTC Supplements). 



You will fully own Google Ads performance for supplement and health brands, including:



- Building Google Ads accounts from scratch

- Designing account structures for:

     - Search campaigns

     - Google Shopping 

     - AI and Performance Max

- Keyword research specific to dietary supplements & health products

- Writing compliant, high-converting ad copy

- Conversion tracking setup & validation:

     - Google Ads conversions

     - GA4

     - Google Tag Manager

- Bid strategy management:

     - Manual bidding (when appropriate)

     - Max Conversions

     - Target CPA

     - Target ROAS

- Ongoing optimization:

     - Search term analysis

     - Negative keyword strategy

     - Ad creative testing

     - Landing page feedback & CRO insights

- Monitoring spend efficiency, CPA, ROAS, and conversion quality

- Ensuring policy compliance in a restricted niche



GOOGLE AI & AUTOMATION EXPERTISE - You must have a strong working understanding of Google’s AI-driven ad systems and how to use them strategically, not blindly.



This includes:



Performance Max:

- Structuring PMax campaigns correctly

     - Using audience signals effectively

     - Understanding asset group optimization

     - Knowing when PMax is appropriate vs when it is not

- AI-Driven Bidding & Optimization:

     - Max Conversions

     - Target CPA / ROAS

     - Knowing how data volume impacts AI performance

- Creative & Asset Automation:

     - Feeding Google high-quality signals

     - Controlling creative outputs to avoid waste

- Ability to explain:

     - How Google’s AI makes decisions

     - When to trust automation

     - When to override or constrain it



We are looking for someone who can leverage Google’s AI intelligently, not someone who simply “turns it on and hopes for the best.”



INTERNAL NUTRA MARKETERS PPC (B2B LEAD GENERATION) - You will also manage Nutra Marketers’ own Google Ads account, focused on B2B lead generation.



Example keywords our cleints search include:



“supplement marketing agency”

“PPC for supplements”

“dietary supplement advertising”

“Google Ads for supplement brands”



Responsibilities include:



- Building and optimizing B2B search campaigns

- Lead quality optimization (not just volume)

- Conversion tracking for:

     - Form fills

     - Booked calls

- Cost-per-lead optimization

- Ongoing testing and refinement of messaging

- Reporting on performance and pipeline impact



STRATEGY, OWNERSHIP & LEADERSHIP - You will not be micromanaged.



You are expected to:



- Develop PPC strategies independently

- Identify problems and opportunities proactively

- Justify decisions using data

- Recommend changes without being asked

- Explain strategy and performance clearly to non-experts

- Continuously improve efficiency and results



REPORTING AND COMMUNICATION



- Clear weekly and monthly reporting

- Performance insights (what’s working, what’s not, and why)

- Action plans for optimization

- communication with leadership



PAID TEST PROJECT (FINAL APPLICANTS) - Final candidates will complete a paid test project:



- Audit:

     - One client account

     - One Nutra Marketers account

- Identify:

     - What is working

     - What is not

     - Missed opportunities

- Provide:

     - A clear optimization roadmap

     - Strategy explanations

     - Expected impact



This is a real-world evaluation of strategic thinking and execution ability.



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



- Part-time to start

- Opportunity to move to full-time

- Competitive pay based on experience

- Paid holidays

- Health benefits

- 13th month pay

- Long-term growth opportunity

- High autonomy and trust



HOW TO APPLY - Please include:



1. Brief introduction

2. Your hourly rate

3. Years of Google Ads experience

4. Types of accounts managed

5. Experience with Performance Max & AI-driven bidding

6. Any supplement or health experience

7. Example results (CPA, ROAS, scale achieved)



Thank you for your time and consideration. 



Jacob

title: Online English Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Advance Real Estate Video Editor - $10 per hr | E | V5
description:
Hello, We are currently looking for an experienced real estate video editor to start working with us ASAP as we head into a busy season. Our workflow is fast-paced and volume-based. The edits themselves are not overly complicated, but speed, consistency, and following instructions are critical.



About 90% of our real estate videos are very simple, please see link: youtu.be/3Blj3NBfThE

The remaining 10% of the videos we will require may be a bit more advanced: 
/p/DWGqWtVERtd/



For 90% of the videos, we really just need someone who knows how to *DO A SPEED RAMP + MOTION BLUR EFFECT*



We will require you to be able to use MotionVFX for the text animations shown in the instagram link (we will provide an account for MotionVFX)



During peak season (summer), we produce 25–30 listings per week (Monday–Sunday).

On some days, we may shoot 6–7 listings, and other days 2–3 listings.

Because videos are filmed in order, edits are streamlined. Our current editor averages 40-60 minutes per listing. The instagram sample video provided, we need you to be able to edit those within 2-3 hours.



You may work around 25-30 hours a week or possibly more when we get busier during the season .



Our turnaround expectations are:

-50% of edits: required within 8–12 hours

-50% of edits: required within 24–36 hours



A few more notes for you to read:

-Fast response to revisions is essential

-Weekend availability is required

-Must be okay using Hubstaff for time tracking (used for data and workflow planning, not micromanagement)



Starting rate: $10 CAD/hour



Please send me a message here to apply



A few things I would like for you to answer when you reply to this job posting

-In 2–3 sentences, explain why you want this position and why you’re a strong fit.

-When can you start?

-Are you currently working full-time or part-time?

-Share 3 interesting facts about yourself.

-Attach your Resume & Portfolio.

-Please provide a 20-30 second trial edit similar to the Instagram link I attached.

-Google Drive (Raw Files) - 
/drive/folders/1qSgA4SDI88AFulNxxnwd3AJh4NaVo51B?usp=drive_link



***For the trial edit, we really just need to see that you can do the text animations + speed warp and motion blurs***



Applicants who do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



If you are selected, we will reach out to schedule a quick interview call.



Looking forward to hearing from you,

title: Sales Closer – Car Rental & Leasing Business
description:
About Sin City Rides LV

Sin City Rides LV is a Las Vegas-based car rental company offering a range of vehicles from economy to luxury. We cater to personal users, long-term lessees, and gig economy drivers such as those working with Uber, Lyft, and DoorDash. With flexible terms, no credit checks, and a commitment to premium customer service, we simplify and streamline the rental experience.



As part of our continued growth, we are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Sales Closer to join our remote team. This role plays a critical part in converting qualified leads into finalized rental or lease agreements and supporting our expanding operations.



Position Overview

The Sales Closer will be responsible for handling warm, qualified leads and guiding them through the final stages of our rental or leasing process. This role requires excellent communication skills, strong sales experience, and a results-driven mindset. The ideal candidate is professional, persuasive, and committed to delivering a seamless client experience.



Key Responsibilities

1. Convert pre-qualified leads into successful rental or lease agreements by following up promptly and closing sales effectively.

2. Engage with clients via phone,
, text, and messaging platforms to understand their vehicle needs and provide appropriate solutions.

3. Confidently handle client objections and clearly explain the terms, programs, and benefits.

4. Guide clients through all required documentation, ensuring completeness and accuracy.

5. Maintain accurate records of client interactions, bookings, and performance metrics.

6. Collaborate with the Lead Generation and Operations teams to optimize the sales process and improve lead quality.

7. Provide feedback for continuous process improvement.



Qualifications

Proven experience in sales, particularly in rental, auto leasing, real estate, or other service-based industries.

Demonstrated ability to close deals and meet or exceed sales targets.

Strong interpersonal and negotiation skills.

Ability to work independently and maintain professionalism in a remote environment.

Familiarity with CRM tools and sales tracking platforms is an advantage.

Social media content creation experience is a plus, but not required.



Compensation and Benefits

Commission-based compensation per successful rental or lease agreement

Flexible, remote work environment

Opportunity to grow within a fast-expanding and dynamic rental business

Performance-based incentives and advancement opportunities



How to Apply

Interested applicants should send the following to 
 with the subject line:

"Sales Closer Application – Sin City Rides LV"

1. An updated resume

2, A short video introduction (1–2 minutes), briefly describing your sales experience and why you’re interested in the role

As we continue to expand, we’re looking for driven and persuasive Sales Representatives / Sales Closers to help connect more drivers with vehicles and ensure our fleet stays active on the road.

, and other social channels.



You’ll be the voice and face of Sin City Rides, helping potential clients overcome obstacles, understand our rental options, and join our driver network.

title: Construction Estimator (Residential & Commercial)
description:
Job Summary:

 We are looking for a proven Construction Estimator to join our growing construction team. The role is heavily focused on residential projects (approximately 80%), including full ground-up estimates and end-to-end bid management. You will take ownership of the entire estimating lifecycle—from scope development to subcontractor pricing coordination—ensuring accurate, competitive, and timely bids. This position also includes exposure to light commercial work (approximately 20%), including electrical commercial and dirt/earthwork scopes.

The Estimator will play a key role in strengthening our internal estimating and project pricing systems, allowing leadership to focus on operations, growth, and client delivery.



Key Responsibilities / Tasks:



Perform complete ground-up construction estimates for residential projects (80%) and select commercial projects (20%).

Develop full scope of work for each project, including trade breakdowns and sequencing.

Manage internal project coordination related to estimating and pre-construction.

Request, chase, and manage subcontractor quotes across multiple trades.

Segment project scopes into clear trade packages for accurate pricing coverage.

Build and manage subcontractor pricing structures for complete bid preparation.

Conduct detailed quantity takeoffs from construction plans and drawings.

Manage pricing workflows to ensure accurate and competitive estimates.

Coordinate bid submissions for projects ranging from $500K to $3M.

Work with plans and drawings using Bluebeam and PlanSwift.

Maintain organized estimating data, spreadsheets, and project documentation.

Collaborate using Buildertrend / JobTread systems for project tracking and workflow support.





Required Skills and Qualifications:



Proven US construction estimating experience (required)

Strong background in residential construction estimating (80% focus)

Experience in light commercial construction (electrical, dirt, etc.)

Ability to perform full ground-up estimates independently

Strong knowledge of subcontractor pricing and trade segmentation

Experience handling multiple bids simultaneously ($500K–$3M range)

Excellent attention to detail and pricing accuracy

Ability to manage subcontractor follow-ups and tight deadlines

Strong understanding of construction scopes and trade breakdowns

Able to work independently with minimal supervision





Must-Have Tools:



PlanSwift

Bluebeam Revu

Buildertrend / JobTread

Microsoft Excel

QuickBooks (a plus)





Working Hours / Timezone:

Monday to Friday, 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Pacific Time)



Company Benefits:



Starting Salary

Paid Holidays

Sick Leave

Vacation Leave

13th Month Pay

Medical Benefits

Referral Bonus

Monthly competition



1. Please complete this form:


/english

A 1–2 minute video introduction is required.

After submitting, reply with: “application form done.”



2. How many years of experience do you have as a Construction Estimator?

3. How many years of experience do you have in project management and residential ground-up estimates?

4. What professional tools have you used (excluding self-learning or tutorials)?

5. Do you have professional experience with PlanSwift, Bluebeam, JobTread, and Buildertrend? If yes, how many years of experience do you have with each tool?

6. Have you worked with U.S.-based clients? If yes, for how many years?

7. Are you able to work full-time aligned with EST hours?

8. Are you comfortable using a time-tracking tool?

9. What is the largest project value you have successfully estimated?

10. What percentage of your past projects were residential vs. commercial? (e.g., ~80% residential, 20% commercial)

11. Have you worked directly with subcontractors for bid collection and pricing? Please describe your process.

12. Have you been involved in internal project management coordination alongside estimating?

13. Are you available to start ASAP? If not, what is your notice period

title: E-Commerce Growth Assistant Shopify Pages + WordPress Funnels
description:
E-COMMERCE GROWTH ASSISTANT

Shopify Pages + WordPress Funnels + Product Graphics — from A to Z

 

Remote | Full-time | Philippines

$1,400–$1,800/month starting + raise after 3 months based on performance

 

 

WHO WE ARE

 

We're a European e-commerce incubator. We test, validate, and scale consumer brands across 12+ countries. Small team (under 10 people), fully remote, moving fast. Two established brands in pet products and health supplements, growing 2–3x every year — with plans to launch 20+ new brands in 2026.

 

We have proven products. Proven sales funnels. A proven ad strategy. What we need is someone who takes all of that and turns it into live, revenue-generating pages across multiple markets.

 

 

THE ROLE

 

We're looking for someone who will own the entire front-end execution of our sales funnels. You build Shopify product pages. You build WordPress landing pages. You create product mockups and graphics. You duplicate everything across 12+ European markets.

 

You work directly with our CMO (your day-to-day manager) and CEO. No layers. No bureaucracy.

 

This is NOT a "general VA" role where you answer
s and do data entry. This is a specialized e-commerce execution role. You build the pages that directly generate revenue.

 

The role starts execution-heavy. As you prove yourself, it expands into competitor research, brand briefs, and coordinating our brand incubation pipeline.

 

 

WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

Building pages & funnels (~50–60% of your time)

 

• Build Shopify product pages from briefs — Create a whole Shopify store from A to Z: upload images, format descriptions, set up variants and pricing, add CTAs. Match the look and quality of our existing stores.

 

• Build WordPress/Elementor landing pages — Some of our funnels use landing pages. You format the article, add product images, CTA buttons. Content is provided — your job is clean, responsive implementation.

 

• Duplicate proven funnels to new markets — take a working funnel, copy the page, swap in translated content. Repeat across 12+ countries.

 

• Maintain and update existing pages — price changes, image swaps, link fixes, seasonal updates. You're the single owner of our front-end.

 

Graphics & mockups (~20–30% of your time)

 

• Create product mockups and packaging visuals — Canva, AI tools, or Photoshop. Work from brand briefs to keep visual consistency across markets.

 

• Design banners, comparison graphics, and page assets — everything the landing pages and product pages need to look professional and convert.

 

• Build A/B test variants — duplicate pages, swap headlines/CTAs/layouts per brief. You implement the tests, the marketing team designs them.

 

Tracking, research & coordination (~10–20% of your time)

 

• Implement tracking on every new page —
 Pixel, Google Tag Manager, conversion tracking. No page goes live without proper tracking.

 

• Competitor research for new brands — using our playbook, check Meta Ads Library, Amazon, Google Trends. Deliver structured briefs for CEO decision-making.

 

• Keep our pipeline moving in Notion — update task statuses, track deadlines, flag blockers. You don't make strategic decisions — you make sure nothing gets stuck.

 

 

WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 

You must have:

 

• You understand how e-commerce funnels work — why comparison pages convert, why CTAs matter, and how product pages drive purchases. You don't need to be a copywriter, but you get the logic behind selling online.

 

• Shopify experience — building product pages, not just managing orders. Show us 2–3 live pages you've built.

 

• WordPress + Elementor proficiency — you can build a full landing page from a brief. Responsive, clean, fast-loading.

 

• Graphic design skills — Canva (required), Photoshop or AI design tools (preferred). You can create product mockups and page visuals.

 

• Basic HTML/CSS — enough to fix spacing, fonts, colors without waiting for a developer.

 

• Google Tag Manager basics — install tags, set up triggers, verify tracking.

 

• Strong English (B2+) — you'll read detailed briefs and communicate async via Slack. Comprehension must be flawless.

 

• Self-directed work style — you read the brief, execute, deliver. You ask clarifying questions upfront, not halfway through.

 

• We work hard and pay well. This is a 44h/week role, including ~4 hours on Saturdays. The rest of your schedule is flexible around core hours.

 

Nice to have:

 

• Experience with multilingual/multi-market e-commerce (EU markets preferred)

 

• Direct response copywriting awareness — you understand persuasion, even if you don't write copy

 

• Notion experience (databases, kanban boards, task management)

 

• Video editing or AI-generated content experience

 

 

WHAT WE OFFER

 

• $1,400–$1,800/month starting salary (based on experience)

 

• 13th month bonus based on performance

 

• Performance bonuses with a clear path to $1,900+ if you deliver

 

• Monthly health allowance included

 

• 10 days paid leave per year

 

• Paid 2-week trial — we both evaluate fit before committing long-term

 

• 100% remote work

 

• Flexible schedule — core overlap 2:00–6:00 PM Manila (8:00 AM–12:00 PM CET), rest is flexible

 

• Direct work with CMO and CEO

 

• Growth trajectory — start with execution, grow into research and strategy support

 

• Stable, long-term position — we're profitable and growing. This isn't a 3-month gig.

 

• Monthly payment via Wise

 

 

HIRING PROCESS

 

1. Online Test — You will receive a link to a 10 min online test

 

2. Paid test task — build a real product page or landing page from our brief. 48h deadline. We always pay for test work.

 

3. Video call with CMO or CEO (30–60 min) — your future manager. We talk about your experience and how you work.

 

4. 2-week paid trial — full onboarding, real tasks, mutual evaluation.

 

5. Full-time offer — if we're both happy, you're in.

 

 

WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

 

• "General VA" who does
s, data entry, and social media — this is specialized e-commerce work

 

• "Designer" who never sees results — you see exactly how your pages perform

 

• "Project manager" who coordinates but doesn't build — you build everything yourself

 

• A short-term freelance gig — we want someone long-term who grows with us

 

 

We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us — not just fill a seat.

If this sounds like you — apply now.

title: Social Media Manager and Marketer (Apply Inside)
description:
(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION BELOW)



About the Role:



If you're someone who loves social media marketing, gets just as excited about strategy as you do building out content, and wants to take ownership of a key marketing channel in a growing online business, read on...



Learn Jazz Standards is a thriving 7-figure online music education business helping adult musicians finally learn to play jazz without the overwhelm. We're a small team, and that allows us to work fast. We've built a healthy content ecosystem across YouTube, blog, podcast, and
 — and now we're ready to make social media a serious, measurable growth channel.



We're looking for a Social Media Marketer who can do it all: build and execute a strategy, manage the content calendar, create and repurpose content, run ManyChat funnels, and ultimately turn Instagram and
 into real lead generation and sales engines for our business. This role sits at the intersection of execution (posting, scheduling, replying to comments) and strategic marketing (lead gen funnels, selling in the DMs, data driven decision making).



This is a full-time remote role reporting directly to the Founder. You'll be given strategic direction and goals, but we expect you to bring your own ideas, initiatives, and creative thinking to the table.



What You'll Own:



Content Strategy & Execution:



Dramatically increase our content output across Instagram and
 — both in volume and quality

Develop and manage a content calendar using tools like Meta Business Suite or Metricool

Repurpose our deep content library (YouTube videos, course clips, live Q&As, podcast transcripts, blog posts) into platform-native content: Reels, Stories, carousels, static graphics, and more

Write compelling captions, select strategic hashtags, and publish content consistently

Respond to and manage post comments, and interact with leads in the DMs



Content Creation:



Create graphics and short-form video edits when needed (basic video editing required — we have a video editor for heavier lifts, but you need to be able to move fast independently)

Work within our existing brand assets while having the skill to build new templates in Canva or similar tools when the 
nt calls for it



Lead Generation & Sales (Our Primary Objective):



Build and manage ManyChat funnels to convert social media engagement into
 subscribers and customers

Create automated DM flows that generate leads and nurture toward sales

Develop lead magnets from our existing content library to drive opt-ins

Think like a marketer first: every piece of content should serve a lead generation or sales objective



Strategy & Analytics:



Analyze platform data to understand what's working, what's not, and why

Bring data-informed recommendations to weekly strategy sessions with the Founder

Proactively identify new opportunities for growing reach, leads, and sales

Build repeatable systems and document your processes so nothing lives only in your head



What the First 90 Days Look Like:



By the end of your first 90 days, we expect you to have:



Built out a new and improved social media strategy alongside the Founder

Taken full ownership of the content calendar and posting schedule

Meaningfully increased our content output across Instagram and

Launched at least one ManyChat funnel driving measurable leads

Established a reporting rhythm with clear KPIs and progress updates

Demonstrated early, measurable progress — in leads, engagement, or both



What Makes You a Great Fit:



Must-Haves:



-3+ years of experience managing social media for a brand with a lead generation or sales focus — not just vanity metrics

Demonstrated ability to build ManyChat (or equivalent) funnels from scratch — chat automations, DM sequences, lead gen flows



-Strong content creation skills: you can write a great caption, design a clean graphic, and do basic video editing without needing hand-holding



-Comfortable with analytics — you know how to read the data and make decisions from it

Systems-oriented: you build repeatable processes, document your work, and don't let things fall through the cracks



-Self-starter who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do



-Proficient with tools like Meta Business Suite, Metricool (or similar), Canva, and AI tools for content ideation and creation



Strong Plusses:



-Experience with content repurposing workflows — turning long-form content (video, podcast, blog) into social-native formats



-Background in
 marketing or digital funnels (understanding the broader customer journey matters here)



-Genuine enthusiasm for or knowledge of music — especially jazz or music education. Our audience is adult musicians, and understanding how they think, what they struggle with, and the language they use will make everything you do more effective



Compensation & Structure:



Type: Full-time, remote



Salary: $1,500/month (1,075,905 PHP/year)



13th Month Pay: paid out in December



End of year performance bonuses: paid out in December if applicable



Reports to: Founder



Support: You'll have access to a video editor for repurposing existing content, Founder guidance, and support from other tea
mbers when needed.



TO APPLY FILL OUT THIS SHORT APPLICATION:



(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION)
