title: GoHighLevel Expert Needed to Finish Custom Automotive CRM / AI Sales Workflow Build
description:
I’m looking for a highly skilled GoHighLevel expert to step in and complete a custom CRM and automation project that is already partially built.



This is not a beginner job.



You should already be very comfortable with:

- GoHighLevel workflows

- pipelines

- custom fields

- forms and surveys

- tags

- automations

- conversational AI setup

- opportunity-based workflow logic

- troubleshooting broken or half-built systems

- building in a clean, organized way so the system is stable and easy to maintain



Bonus if you also understand:

- automotive sales process

- finance lead handling

- dealership appointment setting

- prequalification / credit application workflow design

- 
 integrations



## What the system is



This is a custom automotive CRM / sales workflow system called CloseLine being built in GoHighLevel.



The system is designed to:

- handle inbound vehicle leads

- engage customers naturally through conversational AI

- guide them toward setting appointments

- guide financing customers toward prequalification

- help move deals through the pipeline

- support sold-to-delivery workflow

- support post-delivery follow-up



A portion of the system is already built, but the previous builder was let go and I need someone to come in, review the current state, clean up what is wrong, and complete the remaining work.



## What is already in place



Some of the project has already been started, including:

- a pipeline structure

- tags

- some workflows

- some custom fields

- some form / survey work

- master workflow instructions

- AI prompt and conversation logic

- sold-to-delivery process planning

- delivery / post-delivery workflow documentation

- response libraries for the AI assistant



You will not be starting from zero, but you will need to review what is already there and determine what is usable, what needs to be fixed, and what needs to be rebuilt.



## What still needs to be done



The main remaining work is to finish and stabilize the system from lead handling through sold, delivery, and post-delivery.



### Main areas of work include:



1. Audit the current build

- review all current workflows

- review all custom fields

- review all tags

- review all forms / surveys

- identify what is correct

- identify what is broken, duplicated, outdated, or conflicting

- identify what should be unpublished, rebuilt, or cleaned up



2. Finish the sold-and-forward workflow logic

This is one of the biggest priorities.



The correct intended logic is:

- dealer manually tags a deal Sold

- that starts a dealer confirmation gate

- dealer confirms deal information and enters the delivery scheduled date

- once dealer confirmation is complete, the system automatically applies Sold-Delivery Scheduled

- that starts the customer-facing delivery workflow



From there, the system must handle:

- customer delivery intake

- missing-items follow-up

- separate insurance document collection

- morning-after possession check

- dealer reply handler

- reschedule / dead-deal logic

- customer post-delivery check-in

- Google review request when appropriate

- 14 / 30 / 60 day follow-up sequence



3. Build / finalize required forms and surveys

Including:

- Dealer Delivery Confirmation Survey

- Customer Delivery Intake Survey

- Insurance Upload Survey



There is also a recommended mirror-field approach for prefilling dealer-facing review information, so experience with practical GHL field mapping is important.



4. Clean up field structure

Need someone who understands the difference between:

- Contact fields

- Opportunity fields

- workflow trigger tags

- status fields

- deal control logic



Some fields already exist, some need to be corrected, and some need to be created or properly mapped.



5. Finish the AI assistant setup

The AI assistant must:

- sound human and natural

- engage inbound leads like a real salesperson

- confirm vehicle of interest

- steer customers toward appointments

- steer financing customers toward prequalification

- handle objections without overpromising

- re-engage customers who go back into Working Deal

- escalate appropriately when needed



We already have a strong master prompt and approved response library started. The right person should be able to implement it well inside GHL and make sure the logic matches the pipeline.



6. Review and stabilize automation logic

Need to make sure:

- workflows are not conflicting with each other

- old workflow logic is disabled where necessary

- tags are not causing duplicate behavior

- stage movement makes sense

- the system operates cleanly in a real-world dealership environment



## What I need from you



I need someone who can:

- review the current project quickly

- understand written build documentation

- identify what’s usable and what needs to be fixed

- complete the remaining work efficiently

- communicate clearly

- build in an organized way

- avoid sloppy shortcuts

- think through real-world sales workflow logic, not just “make automations fire”



## Ideal candidate



You are likely a good fit if:

- you have advanced GoHighLevel experience

- you have built custom CRM systems inside GHL

- you are good at workflow architecture, not just simple triggers

- you can clean up and finish someone else’s incomplete build

- you understand how to make automations feel smooth and practical

- you can follow a defined system instead of freelancing your own random logic

- you are comfortable working with a sales-driven automotive process



## To apply



Please send:

1. a short summary of your GoHighLevel experience

2. examples of complex GHL projects you’ve built

3. whether you have experience with automotive or finance-related CRM workflows

4. whether you have experience with conversational AI inside GoHighLevel

5. whether you can review and finish an existing partially built system

6. your estimated timeline to audit the build and complete the remaining work

7. your rate or flat project pricing



## Important



This is a project for someone who can finish and clean up a real build, not someone who is still learning GoHighLevel.



If you apply, please be specific about your experience. I’m looking for someone who can step in confidently and get this project across the finish line.

title: Customer Support Agent (Night Shift / US Timezone) | eCommerce Supplements Brand | Philippines-Based
description:
About Us



We run a fast-scaling eCommerce business in the health and wellness supplements space, operating dropshipping and branded subscription products across multiple Shopify stores. We're growing rapidly, which means ticket volume increases every single day. We have a CS team in place and are expanding coverage to make sure every customer gets a timely reply.

This is a long-term role with real growth potential. We promote from within, and as we scale, so will your responsibilities.



The Role



We're looking for a reliable, communicative Customer Support Agent based in the Philippines, available to cover US timezone hours. Our current lead CS agent covers Philippines daytime hours, and we need someone to fill the gap for our US-based customers.

You do not need to be online all night. You just need to be available during key US hours to make sure no customer is left waiting too long for a reply.

The role follows clear SOPs. What matters most is consistency, professionalism, and genuine care for the customer.



Responsibilities



Respond to all customer inquiries in a timely manner, ensuring US timezone customers are covered promptly

Handle complaints, refund requests, tracking inquiries, and FAQs

Maintain a professional, on-brand tone in every interaction. No duplicate
s, no vague answers

Contribute to documentation and flag process improvement opportunities

Report on refund and complaint trends

Participate in weekly team calls



Bonus Responsibility (More Hours Available)



If you want additional hours and responsibility, experience with order tracking, Parcel Panel, and order status monitoring is a strong plus.



Platforms You Must Know



Gmail (primary support inbox)

Re:Amaze/Gorgias (we are transitioning to this, familiarity is a plus)

Shopify



DeepL (translation)

Claude AI (we use dedicated AI projects per webshop to help generate and quality-check responses. Comfort with AI tools is a plus)

Parcel Panel (bonus)





What We Are Looking For



Minimum 2 years of customer support experience

Fluent written and spoken English, clear, precise, and professional

Comfortable with an async, check-in style workflow rather than a fixed shift

Available to work during US timezone hours (evening/night shift Philippines time)

Organized, self-motivated, and honest with time tracking

Not currently in a conflicting full-time role

Available to start soon





What We Offer



Minimum 1-hour pay guarantee per shift covered. We pay for your availability, not just your active minutes. If you check in multiple times across a shift and tickets are light, you are still compensated for showing up

As we scale, volume grows and so do your hours and earning potential

Daily contact with your Lead CS Agent. You are never left figuring things out alone

Direct line to the Co-Founder. Short lines, real feedback, and your voice actually heard

Weekly team calls with room to discuss improvements and shape how CS operates

A role that grows with you. We promote from within and reward consistency



We are a small, fast-moving team. You will not be a ticket number here, you will be a key part of how we grow.



How to Apply



Tell us about your relevant CS experience and why you think you are a great fit for this role. Please start your application with the word: Sate. Applications that do not include it will not be considered.



We look forward to hearing from you.



Cristian

title: Outbound Appointment Setter
description:
Remote Appointment Setter

One Janitorial — Edmonton, AB, Canada | Full-Time, Remote (Overseas)



Compensation$1,100 CAD training (first 10 days)$1,170 – $1,800 CAD/month after training

Hours & ScheduleMonday to Friday | 8:00 AM – 4:30 PM Mountain Time (MST/MDT)40 hrs/week





Reports To: Sales Manager / Operations Director     |     Start Date: ASAP



About One Janitorial

One Janitorial is a commercial cleaning company based in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. We serve 700+ commercial clients across Canada with approximately 180 cleaning Alliance partners and 36 internal staff operating fully remotely. Our appointment setters are the engine of our sales pipeline — they are the first voice prospects hear, and the quality of their calls directly determines our revenue.



The Role

As a Remote Appointment Setter, you are not making casual calls. You are running a structured, script-based outreach process to connect commercial business owners with our sales team. Every call you make is tracked, scored, and reviewed. This is a high-output, high-accountability role — if you are looking for a relaxed work-from-home job, this is not it.



You will call small business owners, office managers, and facility managers across Canada. Your job is to start real conversations, handle objections confidently, and book qualified demo appointments. You are measured on daily call volume, appointment quality, and show rate — not just dials.



What You Will Do

Execute 80–120 outbound cold calls per day using a structured script

Qualify prospects using our discovery framework before booking appointments

Handle objections professionally — 'not interested,' 'send me an
,' 'we already have someone'

Book qualified demo appointments for the sales team with accurate notes

Maintain accurate records in our CRM (HubSpot) — every call logged, every outcome tracked

Follow up on no-shows and cold leads according to our cadence schedule

Participate in daily check-ins and weekly performance reviews with your manager

Accept coaching — your calls are recorded and reviewed. You are expected to improve week over week.



Required Skills & Experience

Must-Have:

Minimum 1 year of outbound cold calling or telemarketing experience

Strong English — written and spoken, minimum 9/10

Comfortable on script — you do not improvise the qualification framework

Proven ability to handle objections without losing composure

Reliable remote setup: computer (4GB+ RAM), quality headset, stable high-speed internet, quiet workspace

Familiarity with Google Suite (Drive, Sheets, Gmail)



Strong Preference:

Experience booking B2B appointments (not consumer sales)

Experience with CRM data entry — HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar

High daily call volume history — 80+ calls/day in a previous role

Experience with commercial cleaning, facilities, or services industry



Nice-to-Have:

Familiarity with Canadian business culture and time zones

Experience working with a remote team across time zones

Previous role where calls were recorded and reviewed



What Success Looks Like

Within 10 days: Training complete. Script memorized. First live calls running with manager supervision.

Within 30 days: Hitting daily call targets consistently. First solo-booked appointments confirmed.

Within 60 days: Appointment quality and show rate meeting department benchmarks. Coaching sessions showing measurable improvement week over week.



How to Apply

Do NOT send a generic cover letter or introduction. We will not review it.



Step 1: Fill out the application form using the link below. Attach your resume/CV.

Apply Here: 



Step 2: Record a 5–7 minute video answering all four questions below. Upload to Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube (unlisted) and paste the link in the form.



VIDEO QUESTIONS — All four are required. 5–7 minutes total.



Q1 — Show us a real cold call (or your best roleplay). Walk us through how you open a call, handle the first objection, and move toward booking a meeting. We want to hear your voice and your process — not a description of it.



Q2 — How many outbound calls did you make per day in your last role? What tools did you use to track your activity? Show us your screen if you have a dashboard, CRM record, or call log you can share.



Q3 — A prospect says: 'We already have a cleaning company and we're happy with them.' Walk us through your exact response — word for word, as if you're on the call right now.



Q4 — This role requires working Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 4:30 PM Mountain Time. Confirm your availability, show us your workspace on camera, and tell us what your current internet speed is (run a speed test at 
 and show us the result).





Applications with completed videos are reviewed first. Videos that skip any question are rejected.



Compensation & Growth

$1,100 CAD flat rate during 10-day training period

$1,170 CAD/month base salary after training

Performance-based compensation up to $1,800 CAD/month

Performance reviews at 30, 60, and 90 days

Long-term role — we are building a permanent outbound team, not filling a temporary seat

Calls are reviewed and coached weekly — you will get better, and your pay reflects it

Your job is to:

Match what is being said ? with relevant visuals (B-roll or screen recordings)

Keep edits clean, simple, and easy to understand

Deliver videos quickly and consistently



???? EXAMPLES OF THE STYLE WE WANT

Please review these examples before applying - these will be the creatives you'll be required to make:













???? This is the exact level of editing required

???? Nothing complex – just clear, clean, relevant and engaging



?? EDITING STYLE (VERY IMPORTANT)

Simple cuts (no complex transitions)

Add relevant B-roll over talking sections

Use common sense when matching visuals to what is being said

Sometimes source simple clips (e.g. screen recordings from Google if needed)



Example:

If the video is explaining something scientific ? you may need to find a simple visual online to help explain it



????? TOOLS & REQUIREMENTS

Must be able to edit using Capcut (preferred for speed)

Add auto captions using: Font: HarmonyOS Sans (OS-LT) with Subtle shadow behind text



?TURNAROUND EXPECTATIONS

This role is about speed + consistency



You will be editing content continuously

New videos will be added every 30 days

You must be able to keep up with workload and deadlines



???? This is NOT a slow-paced role

???? We need someone who can deliver consistently without delays



???? ROLE TYPE

Full-time position

Fixed monthly salary (not per video)

Long-term opportunity



As workload increases ? your pay can increase over time



???? WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Fast and efficient editor

Good attention to detail

Strong common sense (VERY important)

Reliable and consistent

Communicates well

Can follow a style and repeat it



???? THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

You prefer complex, creative editing

You work slowly or miss deadlines

You need constant supervision

You overcomplicate simple tasks



???? WHY JOIN US?

Stable, long-term work

Clear systems and expectations

Growing company (opportunity to grow with us)

Consistent monthly income



???? HOW TO APPLY

Please include:



Links to similar videos you’ve edited (REQUIRED)

Confirmation that you can edit using Capcut

Your expected monthly salary

Your internet speed



The word “DETAILIST” at the top of your application (to show you read this) and why you think you can do this role successfully along with how many videos could be delivered every week.



We’re looking to hire ASAP, so apply now if this sounds like a good fit.

title: Linkedin / Sales Nav / Phantombuster list building
description:
Summary

We’re looking for a detail-oriented and reliable LinkedIn Virtual Assistant to support our outbound lead generation efforts. This is an execution-focused role — we will provide the strategy and messaging. We need someone who can efficiently build targeted lists, safely export data, and manage LinkedIn profile updates.



This is ongoing, ad hoc work with consistent tasks each week.



---



## **Key Responsibilities**



* Build targeted lead lists using **LinkedIn Sales Navigator**

* Apply advanced filters to identify ideal prospects

* Export lead lists safely using **PhantomBuster** (or similar automation tools)

* Ensure compliance with LinkedIn best practices to minimize account risk

* Clean, organize, and format exported lead data (CSV files)

* Update and optimize LinkedIn profiles as needed

* Support light LinkedIn account management tasks

* Execute outreach workflows using pre-written messaging (no copywriting required)



---



## **Required Skills & Experience**



* Proven experience using **LinkedIn Sales Navigator**

* Hands-on experience with **PhantomBuster** (or similar scraping/automation tools)

* Strong understanding of LinkedIn limits and safe automation practices

* High attention to detail and accuracy

* Comfortable working with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)

* Reliable, organized, and responsive



---



## **Nice to Have**



* Experience supporting founders, agencies, or B2B service businesses

* Familiarity with CRM systems

* Basic understanding of lead generation workflows



---



## **Work Structure**



AVAILABLE UK HOURS 7-3PM - THIS IS ADHOC ON DEMAND ROLE BUT WE NEED SOMEONE with some availability duiring those hours



* Ongoing ad hoc tasks

* Clear instructions and messaging templates provided

* Flexible hours, but timely execution required

* Potential for long-term collaboration



---



## **How to Apply**



Please include:



1. A brief summary of your LinkedIn lead generation experience

2. Tools you’ve used (Sales Navigator, PhantomBuster, etc.)

title: Photoshop & Figma Graphic Design in German Agency
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content. We specialize in creating high-quality product photos for online shops and Amazon product pages. As we continue to expand, we're looking for Remote Photo Editors / Graphic Designers to join our team for a long-term commitment.





Job Description:



We are seeking a talented and experienced Photo Editor / Graphic Designer to edit product photos for use in Amazon and online shop listings. Your tasks will include retouching photos, as well as creating and designing graphics & icons. The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the need for efficient uploads and downloads of project files.





Training:



To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product photos and designing graphics, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:



The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.





Requirements:

- Experience in photo editing and graphic design

- Good Photoshop skills

- Figma skills

- Strong aesthetic sense and design skills

- Good English skills

- Interested in a full-time role (40 hours/week) and looking for long-term employment (years)





How to Apply:



Please submit your application with the subject "Gold-Photo-Candidate" and include a portfolio of your previous work.





Traits We Value:



- Ability to follow clear instructions and processes

- Discipline and determination

- Eagerness to create amazing visuals and push the limits





Benefits:



- Paid time off and paid holidays

- 13th-month pay

- Annual performance-based salary bonus/increases

- Internal training with exclusive knowledge





Join Us:



If you're passionate about making a significant impact with your photo editing and graphic design skills and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

title: Cold Outreach & Lead Gen VA (Intermediate)
description:
We are seeking an Intermediate Tech VA specializing in outbound sales operations. This role is designed for a self-starter who can own the operational layer of your cold
 systems—specifically within Instantly.ai—ensuring that campaigns remain healthy and high-performing so you can focus exclusively on strategy and sales conversations.



Role Type: Tech VA / Outbound Operations

Seniority: Intermediate

Job Type: Full-time Permanent

Timezone: EST (Eastern)

Compensation: Negotiable





Main Responsibilities / Day-to-Day

- Campaign Management: Manage and maintain cold
 campaigns in Instantly.ai, including sequencing updates and rigorous deliverability monitoring.

- Lead Acquisition: Research, scrape, and build targeted lead lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and related scraping tools.

- Technical Infrastructure: Handle all technical setup tasks including domain warmup, inbox rotation, tool integrations, and initial campaign configurations.

- Copywriting & Optimization: Rewrite or refresh cold
 scripts based on performance data to keep engagement high.

- Performance Tracking: Proactively flag issues, surface weekly updates on campaign health, and provide monthly summaries with actionable observations.

- Data Quality: Scrape, clean, and structure lead lists to ensure they are 100% campaign-ready and ICP-matched.





Essential Qualifications / Must-Haves

- Platform Expertise: Proven experience running cold
 campaigns end-to-end, specifically within Instantly.ai.

- Technical Knowledge: Deep understanding of inbox health, deliverability management, and domain warmup protocols.

- Lead Generation: Hands-on experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for lead research and list building.

- Communication: Fluent English speaker/writer capable of reviewing and managing scripts without hand-holding.

Autonomy: Strong async communicator who can take a brief and execute independently without requiring daily check-ins.





Preferred Skills / Nice-to-Haves

- Marketing Instincts: Strong copywriting skills to "punch up" a sequence and experience running A/B tests on subject lines and CTAs.

- Automation Literacy: Working knowledge of Zapier or Make to connect sales tools and reduce manual data entry.

- Sales Acumen: Familiarity with outbound sales workflows and a sharp eye for distinguishing high-quality leads from low-quality ones.





KPIs / Success Metrics

- Campaign Health: Ensuring campaigns are live, healthy, and sending without deliverability or bounce issues.

- Lead Delivery: Weekly delivery of lead lists at the agreed volume and quality (ICP-matched).

- Engagement Benchmarks: Maintaining
 open rates at 40%+ with positive trends in reply rates.

- Operational Reliability: Zero "dropped balls"—completing tasks and tech setups within agreed turnaround times without needing follow-up chasing.



Hiring Process ?

Round 1 – Interview with Talent Team (skills + experience assessment) ?

Round 2 – Interview with Hiring Manager (project scope + compensation discussion)??



If interested please send your update CV/Resume along with brief summary of your experience in technical/automations

title: GHL Implementation Specialist
description:
We are seeking an Intermediate Tech VA specializing in GoHighLevel (GHL) and workflow automation. This role is designed for a technical expert who can own the backend architecture of multiple sub-accounts—specifically utilizing N8n and GHL—ensuring all integrations, calendars, and pipelines function seamlessly so you can focus exclusively on growth and high-level strategy.



Role Overview

? Role Type: Tech VA

? Seniority: Intermediate

? Contract Type: Contract

? Location: Asia, Latin America

? Timezone: PST (Pacific)

? Compensation: $300–$500/month



Main Responsibilities / Day-to-Day

? GHL Architecture: Build and configure three dedicated GHL sub-accounts (Bradbury, OnePint, AlgoAI) under the main agency account, including pipeline builds to specific brand specs.

? Workflow Automation: Build N8n workflows connecting Google Calendar to GHL for meeting capture and automated pipeline stage movement.

? System Integrations: Connect Instantly and Sales Robot to GHL via webhooks or N8n; authenticate dedicated Gmail accounts per sub-account.

? Booking & Reminders: Configure GHL calendars and booking pages; build 72/48/24-hour reminder sequences for all meeting types.

? Nurture & Content: Build
 nurture and newsletter sequences to spec; evaluate and configure LinkedIn content publishing tools.

? Meeting Operations: Configure Otter.ai OtterPilot for auto-joining Zoo
etings and ensure auto-link generation on booking.

? Ongoing Support: Provide reactive technical support, implement iteration changes, and conduct handoff walkthrough sessions.



Essential Qualifications / Must-Haves

? GHL Mastery: Expert-level knowledge of sub-account architecture, pipeline building, and workflow automation (conditional logic, triggers, timed sequences).

? Technical Logic: Deep experience with N8n (preferred) or Make/Zapier, including webhook nodes, field mapping, and error handling.

? API & Integration: Proficiency with Google Calendar API/webhook integrations and Gmail OAuth protocols.

? Communication & Documentation: Strong discipline in creating SOPs as a final deliverable; ability to conduct clear walkthrough sessions.

? Messaging Automation: Hands-on experience with
 and SMS automation setup inside the GHL ecosystem.



Preferred Skills / Nice-to-Haves

? Sales Tooling: Familiarity with Instantly (webhooks) and Sales Robot integration.

? Deployment: Experience with N8n self-hosted deployment on a VPS.

? Social Management: Experience with content publishing tools such as Buffer, Publer, or Metricool.

? Agency Operations: Experience managing multi-sub-account GHL environments at an agency level.



KPIs / Success Metrics

? Integration Integrity: All integrations function end-to-end with zero data loss; N8n error alerts are configured and functional.

? Pipeline Accuracy: GHL pipeline stages reflect accurate prospect status at all times.

? Sequence Reliability: 72/48/24-hour reminders fire correctly for 100% of booked meetings.

? Operational Autonomy: AlgoAI can operate every workflow independently after walkthroughs; full SOP documentation delivered before handoff.

? Response Agility: Iteration requests turned around within 48 hours; broken integrations resolved within 24 hours.



This covers the end-to-end ownership of your technical ecosystem, ensuring your GHL infrastructure and automation layers are managed with professional precision.





Hiring Process:

- Round 1: Interview with Talent Team (Skills + Experience Assessment).

- Round 2: Interview with Hiring Manager (Project Scope + Compensation Discussion).



To apply, send your resume link (accessible to all) and brief summary of experience

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
Quick question!

Are you tired of working as an average Social Media Manager, never growing professionally, and never getting the chance to take your career to the next level?

Do you want to experience working with clients on a larger platform? Do you want to learn the skills required to help US-based business owners, influencers, and public figures take their social media presence and personal brands to the level of virality?



WE ARE HIRING!

We are looking for individuals who are eager to learn and want to take their digital marketing careers to new heights.

Enjoy benefits such as:

Unlimited access to almost $10,000 worth of training and courses for both personal skills and development.

The chance to work with clients that will elevate your resume, giving you the opportunity to break into the international market.

Working alongside a team that prioritizes a healthy work environment.

An environment that cultivates personal growth, serving as the foundation for skill development.





Just Simply Marketing (JSM) is a digital marketing agency based in Ontario, Canada, dedicated to helping business coaches, speakers, and experts from the US and Canada build, grow, and monetize their online brands. Specializing in organic marketing strategies, we focus on content creation, social media management, lead generation, and video production to help our clients stand out online. At JSM, we value creativity, excellence, and personal growth in everything we do.

You will work closely with our creatives, video editing, and graphic design teams to review and approve videos and designs, ensuring they align with our clients' brand and strategy. As our Social Media Specialist, you will be the driving force behind our clients' brand growth and increased online presence.

This is a fully remote position with working hours from 6:00 AM to 2:00 PM EST, Monday to Friday. The Social Media Specialist will report directly to the Social Media Team Managers.



How to Apply:

Interested candidates, please apply through our application form: 



RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Content Research: Use our FREE AI & Software tools to develop effective social media strategies.

-Content Creation: You will be responsible for creating content ideas to grow your client’s social media presence, build their personal brand, and ultimately help them generate income through their social media platforms. Don’t worry, you don’t have to edit anything! You’ll be working alongside a video editing and graphic design team to create content!

-Copywriting & Scriptwriting: You will work hand-in-hand with a team and your client to build effective storytelling copy for social media. We will train you to use AI tools and storytelling strategies to captivate an audience.

-Content Posting: You will handle the scheduling and posting of content across various social media platforms in line with the content calendar and strategy you've created.

-Content Analysis and Reporting: You will generate reports on account performance and audience engagement. These insights will be used to optimize strategies and create better content for our clients.



ALL TRAINING PROVIDED – WORTH $10,000 – IS FREE



REQUIREMENTS:

-A minimum of 1 year of experience as a social media manager.

-Proficient in using Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Proven track record in achieving results for your past/current clients' online brands.

-Experience in copywriting and understanding of SEO & keywords.

-Looking to work for the long term and grow within the company.

-Experience with 
, Metricool, Slack, Google Drive, and Google Docs is highly preferred but not required.

-Strong communication skills – Confidence is a PLUS as you will be consistently interacting with US/Canada-based clients.



P.S. Don’t worry if you do not meet all the requirements, we have the training to help you!



How to Apply:

If this sounds like the perfect fit for you, please fill out our application form:

title: Senior .NET Software Developer
description:
About the Role



L’EVATE is hiring on behalf of a fast-growing North American technology company building award-winning, enterprise software solutions across financial services, lending, real estate, and government sectors.



This is a high-impact role where you will design, build, and optimize scalable applications used in real-world business environments. We are looking for a senior developer who can think architecturally, write clean and efficient code, and contribute to high-performance systems at scale.



This is not a basic development role. You will be expected to take ownership, contribute to technical decisions, and operate at a high level while supporting team growth.



What Success Looks Like

Clean, scalable, production-ready code

Strong ownership of backend systems and architecture

High-performance applications, APIs, and database operations

Reliable deployments with minimal production issues

Effective collaboration with cross-functional teams

Contribution to engineering standards and team development



Key Responsibilities

Software Development & Architecture

Design, develop, and maintain applications using C#, .NET Core / .NET Framework, and ASP.NET MVC / Web API

Architect scalable, secure, and maintainable software solutions

Build and optimize RESTful APIs and backend services

Work within microservices-based architectures

Integrate third-party APIs, cloud services, and external systems

Optimize performance across applications, APIs, and databases



Database & Backend Development

Design and optimize SQL Server databases (queries, indexing, performance tuning)

Implement data access using Entity Framework, Dapper, or similar ORM tools



Cloud, DevOps & Deployment

Deploy and manage applications in Azure or AWS environments

Work with CI/CD pipelines and automate deployment processes

Use containerization tools such as Docker (Kubernetes is a plus)

Implement logging, monitoring, and error-handling strategies

Ensure secure coding practices and compliance with industry standards



Technical Leadership & Collaboration

Provide mentorship and guidance to junior and mid-level developers

Conduct code reviews and enforce coding standards and best practices

Collaborate with product managers, business analysts, and design teams to translate requirements into technical solutions

Contribute to system design and technical decision-making



Requirements

Core Skills

5+ years of experience 
 development

Strong expertise in C#, ASP.NET Core / .NET Framework, MVC, and Web API

Strong experience with Microsoft SQL Server and database design

Solid understanding of OOP, SOLID principles, and design patterns

Experience building scalable, high-performance applications



Frontend (Preferred but Not Required)

Experience with JavaScript, TypeScript, and frameworks such as React, Angular, or Blazor



Cloud & DevOps

Experience with Azure or AWS cloud platforms

Strong experience working with Git and Agile development environments

Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automated deployments

Experience with Docker or containerized environments



Other Requirements

Strong problem-solving, debugging, and troubleshooting skills

Excellent English communication skills

Ability to work EST hours

Reliable work setup and internet connection



Nice to Have

Experience with microservices architecture

Familiarity with NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Redis, CosmosDB)

Experience with GraphQL, gRPC, or real-time systems (SignalR, WebSockets)

Experience with unit testing frameworks

Exposure to AI/ML integration within applications

Microsoft Azure certifications



Role Details

Full-Time Remote Role

EST working hours required

Long-term opportunity with growth potential

Start Date: ASAP 



To be considered, please submit:

- Your resume

- Links to 2–3 projects, GitHub, or portfolio

- A short answer (2–3 sentences):

What is one system or project you’ve built that you’re most proud of, and why?



Include this in your subject line:

“.NET Developer – I Read Everything”

title: Creative Strategist / Creative Supervisor
description:
Join Our Creative Powerhouse: Creative Strategist / Supervisor Wanted



Are you a visionary who thrives at the intersection of high-level strategy and hands-on execution? Do you have a "director’s eye" for video and the organizational pulse of a project manager?

We are looking for a Creative Strategist / Supervisor to lead our production workflow, mentor our editing team, and ensure every piece of content we ship is nothing short of exceptional.



The Mission

In this role, you aren't just "managing"—you are the gatekeeper of quality and the engine of efficiency. You will oversee a team of talented video editors, turning raw concepts into polished, high-performing assets.



What You’ll Do

Direct & Develop: Lead a team of video editors, providing clear creative direction and constructive feedback.

Quality Control: Review, approve, and handle high-level revisions to ensure brand consistency and excellence.

Workflow Mastery: Manage complex project boards in 
 and keep our asset library organized.

High-Velocity Execution: Juggle multiple creative tasks daily without breaking a sweat.

Hands-On Polish: Step into Premiere Pro when needed to apply the finishing touches or set the creative standard.











Who You Are



The Expert: You have deep, professional-grade experience in Ecommerce Video Editing

The Leader: You know how to motivate editors and communicate "the why" behind a revision.

 around the world since 2015. We are a fully remote team in several countries helping clients from all over the world.  we want them to think AMZ Clever.

You will handle creator communication, weekly creator meetings, product selection support, and performance tracking to drive GMV growth.

Help creators grow GMV, including:



Recommending high-potential products and content angles



Supporting posting consistency and performance improvement



Sharing campaign updates, commission changes, and key product priorities



Support product selection across women’s + men’s fashion and related lifestyle categories based on conversion potential, demand, and trend signals.



Track and report creator performance and growth metrics (GMV, video volume, CTR, CVR, sample-to-post rate, top products/creators).

Requirements

Strong interest in fashion & lifestyle (women’s and men’s trends, styling, product positioning).



Minimum 1 year of e-commerce experience, preferably TikTok Shop; 



Strong product sense: can evaluate products and select “winners” using both data and market understanding.



Excellent communication, interpersonal skills, and stakeholder management.



Organized, data-driven, and consistent with follow-ups and reporting.



Nice to Have



Experience managing creators/affiliates/KOLs/MCNs.



Familiarity with TikTok Shop affiliate links, commission strategy, and campaign operations.



Working Hours

Compensation

Salary review after 6 months based on KPI achievement.

title: TikTok Affiliate Assistant (Part-Time)
description:
Role Summary

 We are hiring an Affiliate Assistant to support our TikTok Shop affiliate operations. The key focus of this role is to identify and recruit creators, onboard them to our agency, provide product links, and track creator performance to help creators and brands grow GMV. Our portfolio includes both women’s and men’s brands, and you will work with both female and male creators.



---

Key Responsibilities

Creator Outreach & Onboarding

- Identify potential TikTok creators daily (UK focus) across fashion & lifestyle categories.

- Send outreach messages, introduce the collaboration, and onboard creators to our agency process.

- Maintain a creator contact list/CRM and follow up consistently to convert leads into active creators.



Affiliate Link & Product Support

- Share product links with creators and guide them on which products are high-potential.

- Support basic product selection: understand product features, target audience, and why an item may convert well.

- Coordinate with internal teams/brands to get updated links, commission changes, and priority products.



Creator Management & Content Coordination

- Communicate with creators to encourage posting and maintain posting consistency.

- Track creators’ videos and performance (posted videos, views/engagement, GMV/sales where available).

- Support creators by sharing quick recommendations (best products, best angles, campaign updates).



Performance Tracking

- Track and update creator performance data weekly (and daily when needed).

- Prepare simple reports: active creators, posted videos, best-performing products/creators, gaps and next actions.

- Flag issues early (creators not posting, low performance, wrong product matching) and propose next steps.



Collaboration with Brands

- Work with brand teams to identify creator needs and recruit more creators to promote the brand.

- Support sampling/requests and ensure creators receive the correct information to start posting.



---

Requirements

- Basic to good English communication skills (written and spoken) — comfortable messaging creators and joining simple calls when needed.

- Minimum 2 years of e-commerce experience preferred (TikTok Shop or Amazon is a plus).

- Strong interest in fashion & lifestyle (women’s and men’s products).

- Good communication and interpersonal skills — confident speaking with creators and building relationships.

- Highly organized and detail-oriented (tracking sheets, follow-ups, link management).

- Strong and stable internet connection (required).

- Able to work independently, learn fast, and handle multiple tasks daily.

Nice to Have

- Experience with TikTok Shop affiliate/creator outreach, MCN/agency work, or influencer marketing.

title: Tiktok Shop Specialist

You will set up shops, manage product catalogs, coordinate fulfillment, ensure policy compliance, and build scalable processes so creators can sell without friction. This role suits a highly organized, proactive operator who loves turning moving parts into clean, reliable systems.



Responsibilities:



Lead onboarding and configuration of new TikTok Shops for creators, ensuring fast, accurate setup.

Manage the full product listing lifecycle: uploads, keywords, creatives, pricing updates, inventory sync, and listing health.

Coordinate order flow between internal fulfillment systems and TikTok Shop; monitor SLAs, troubleshoot shipping and OMS issues, and resolve exceptions.

Maintain platform compliance by mastering TikTok Shop policies, guidelines, rating standards, and best practices.

Partner with Creator Management and DTC Strategy on promos and campaigns; provide operational readiness plans and post-mortems.

Build and maintain SOPs, checklists, and documentation; design scalable processes and automations to reduce errors and manual work.

Track operational KPIs such as listing accuracy, order cycle times, cancellation rate, on-time ship rate, and store rating; surface insights and corrective actions.



Requirements:



2+ years in e-commerce operations, marketplace management, or similar operational role. Direct TikTok Shop experience is a strong plus.

Proven organizational rigor and attention to detail across multi-step workflows and cross-team dependencies.

Strong problem solving skills with the ability to anticipate risks, triage issues, and drive resolutions quickly.

Process builder who documents clearly and improves systems over time.

Excellent written and verbal communication for internal teams and creator partners.

Comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment with shifting priorities.



Bonus: experience with Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, OMS tools, and basic logistics and fulfillment concepts; familiarity with SQL or workflow automation is helpful.

title: Static Ad Creative Strategist — Commission-Only | Facebook DTC | $2.5M
description:
WHO WE ARE



We're an 8-figure DTC women's wellness brand spending $1M+/month on Meta ads. We test fast, we scale hard, and we let the data d
 what wins.



We're not looking for one unicorn. We're building a team of sharp, hungry creative strategists who want to earn real money based on real results — no salary cap, no bureaucracy.



THE MODEL — READ THIS CAREFULLY



This is not a traditional freelance job. It's better.



You create static image ads. We run them with our money on
. When they spend, you earn a % of that spend — every month, for as long as the ad runs.



Commission structure (based on monthly ad spend on YOUR ads):

• $0–$10K ? 5%

• $10K–$30K ? 4%

• $30K–$60K ? 3%

• $60K+ ? 2%



Let's do the math. One winning ad scaling to $50K/month = $1,900 in your pocket. Multiple winners running simultaneously = serious recurring income. And we test at volume — the more concepts you create, the more chances you have to hit. We now spend 50k day, so it’s really easy to get 50/100k day in spend on our ad account (we scale with really low ROAS)



You'll get access to our internal testing framework, our creative courses, and performance data on everything you create. You're not working blind.



??????????????????????????????

WHAT YOU'LL DO

??????????????????????????????



One format. One platform. Total focus.



You create static image ads — native-style,
 only. That means:

• Long-form copy that reads like content, not an ad

• A single scroll-stopping image that makes someone pause mid-feed

• Angles pulled from customer reviews, pain points, and real language — not creative guesswork



Volume is rewarded. The more concepts you test, the more chances something scales. We run everything through CBO, so no idea dies from underexposure — if the concept is strong, the algorithm finds it.



WHO THIS IS FOR



We don't care if you're senior or junior. We care if you understand what makes someone stop scrolling and read.



You're the right fit if:

• You know what a native-style static ad looks like and why it works

• You understand direct response and consumer psychology — not as theory, but as practice

• You can mine reviews and customer language to build copy angles

• You're self-directed and don't need to be chased

• You want to earn based on output, not hours



QUICK FILTER



Before applying, look at this ad: 
 



This is one of our top performers. Study it. Understand why it works.



Then write your own full native-style static ad for our brand — complete copy, from headline to CTA, plus a description of the image you'd use.



Don't summarize what you'd write. Write it.



If you don't know what a native
 static ad is, this role isn't the right fit — and that's okay.



If you do — and you're ready to bet on your own work — apply now.

title: Full-Stack Developer (Remote, Contract)
description:
About the Role



We at JVDB Studios are looking for a Full-Stack Developer to lead the end-to-end development of a mobile-first workforce management platform. This is a hands-on role where you will own the full technical build—from architecture to deployment.



You’ll be working on a product designed to replace multiple operational tools (scheduling, HR, quality control, invoicing) with a single integrated platform, with future plans to scale into a white-label SaaS solution.



This is a high-impact opportunity to build a product from the ground up with a direct European company, offering strong compensation and flexible working conditions.



What You’ll Build



The platform will be developed across three phases:



Phase 1 – App v1.0

User profiles and onboarding system

GPS-based check-in (geofencing)

AI chatbot assistant (RAG-based knowledge system)

Data ingestion pipelines (internal + public sources)

Internal testing and iteration



Phase 2 – Operational Platform

Scheduling API integrations

Gamification system (levels, badges, rewards)

Internal shift marketplace

AI-powered photo quality scoring (computer vision)

Expanded AI assistant capabilities



Phase 3 – Market-Ready Product

Automated scheduling and planning engine

Full HR module (contracts, hours, leave tracking)

Automated invoicing system

AI-driven performance insights

Multi-tenant architecture for white-label deployment



Technical Requirements



Mobile Development

React Native or Flutter (single codebase for iOS & Android)

Experience with device APIs (GPS, camera, push notifications)



Backend

Node.js (Express/NestJS) or Python (FastAPI/Django)

RESTful APIs and real-time systems (WebSockets/SSE)



Database

PostgreSQL (preferred)

Experience with scalable schema design (SaaS, multi-tenant systems)



AI / ML Integration

Experience with RAG pipelines (vector databases + LLM APIs)

Computer vision integrations (or third-party APIs)

Strong prompt engineering skills



DevOps

Docker, CI/CD pipelines

Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)



Security

Role-based access control

OAuth2 / JWT authentication

GDPR-aware data handling



Nice-to-Have

Experience building white-label SaaS platforms

Background in workforce management / scheduling systems

Gamification systems (XP, leaderboards, rewards)

Geofencing/location-based applications



Candidate Profile

Strong portfolio with at least 2 live mobile applications

Proven experience integrating AI into real products

Ability to work independently and make technical decisions

Clean, scalable coding practices

Responsive and proactive communicator



Engagement Details

Type: Freelance / Contractor

Duration: 18–24 weeks (with potential extension)

Hours: 30–40 hours per week

Rate: USD TBD

Timezone: Minimum 4-hour overlap with CET (Amsterdam time)



Why Join JVDB Studios

Work directly with a European company

Competitive pay with flexibility

Opportunity to build and scale a product from scratch

Long-term potential beyond the initial project



How to Apply



Send your resume, portfolio, and live project links to:

title: Amazon Brand Manager
description:
We’re looking for a performance-driven Amazon Brand Manager to own and grow our presence across multiple Amazon storefronts. If you thrive in fast-paced e-commerce environments, know Amazon inside and out, and can juggle strategy, execution, and analysis across several brands simultaneously, this role is for you.



Responsibilities:



Multistorefront Management: Own and scale 5+ Amazon storefronts, ensuring consistent brand voice, high-quality visuals, and fully optimized listings.

Launch & Promo Strategy: Plan and execute product launches, promotions, and seasonal campaigns to maximize visibility and sales.

Performance Monitoring: Track storefront KPIs (sales, traffic, conversion, advertising ROI), customer feedback, and competitor moves—turn insights into actionable strategies.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Coordinate with creative, PPC, inventory, and logistics teams to align messaging, stock, and advertising.

Compliance & Trends: Stay up-to-date with Amazon algorithm updates, policies, and marketplace trends to maintain optimal visibility and compliance.

Listing Optimization: Implement Amazon SEO best practices—optimize titles, bullets, descriptions, keywords, and A+ content.

UX & Conversion: Lead storefront UX improvements, A/B tests, and creative updates to boost conversion and engagement.

Reporting: Produce regular dashboards and reports summarizing performance and recommending next steps for growth.



Requirements:



Proven experience managing 5+ Amazon storefronts simultaneously.

3+ years in Amazon brand management, e-commerce, or digital marketing.

Deep knowledge of Amazon Seller Central, Brand Registry, A+ / Premium A+ content, and Amazon SEO.

Analytical mindset with demonstrated success in improving sales, conversion rates, and advertising ROI.

Comfortable using keyword research and listing-optimization tools; adept at data interpretation and strategic planning.

Strong project-management, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in problem-solving.

Experience with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, DataHawk, or similar analytics suites is a plus.

Familiarity with Amazon DSP or external traffic/acquisition strategies is a plus.

Graphic-design chops or oversight experience for creative production is a plus.

Knowledge of international Amazon marketplaces (UK, EU, CA, etc.) is a plus.

title: TikTok Shop Content Strategist
description:
We are seeking a TikTok Shop Content Strategist who is deeply TikTok-native and experienced in both creative strategy and hands-on content creation. This role sits at the intersection of trend forecasting, performance analysis, and short-form video production, with a clear focus on driving engagement, discovery, and revenue through TikTok. You will own the TikTok content roadmap end-to-end, translating insights and trends into scroll-stopping, conversion-driven content while collaborating closely with Growth, Creative, Influencer, and Paid teams.



Responsibilities:



Own and execute the TikTok content strategy aligned with brand, growth, and product priorities

Build and manage weekly and monthly content calendars tied to launches, campaigns, and cultural 
nts

Translate performance insights into actionable creative briefs, concepts, and content themes

Identify whitespace opportunities across formats such as UGC-style content, trends, education, POVs, and product demos

Concept, script, film, and edit TikTok content optimized for platform-native performance

Create authentic, non-overproduced videos that resonate with TikTok audiences

Test multiple hooks, angles, and storytelling structures per concept and iterate rapidly based on results

Monitor TikTok trends, sounds, formats, and creator behavior, adapting them in a brand-safe and commercially relevant way

Track and analyze content performance including views, engagement, saves, CTR, and conversions

Partner with growth and paid teams to identify high-performing organic content for amplification

Collaborate with influencer, affiliate, creative, and brand teams to ensure consistency in voice, tone, and visual identity

Support product launches with high-impact TikTok storytelling



Requirements:



1–2+ years of experience creating and/or strategizing TikTok content for a brand or creator account

Deep understanding of TikTok trends, algorithms, and creator culture

Proven ability to produce content that drives both engagement and conversion

Strong storytelling instincts with a clear focus on hooks and retention

Comfortable being on camera and directing others on camera when needed

Highly organized, fast-moving, and comfortable testing, learning, and iterating quickly

Data-informed creative mindset with a focus on performance over vanity metrics

title: Security Operations Specialist
description:
Role Overview

American Medical Compliance is seeking a highly detail-oriented Security Operations Specialist to support our cybersecurity and regulatory compliance initiatives. In this role, you will act as the primary executor of our security and compliance controls, working directly with the CISO in a Maker-Checker framework. You will be responsible for performing critical administrative tasks, maintaining security systems, and generating audit-ready evidence to support our SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA compliance.



Job Details:

Schedule: Mondays to Fridays; 8 AM to 4 PM Mountain Standard Time

Work type: Full-time; Work from Home set-up

Start Date: ASAP



Key Responsibilities (Maker Functions)

• Compliance Evidence Generation

Execute and document technical controls required for SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA, including: 

o Access log reviews 

o Encryption verification 

o Audit trail validation 

• Jira Administration

Serve as the primary administrator for Jira: 

o Design and maintain workflows 

o Configure permission schemes 

o Manage service desk projects 

o Ensure all IT and compliance activities are properly tracked and auditable 

• User Lifecycle Management

Manage provisioning and de-provisioning of user access across systems: 

o Enforce the Principle of Least Privilege 

o Ensure compliance with HIPAA access control standards 

• Infrastructure Administration

Support cloud and on-prem environments by: 

o Performing credential rotations 

o Applying security patches 

o Monitoring system health and availability 

• Security Documentation & Audit Readiness

Maintain a centralized audit evidence repository: 

o Capture screenshots, logs, and reports 

o Ensure all activities are properly documented for external audits 

• Administrative & Security Operations Support

Perform day-to-day IT and security administrative tasks while ensuring: 

o Full traceability of actions 

o Proper documentation for CISO review and approval 



Required Qualifications

• Experience 

o At least 2+ years of experience in a Security Operations, IT Administration, or Compliance-focused role 

o Hands-on experience supporting SOC 2, ISO 27001, and/or HIPAA environments 

• Jira Expertise 

o Strong experience in Jira administration 

o Ability to build workflows, manage permissions, and configure custom fields 

• Security & Compliance Knowledge 

o Solid understanding of: 

? Data privacy and protection 

? Risk management practices 

? Security controls in healthcare or regulated environments 

• Documentation & Attention to Detail 

o Strong documentation discipline 

o Ability to produce audit-ready evidence consistently 

• Audit Support Experience 

o Experience preparing for or supporting third-party audits is highly preferred 



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience working in healthcare, BPO, or compliance-driven environments 

• Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, or GCP) 

• Relevant certifications (e.g., Security+, ISO 27001, or similar) are a plus

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Junior Integration Specialist (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a motivated Junior Integration Specialist to join our Managed Service Provider (MSP) team. In this role, you won't just manage one system, you will be the "bridge builder" for our diverse portfolio of business clients, helping to connect their various software platforms so their data flows seamlessly.

 

This is a client-facing technical role designed for someone who understands system logic and is eager to master enterprise-level tools like Boomi, Salesforce, and Power Automate across multiple different client environments. You will work under the guidance of senior specialists to build, monitor, and troubleshoot the automated "pipes" that keep our clients' businesses running efficiently.

 

Key Responsibilities

      • Client Integration Monitoring & Support

        o Monitor daily integration logs across multiple client environments to ensure data is syncing correctly.

        o Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve integration errors or data sync failures for various client systems.

        o Maintain clear technical documentation for each client’s unique integration workflows and data mappings.



      • Workflow Automation for Clients

         o Help build and test automated workflows to reduce manual data entry for our clients' business teams.

         o Assist in setting up automated alerts, notifications, and scheduled tasks within client environments.

         o Update and optimize existing client automations as their business requirements evolve.



      • Data Integrity & CRM Support

        o Assist with data cleanup, mapping, and bulk imports into client CRMs and other business tools.

        o Help configure client system settings (custom fields, user permissions, etc.) to support new integrations.

        o Verify that client data remains consistent across their various platforms (e.g., ERP to CRM sync).



      • Requirements Gathering & Consulting

        o Partner with client stakeholders to understand their business processes and document their technical requirements.

        o Participate in the testing and QA phase of new system rollouts for clients.

        o Actively train on our core tech stack (Boomi, Salesforce, Power BI/Automate) to take on more complex client builds.

 

Qualifications

Required

     • Technical Aptitude: A strong interest in system logic and a desire to build a career in technical integrations and automation.

     • Basic API Knowledge: A foundational understanding of what an API is and familiarity with data formats like JSON.

     • Comfort with APIs: Ability to read technical documentation to understand how different software platforms can be connected.

     • Business Process Mindset: Ability to look at a client's manual task and visualize how it could be automated.

     • Customer Service Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication; ability to explain technical status to non-technical client contacts.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

     • 0–2 years of experience in an MSP, IT support, or junior technical role.

     • Exposure to any CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) or automation tool (Zapier, Power Automate, etc.).

     • Experience using Excel for data organization or basic troubleshooting.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2586) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Business Systems Specialist (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a Business Systems Specialist to help build, maintain, and improve the systems that power our day-to-day operations. In this role, you will partner with stakeholders to understand business processes, translate needs into technical solutions, and deliver automation, reporting, and integrations that scale.

 

The ideal candidate is a strong communicator who can comfortably move between business users and technical implementation. While we use specific tools like Salesforce, Boomi, Power Automate, and Power BI, we are looking for someone with a solid foundation in CRM/ERP administration, system integrations, and workflow automation who is eager to learn and master our specific tech stack.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Workflow Automation

      o Design, build, and maintain automated workflows to streamline business processes.

      o Troubleshoot and optimize existing automations for performance, reliability, and clarity.

      o Implement approval workflows, notifications, data syncs, and operational automations.



• Reporting & Analytics

      o Connect to data sources, shape data, and create clear visualizations for decision-making.

      o Ensure reporting is accurate, well-documented, and easy for end users to interpret.



• System Integrations

      o Document integration logic, data mappings, and dependencies.

• Cross-Functional Support

• Automation & Integration Experience: Familiarity with building automated workflows and connecting systems (e.g., Power Automate, Zapier, Boomi, MuleSoft, etc.).

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

title: IT Engineer
description:

title: Integrator — Visibility, Content & Growth (Personal Brand)
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

I am building something meaningful.

A personal brand and education company centered around wealth, identity, expansion, and helping people step into their biggest lives.

This is not a typical assistant role.

I am looking for someone who wants to help build a movement — someone who sees the bigger picture, loves turning ideas into execution, and is excited by growth.

You will work closely with me as we expand visibility, scale programs, grow community, and create work that impacts thousands of people.

If you love being part of something that is growing, evolving, and meaningful — this may be a beautiful fit.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN

You help translate vision into execution.

This includes:

Content & visibility?• Managing social posting workflows?• Coordinating video and podcast editing?• Repurposing content across platforms?• Maintaining content calendar?• Tracking what performs

Podcast & media?• Podcast production coordination?• Repurposing episodes into clips?• Podcast outreach (booking guest appearances)?• Managing speaking / collaboration pipeline

Growth & outreach?• Supporting partnerships and visibility opportunities?• Researching outreach opportunities?• Suggesting ideas for growth and exposure?• Helping implement visibility strategies

Operations?• Turning ideas into task plans?• Creating simple systems and checklists?• Keeping projects moving forward?• Reducing bottlenecks?• Helping the business scale smoothly



WHO THIS ROLE IS REALLY FOR

You enjoy structure — but you also enjoy growth.

You like thinking about how things can improve.

You notice opportunities.?You bring ideas.?You take ownership.?You don’t wait to be told every step.

You want to grow with a business long term — not just complete tasks.

You are calm, organized, proactive, and excited to be part of building something meaningful.



EXPERIENCE

You have supported a creator, online business, or agency before.

You are comfortable with content workflows, project management, and learning new tools.

You don’t need to know everything — but you do need to be resourceful.



HUGE PLUS

Podcast workflow experience?Video editing coordination?Outreach experience?Launch support?Kajabi or course platforms?Basic analytics tracking



GROWTH

This role will grow into a key position with more ownership and leadership.

Salary increases with ownership and results.

I am looking for someone long-term who wants to build something meaningful together.



TO APPLY

Please include:

1. A short voice note introducing yourself

2. One idea you would suggest to grow a personal brand like mine

3. A system or workflow you created

4. The word EXPANSION in your subject line

Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media & Influencer Manager — DTC Beauty Brand (US Market)
description:
About Us

We are a growing DTC beauty brand based in the US, selling a premium lipstick designed for women over 50. Our team is remote and distributed across multiple countries.

We're looking for someone to become the assistant to our Content Manager and take ownership of Instagram, influencer management, and content coordination.

This is a full-time, long-term position. We want someone who wants to grow with the brand for the next 2-3 years.



What You'll Do

Instagram & Social Media



Plan, schedule and publish daily content on Instagram (feed + stories + reels)

Engage with our community: respond to DMs, comments, mentions, tag-ups (in English)

Monitor trends and adapt content to what's working in the beauty/mature women niche

Track weekly metrics and report to me



Influencer Management



Source and reach out to new influencers in the US (women 45+ creators)

Manage the full pipeline: first contact, negotiation, contract signing, product shipment, content delivery, posting

Brief influencers on our creative guidelines (we provide the frameworks)

Handle a 3-tier program: entry-level (free product + commission), mid-level (+ fixed fee), Ambassador (monthly retainer + Partnership Ads)

Track all influencer content, ROI, and commission payments



Content Coordination



Collect UGC from customers and influencers

Organize asset libraries (Google Drive, Trello)

Coordinate with our creative production team

Support with occasional ad copy translation/adaptation tasks





Required Skills



Fluent English (written & spoken) — MANDATORY. You'll be managing US customers and negotiating with US influencers. If your English isn't excellent, please do not apply.

2+ years of experience in social media management for a DTC brand (beauty / skincare / cosmetics preferred)

1+ year of influencer outreach experience — cold pitching, negotiating, closing contracts

Instagram power user — you know what's trending, how Reels work, what hooks perform

Meta Partnership Ads experience is a plus

Organized, reliable, proactive

Familiar with Shopify, Google Drive, Trello, Notion, Slack





Apply

Reply to this post with:



Why you're a good fit for this specific role (5-10 sentences)

2-3 DTC brands you've managed social media for (Instagram links if possible)



Start your reply with the word "lipstick" so I know you read the full post.

title: Meta Ads Specialist / Performance Marketer
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



About Us:

CozifyHome is a dynamic and growing e-commerce brand. We are launching an exciting Trade-In Rugs campaign and are looking for a performance-driven digital marketer to help us scale and take our online presence to the next level.



Job Overview:

We are seeking a Meta Ads Specialist / Performance Marketing Virtual Assistant who will be responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing paid advertising campaigns focused on our Trade-In Rugs landing page. You will play a key role in driving qualified traffic, increasing conversions, and maximizing ROAS through data-driven ad strategies.



This role requires strong expertise in Meta Ads Manager, audience targeting, creative testing, and conversion tracking to ensure campaign success from click to purchase.



Key Responsibilities:



Meta Ads Management 
 & Instagram):

- Plan, create, and manage Meta Ads campaigns focused on driving traffic and conversions to the Trade-In Rugs landing page

- Build and optimize campaigns including prospecting, retargeting, and lookalike audiences

- Conduct A/B testing for ad creatives, copy, and audience segments

- Monitor daily ad performance and adjust budgets, bids, and targeting to improve ROAS

-Create and develop high-converting ad creatives (images, videos, UGC-style content) that will be used for Meta Ads campaigns



Funnel & Conversion Optimization:

- Analyze landing page performance and suggest improvements to increase conversion rates

- Ensure proper tracking setup (Meta Pixel, Events, Conversions API if applicable)

- Identify drop-off points in the customer journey and recommend optimization strategies



Analytics & Reporting:

- Track and report on key performance metrics (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, conversion rate)

- Provide weekly performance insights and actionable recommendations

- Use data to scale winning campaigns and cut underperforming ads



Qualifications & Required Experience:

- Minimum 1–2 years of experience in Meta Ads /
 Ads management

- Proven experience running conversion-focused campaigns (e-commerce is a plus)

- Strong understanding of Meta Ads Manager, Pixel tracking, and audience targeting

- Ability to analyze data and make performance-driven decisions

Experience working with landing pages and funnels (Shopify, Amazon or similar platforms is a plus)

- Strong communication skills and attention to detail



Preferred Skills (Bonus Points):

- Knowledge of Shopify, Amazon or similar e-commerce platforms

- Experience using Meta Business Suite, Google Analytics, and other analytics/tracking tools to monitor and optimize ad performance.

- Copywriting skills for ad creatives and hooks

- Experience scaling ads from testing to high-budget campaigns

- Experience running TikTok Ads campaigns (TikTok Ads Manager, short-form video ads, and performance optimization for TikTok is a strong plus)



What We Offer:

- Opportunity to work on a high-growth e-commerce campaign

- Flexible and remote work setup

- Performance-driven growth opportunities within the company



How to Apply:

If you are a data-driven performance marketer who knows how to turn clicks into conversions, we’d love to hear from you.



Please submit:

- Your resume

- Portfolio or case studies of past ad campaigns

- Brief explanation of your experience with Meta Ads and e-commerce funnels

title: Social media manager — LEGO niche
description:
Social media manager — LEGO niche



Brickify · Remote · Part-time or full-time



Remote LEGO / brick community Content creation Short-form video

ABOUT BRICKIFY



Brickify is an AI-powered app that scans your building bricks and suggests builds from what you already own. We're a fast-growing startup built by and for the brick-building community, with strong organic traction and a passionate user base. Our founders come from the LEGO YouTube world and we want our social presence to reflect that authenticity.



THE ROLE



We're looking for a full-time social media manager to own and grow Brickify's presence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts. This isn't a generic social media job — you need to genuinely live in the LEGO and brick-building community. You'll be creating and posting content, engaging with our audience, and building Brickify into a brand that the community actually loves.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

Plan, create, and post daily content across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

Engage with followers, respond to comments, and build community around Brickify

Identify trending LEGO/brick content and find creative ways to tie Brickify into the conversation

Track performance metrics and iterate based on what's working

Collaborate with the founders on campaigns, launches, and creator partnerships

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Deep knowledge of the LEGO and brick-building community — MOCs, AFOLs, set culture, bootleg content, etc.

High engagement instincts — you know what makes people stop scrolling in this niche

Self-starter who can operate independently without hand-holding

TO APPLY
