title: Freelance Ad Creative Designer
description:
We are looking for a fast and creative Ad Designer to make pictures and simple animations for our
 and Instagram ads.



We don't just want "pretty" pictures. We want designs that are so catchy, they make people stop scrolling and click!



We will start with a small, paid test project. If you do a great job and work fast, we will give you steady part-time work.



Job Title: Freelance Ad Designer (Uses AI / Trial to Hire)

About the Job

We are looking for a fast and creative Ad Designer to make pictures and simple animations for our
 and Instagram ads.



We don't just want "pretty" pictures. We want designs that are so catchy, they make people stop scrolling and click!



We will start with a small, paid test project. If you do a great job and work fast, we will give you steady part-time work. If things go really well, this can become a full-time job.



Using AI is a Big Plus!

We like to work fast. We really want someone who uses AI tools (like Midjourney, Photoshop AI, or DALL-E) to help them make great pictures quickly. If you know how to use AI to get more work done in less time, you are exactly who we are looking for.



What You Will Do



- Make eye-catching pictures and swipe-through posts (carousels) for
 and Instagram.

- Use AI to come up with new picture ideas and make them fast.

- Take our best ads and quickly make new versions of them so they stay fresh.



What We Want From You



You know how to get clicks: You understand how to use bright colors, big text, and cool pictures to grab someone's attention.



You know
 and Instagram: You know the right sizes for posts and stories.



You are fast: You don't spend all day on one picture. You use AI to help you make lots of good pictures quickly.



How to Apply

Please send us:

2. Your AI Tools: Tell us which AI programs you use and how they help you work faster.

title: Property Operations Lead - Remote
description:
Location: Remote 

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00am–6:00pm Eastern Time (USA) 

Compensation: $6/hour + monthly performance bonus 



SteelSafe Self Storage runs remote, online-first storage: rent online, get instant access, move in today. That only works when units are clean, functional, and ready to rent fast. When turns stall, inventory dies. 



We’re hiring a Property Manager with one scoreboard: more rent-ready units, faster turns. 



What you get: 

A clear scoreboard and a role that matters. 

High trust and real autonomy. 

Direct access to leadership and fast decisions. 

A system-driven operation (we run on Asana). 

Performance bonus opportunity tied to ops execution. 



What you’ll do: 

Run fast turns: Unit move?outs to Ready?to?Rent (R2R). 

Manage boots on the ground(BOTG) contractors and vendors. 

Create and drive work orders to completion with proof (photos/video). 

Own site readiness: gates, locks, cameras, lighting, cleanliness, curb appeal. 

Handle property projects end?to?end (example: order a sign, coordinate install, confirm with proof).  



What you own (outcomes): 

Median Time?to?Rent?Ready (TTRR) after move?out is ? 4 days. 

Rent?Ready Unit % stays high and trending up. 

Work orders dispatch quickly and close with proof. 

BOTG tasks close on time with proof; reconciliation stays current. 



Weekly scorecard is posted and drives action. 

The authority and tools you’ll have: 

You can fix what’s broken: turn workflow, proof standards, vendor SLAs, BOTG execution, inspection cadence, and enforce it. 

You can approve vendor spend up to $50 per job. Above that requires approval before work begins. 

Asana as the operating system (tasks, checklists, proof). 



This role is a fit if you: 

Own outcomes and like a clear scoreboard. 

Move fast, follow through, and don’t close tasks without proof. 

You can manage vendors and contractors firmly and professionally. 

Think in checklists, photos, and deadlines. 

Care about security, cleanliness, and a great customer experience.

title: TikTok Live Sales Closer (Face of SurviveX) – High Commission + Base
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines) 

Work Hours: US Evenings (EST/PST – Morning/Midday PH Time) 

Budget: $400 USD Base + 20% Commission (e.g $18+ per sale of $90+)



Who We Are: 

SurviveX is a US-based survival and first-aid brand. We don't just sell gear; we sell peace of mind. We are looking for a charismatic, high-energy, and persuasive Live Host to be the face of our brand on TikTok. This is not a "VA" job—this is a Sales Closer role for someone who loves the rush of a live audience.



The Opportunity: Base plus Commission

We are a bootstrap startup, which means we win when you win.



Base Retainer: $400 USD/month to cover your dedicated time and setup.

Massive Upside: $18 USD commission for every unit sold during your Lives (Average price: $90).

The Math: Sell just 10 units a week, and you’re making $1,120 USD/month. 

Sell 20 units a week, and you're at $1,840 USD/month—placing you in the top 1% of earners in the PH.



Who You Are:



Master Communicator: Your English is flawless, energetic, and relatable to a US audience.

Natural Closer: You know how to handle "objection handling" in real-time. You don't just read a script; you build a "must-have" vibe.



Tech Savvy: You have a high-quality smartphone (iPhone 13+ preferred) and a stable, high-speed fiber connection.

Resilient: You are comfortable being on camera for 2-3 hours at a time, keeping the energy high even if the room is quiet.

Bonus: You have an interest in survival gear, camping, or first aid (or you’re a fast learner).



Responsibilities:



Host five TikTok Lives per week focused on the US market.

Run "Flash Sales" and engage with US viewers to drive immediate conversions.

Collaborate with our team to refine the "pitch" based on live feedback.

Our team will help you with all backend operations during the sale, all you need to do is bring BIG emergency and sell, sell, sell.



How to Apply:



Do not send a resume yet. Please send a 60-second video introducing yourself..



The Challenge: Pick up any household object (a pen, a mug, a flashlight) and sell it to us as if it were a survival tool. Show us your energy!



#Tiktok #TiktokShop #CustomerSupport #CustomerService #VirtualAssistant #TiktokShopSupport #TiktokShopManager #TiktokShopLive #TiktokLiveHost

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Remote Appointment Setter — Real Estate (Part-Time, 20 hrs/week)

Quick read before you apply. - Send both resume and audio to: 



This job is simple.



You call people.



You find out if they have a house. You find out if they want to sell it.



That's it.



If they say yes, you book the appointment with our closer.



Then you move on to the next one.



What You Don't Do

- You don't pitch.

- You don't sell.

- You don't talk about price or commission.



That's not your job.



Your job is to find people who want to talk.



What A Day Looks Like

- You dial for 4 hours.

- You talk to about 30 people.



Out of those, 3-5 will raise their hand.



Out of those, 1 will end up on our closer's calendar.



That's a good day.



You log the call. One line. Move on.



The Pay

$4-5/hr base. Paid weekly.



Bonuses on top:



- $5 every time our closer gets on the phone with someone you passed over

- Bumps to $8 per call once you hit your weekly quota

- $5 every time our closer books the appointment

- $50 every time we get the listing

- $2,500 cash when 12 deals close from your work — plus all your bonuses double for the next year



The top people on our team make way more than their base.



The math works if you consistently do the reps.



The Schedule

20 hours a week. Part-time.



You pick your hours. Just be on during US business hours (8am-7pm, CST US time zone).



Who We Want



-You're comfortable on the phone

- Rejection doesn't bother you

- You follow a script. You don't freelance.

- You're organized. You can track 50 calls a day without losing your place.

- Your English is strong enough that people trust you on the phone

- You want to get paid for results



Who We Don't Want



- People who want to "sell"

- People who think a script is beneath them

- People who go quiet after 3 "no"s in a row



How to Apply

Send us two things:



1. Your resume.

2. A audio recording of you reading this script out loud.



This is the actual script you'd run on the job. It's called the Expired Script and we use it when we call homeowners whose listing just came off the market without selling.



Read your lines like you'd say them on a real phone call.

 Skip the "[Prospect:]" lines — those are just there so you know what you're responding to.



You: Hi, is this Bob?



[Prospect:] Yeah, who is this.



You: Bob, this is [your name]. Look, I'll be upfront, I'm with a Realtor, and before you hang up, I was hoping to ask you something really quick, would that be ok?



[Prospect:] ...okay, what is it?



You: I appreciate that. I saw the home on Oak Street came off the market a few weeks back. Do you still want to get it sold?



[Prospect:] Yeah, we do.



You: Listen, you've got to talk to Ry. He's awesome. He just sold four homes exactly like yours. Would there be any downside to taking a 5 minute call with him?



I've got him open Tuesday at 2 or Wednesday at 10 — which works better?



Read it like you'd say it on a real call. Energy matters. We're listening for tone, pace, and confidence.



Send both to: 



If your audio sounds right and your resume fits, we'll set up a call.



If not, we'll let you know.

title: Remote Operations Manager — Job Placement Campaigns (6 Clients)
description:
Remote Operations Manager — Job Placement Campaigns (6 Clients)



Company: Capital Career Club

Location: Remote — Philippines strongly preferred

Schedule: Monday–Saturday, up to 8 hours/day (Warsaw, Poland business hours)

Start: Immediate



ABOUT CAPITAL CAREER CLUB



Capital Career Club is a done-for-you job placement service based in Warsaw, Poland. We help international professionals land corporate jobs in Poland by running their entire job search for them — applications, recruiter outreach, and LinkedIn content. Our clients hand over their LinkedIn, their dedicated job-search
, and their strategy. We execute end to end. They show up to interviews. We make those interviews happen.



We are a lean, outcome-driven operation. No fluff. No busywork. Numbers or nothing.



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for one Remote Operations Manager to own the daily execution of 6 active job placement campaigns running simultaneously.



Think of each client as an active campaign. Each one has a target list, a content strategy, an outreach pipeline, and a performance dashboard. Your job is to make sure all 6 campaigns are hitting their numbers every single day — applications going out, outreach landing, content getting approved and published, inboxes managed, and reports delivered on time.



You use Claude AI and proven CCC templates to generate tailored cover letters, outreach messages, and LinkedIn posts fast. Then you send, log, track, and report with zero gaps.



We manage outcomes, not screen time. If the KPIs are hit and the quality is there, the work is done.



WHAT YOU WILL MANAGE EVERY DAY



Campaign Execution — Job Applications



Log into each client's LinkedIn and dedicated job-search
 every morning. Search for open roles using each client's confirmed keyword list and target company list. Use Claude AI to generate a tailored cover letter and application answers in the client's voice in under 3 minutes per role. Submit via LinkedIn Easy Apply, Pracuj.pl, or direct company career sites. Log every single application immediately with the company name, role title, platform, method, status, and follow-up date. No log means it did not happen. This rule is non-negotiable.



Campaign Execution — Outreach Pipeline



Identify recruiters, HR managers, and relevant employees at target companies for each client. Use Claude to generate personalised LinkedIn DMs and
 outreach in batches. Send connection requests with a note and structured follow-ups at Day 5 if there is no reply. Log every single touch with the name, company, channel, date, reply status, and next step.



Campaign Execution — LinkedIn Content



Draft posts in each client's voice using their Brand Content Brief and Claude AI. Place all drafts into the Content Approval Dashboard with a suggested publish date. Publish only after explicit written approval — never auto-publish under any circumstances. Handle basic post engagement including likes and simple replies according to each client's guidelines.



Campaign Tracking and Reporting



Keep all 6 campaign tracking sheets 100% updated before you log off every day. No backlogs, ever. Check each client's dedicated inbox multiple times daily and file all recruiter replies, assessments, interview invites, and offers into the correct folders. Prepare one structured weekly performance report per client using a provided template. All 6 reports submitted to the founder every Friday before 17:00 Warsaw time without exception.



Escalation Management



You never guess and you never improvise on high-stakes 
nts. You escalate to the founder within 30 minutes when a recruiter or hiring manager contacts a client directly, when an interview is confirmed or offered at any stage, when a job offer or draft contract appears, when a LinkedIn account is flagged or restricted, when a recruiter asks about salary, visa status, or availability, and when a client goes silent for 48 hours or more or raises a serious concern. Prebuilt escalation scripts are provided for every scenario. You use them every time.



CAMPAIGN TARGETS — WHEN ALL 6 ACCOUNTS ARE FULLY LIVE



Per client per day:



Around 22 tailored job applications submitted



10 to 12 personalised outreach messages sent



1 LinkedIn post drafted and submitted for approval (minimum 2 per client per week)



100% of all actions logged in the tracking sheet same day



Across all 6 clients per day:



Around 132 applications submitted



60 to 72 outreach messages sent



6 or more LinkedIn posts drafted for approval



Zero gaps in any tracking sheet



6 weekly reports submitted every Friday before 17:00 Warsaw time



You ramp up gradually. You are not handed 6 accounts on Day 1. The build-up is structured and fully supported by the founder.



TOOLS YOU WILL USE



Claude AI for cover letters, outreach messages, LinkedIn posts, and weekly reports. Full training provided from Day 1.



LinkedIn for client profile management, job applications, outreach, and content publishing.



Gmail for dedicated job-search inboxes per client with structured folder systems.



Google Sheets for campaign tracking sheets, performance dashboards, and the Operations Master Sheet.



Skool for DFY client resources and weekly group interview-prep sessions.



WhatsApp and
 for internal communication with the founder only. You never contact clients directly under any circumstances.



YOU ARE THE RIGHT PERSON FOR THIS ROLE IF



You have experience managing multiple client accounts, campaigns, or projects simultaneously — whether in a BPO, agency, outreach, or operations environment.



You are based in the Philippines or a closely aligned time zone with a stable and reliable internet connection. This is a hard requirement with no exceptions.



Your written English is strong. All work is in English serving international professionals and Polish corporate recruiters.



You are comfortable running outreach pipelines, managing inboxes, and operating inside detailed SOPs precisely and consistently.



You are confident using AI tools or genuinely excited to master them fast. We train you on Claude fully but daily execution with it is your job from Week 1.



You take ownership of your numbers. You flag problems early. You do not wait to be chased.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



You need daily reminders to complete your tasks.



You go quiet when there is a problem instead of flagging it early.



You treat deadlines as approximate.



You make excuses instead of finding solutions.



We hired for this role recently and parted ways early due to reliability issues. We are not looking for the most impressive background. We are looking for someone who shows up on time, owns their numbers, flags problems before they become fires, and takes genuine pride in clean and accurate work.



COMPENSATION



Months 1 and 2 — Training and Ramp-Up



Around $400 USD per month base while you learn the full system, tools, and SOPs with daily support from the founder.



From Month 3 — After Ramp-Up



Base salary reviewed and increased to $600 to $900 USD per month depending on reliability, quality, and KPI performance.



Performance Bonuses — Active From Day 1



$5 bonus for every confirmed interview booked for any client.

$20 bonus for every accepted job offer for any client.

$50 flat portfolio bonus when all 6 clients hit 80% or more of their weekly KPIs for 4 consecutive weeks.



Your upside grows directly with client results. The better the campaigns perform, the more you earn.



Example Month 1: $400 base + 12 interviews ($60) + 1 offer ($20) = $480

Example Month 2: $400 base + 20 interviews ($100) + 3 offers ($60) = $560



Payment is monthly via Wise or GCash on the 1st of each month.



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message with the following three things only:



Your name and location



Two short samples of outreach messages or LinkedIn posts you have written — or write fresh ones specifically for this application



One sentence on why this role fits you right now



Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a small paid trial task using Claude AI — generate a cover letter and outreach messages from a sample client brief. We assess on execution, not conversation.



Job Type: Full-time

Schedule: Monday to Saturday, up to 8 hours per day

Hours: All tasks completed by 18:00 Warsaw time (CEST) daily

Location: Remote — Philippines strongly preferred

Start Date: Immediate

title: PV (pharmacovigilance) Clinical Trial case processing experience (need 25 VA's)
description:
The Pharmacovigilance Associate is a fully WFH role and is responsible for the intake, processing, and management of safety cases arising from clinical trials. This role focuses on accurate documentation, evaluation, and reporting of adverse events in compliance with global pharmacovigilance regulations, study protocols, and company procedures.



Essential Functions:

• Perform case intake, triage, and data entry of adverse events, serious adverse events, and SUSARs from clinical trial sources

• Process safety cases in accordance with regulatory guidelines, study protocols, and internal standard operating procedures

• Review and interpret source documents including CIOMS forms, MedWatch reports, investigator communications, and clinical trial documentation

• Conduct medical review of cases and perform causality and expectedness assessments based on investigator reports and protocol requirements

• Perform case follow up with investigators or study teams to obtain missing information and ensure data completeness

• Manage safety queries and ensure timely resolution of case discrepancies

• Prepare and submit expedited safety reports to regulatory authorities, ethics committees, and investigators within required timelines

• Maintain accurate documentation and ensure compliance with global pharmacovigilance standards and reporting regulations





Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:

• Experience in pharmacovigilance case processing within clinical trials

• Strong understanding of adverse event reporting, serious adverse events, and SUSAR reporting requirements

• Familiarity with global safety reporting regulations and clinical trial safety procedures

• Experience reviewing clinical safety documentation such as CIOMS and MedWatch forms

• Strong attention to detail and ability to meet strict regulatory timelines



Safety Database Experience:

• Argus Safety

• ARISg

• PV Edge

• Preferred experience with Veeva Vault Safety and EDC databases



Education:

• Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing, or related field preferred.



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your intro video and updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

This role supports pharmacovigilance and clinical operations teams by managing safety documentation, coordinating with stakeholders, and maintaining regulatory compliance in accordance with ICH-GCP, FDA, EMA, and other global regulatory requirements.

title: Paid Media & Tracking Specialist (Remote)
description:
Employer : Curezma Pharmaceuticals  – An Australian Dermatology Biotech



Curezma is an Australian dermatology biotech platform focused on solving one of the largest unmet needs in skin health—steroid-free, clinically validated eczema care.

With a patented technology platform, TGA-listed products, and one of the largest clinical studies conducted in OTC eczema care, we’ve supported over 10,000 patients across Australia, New Zealand, and international markets.

We are now rebuilding our data + paid media engine from first principles—lean, precise, and performance-driven.



The Role (Why This Is Different)

This is not a “run ads” role.

This is a tracking-first, performance infrastructure role where your primary responsibility is to:

? Build a clean, reliable data foundation

? Ensure attribution accuracy across platforms

? Enable scalable paid media performance

You will work directly with the founders and play a critical role in revenue visibility and growth decisions.

o Google Tag Manager

o Google Analytics (GA4)

o Conversion tracking across all funnel stages

o Product View

o Add to Cart

o Checkout Initiation

o Purchase

• Fix broken or duplicated tracking events

• Google Ads (Search-first focus)

Your job is to ensure:

o CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost)

o Conversion rates across funnel

o Channel attribution

• Translate raw data into clear, actionable insights

4. Paid Media (Execution – Secondary Phase)

• Gradually support Meta Ads testing

• Optimize based on real data (not guesswork)



Deliverables (First 30–45 Days)

• Fully functional funnel tracking (end-to-end visibility)

• Alignment across all platforms (no data leakage)

• Live performance dashboard (Looker Studio)

• Clear documentation of setup



Who This Is NOT For

• General VA or “ads manager” profiles

• People who rely on templates or guesswork

• Anyone without deep hands-on tracking experience

________________________________________

Who This IS For

? A technical performance marketer who enjoys solving data problems

? Someone who prefers lean, high-impact work over large teams

? Someone excited by working with a mission-driven biotech startup

________________________________________

Application Instructions (Filter for Quality)

To be considered, you must include:

Applications without this will not be reviewed.

________________________________________

Why This Role Matters

At Curezma, this role directly impacts:

• Revenue visibility

• Marketing efficiency

• Scale decisions

You won’t just “manage ads”—you will build the system that drives growth.

________________________________________





Working Model

• Direct access to founders

• Long-term potential if performance is strong

title: Creative Strategist for a Visual DTC Brand
description:
We’re building the creative engine behind a fast-growing DTC wall art and hobby brand, and we’re looking for a Creative Strategist who can help lead that build-out from the ground up.



This is not a role where you step into a fully built machine.

This is a role for someone who can help shape the machine.



We want someone who can think beyond single ads and help us build a creative operation that consistently produces strong ideas, better execution, and winning concepts for Meta.



What makes this role different



We do not already have a full creative team in place.



That means we are looking for someone who can do more than just come up with angles. You should be able to help us create structure, spot the right talent, improve execution quality, and build a creative workflow that supports growth.



You will play a key role in helping us go from scattered output to a more intentional, performance-driven creative system.



The opportunity



This is a serious role with real upside.



You’ll start on a monthly retainer, with room to grow as you prove your impact. We are actively investing into Meta, and we see creative as one of the main levers behind scale.



If you know how to build concepts that translate into performance, there is a lot of room here to grow with the brand.



Who we want



We are not looking for someone who only knows how to make ads look polished.



We are looking for someone who understands how to build creative that gets attention, creates desire, and drives action. Someone who understands the difference between content that looks good and content that performs.



You should be comfortable working in a visual product category and understand how to turn product appeal, emotion, identity, gifting, aesthetics, and hobby-driven motivation into ads people actually respond to.



Experience with DTC brands, paid social, and direct response thinking is important. Experience in categories like wall art, home decor, DIY, gifting, hobby, or lifestyle is a strong plus.



What you’ll be doing

Helping us build a creative team that matches our growth goals

Developing fresh hooks, angles, concepts, and ad directions for Meta

Finding and coordinating the right editors, designers, and creators

Writing clear briefs that make execution easier and stronger

Sourcing and managing UGC creators that fit the brand look and tone

Reviewing ad performance and identifying what is actually driving results

Studying competitors, trends, and patterns in visual DTC advertising

Turning strong ideas into repeatable systems we can build on over time

You’ll likely be a strong fit if

You have experience with DTC paid social creative

You understand consumer psychology and direct response

You can clearly explain why a creative worked, failed, or underperformed

You are comfortable looking at data and tying insights back to the creative itself

You can lead execution and create structure, not just throw out ideas

You have worked with freelancers, editors, designers, or UGC creators before

You are proactive, decisive, and able to take ownership without being managed closely

Big plus if you have

Experience in wall art, home decor, hobby, DIY, gifting, or lifestyle

A strong feel for native, clean, high-converting creative

Good taste in UGC that feels authentic without looking sloppy

The ability to identify repeatable winners and build iterations from them

How to apply



Please send us:



your portfolio or examples of relevant work

brands you’ve worked with

concepts or creatives you helped develop

any performance wins or results you can share

a short intro on why this role fits you



Keep it concise.

We care far more about the quality of your work and your thinking than a long application.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 4a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: luxury content and video virtual assistant
description: I’m looking to bring on a virtual assistant who can fully take ownership of my video content and social media presence. My goal is to produce high-quality, engaging, and visually polished content across platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and potentially long-form YouTube) with consistent posting 5–6 days per week. I will provide voice recordings, photos, and video clips of myself, but I need someone who can edit, animate, and repurpose these assets into multiple compelling videos—leveraging similar visuals in creative ways—while ensuring strong lighting, pacing, and a luxury, standout feel. Content should include a mix of educational, market-driven, and attention-grabbing material, all compliant with real estate guidelines. I also need you to handle posting, captions, hashtags, and overall execution of the content plan. Can you confirm if you have the ability to manage full video production, editing, and multi-platform distribution at this level?

title: Bookkeeper – AppFolio & QuickBooks Specialist
description:
Remote | Full-Time 



About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented, experienced bookkeeper with expertise in AppFolio and QuickBooks. This role supports the day-to-day accounting and bookkeeping operations for both a property management and investment rental portfolio. You must be confident working independently and communicating clearly in a remote setting.



Responsibilities



AppFolio

-Run and interpret financial reports (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)

-Manage trust accounts in compliance with applicable regulations

-Have a complete understanding to fully handle bank reconciliations from start to finish

-Post rent payments, late fees, and other tenant charges 

-Process and manage accounts payable and vendor invoices

-Build and manage maintenance work orders

-Perform monthly bank reconciliations within AppFolio

-Review and ensure accurate accounting on owner statements

-Manage tenant and owner ledgers

-Handle security deposit tracking and dispositions

-Maintain tenant and owner portal data accuracy



QuickBooks

-Export and transfer financial data from AppFolio into QuickBooks for company financials

-Maintain accurate books in QuickBooks alongside AppFolio records

-Reconcile accounts in QuickBooks

-Assist with 1099 preparation for vendors at year-end

-Generate financial reports and budget variance analysis in QuickBooks



General Bookkeeping

-Track and manage accounts receivable and payable

-Support monthly and year-end close processes

-Maintain organized financial records and documentation

-Communicate professionally with property owners and vendors regarding financial matters

-Assist with utility billing and reconciliation



Required Skills & Experience

-Bachelors in Accounting or Bookkeeping

-Minimum of 3 years of bookkeeping experience in Quickbooks and Appfolio

-Proficient in AppFolio Property Manager — this is a hard requirement; please do not apply if you do not have AppFolio experience

-Proficient in QuickBooks for use of a property management company and residential real estate inventments

-Experience transferring or syncing data between AppFolio and QuickBooks (no API option; we have Appfolio Basic)

-Strong understanding of real estate or property management accounting

-High attention to detail and accuracy

-Able to work independently with minimal supervision

-Strong written English communication skills



Preferred Qualifications

-Familiarity with owner reporting and trust accounting

-Accounting degree or certification (not required but a plus)



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

- A 1-minute voice sample (Vocaroo is an option to submit this)

- Your WPM score with the 3 Minute Test:

      

- A summary of your AppFolio experience — specific tasks you have performed

- Your QuickBooks experience — Online vs. Desktop, and how long

- The Phrase Appaloosa1 in the Subject Line

- Any examples of how you have moved data between AppFolio and QuickBooks

***Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

title: UGC Video Creator for Creative Hobby / Wall Art Brand
description:
We’re a fast-growing wall art and creative hobby brand and we’re looking for female UGC video creators with their own filming setup to produce authentic, aesthetic product videos on an ongoing project basis.



We’re not looking for overly polished studio content.

We want videos that feel real, clean, relatable, and scroll-stopping while still fitting a premium brand look.



What You’ll Be Filming

Unboxing videos

Product experience videos

Process-style content

Finished result reveal videos

Content styled for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
 Ads

What We Need From You

A decent camera or high-quality smartphone setup with good lighting

Ability to film content that feels natural and UGC-like, while still looking clean and visually appealing

Fast turnaround and reliable communication

A natural on-camera presence, even if no speaking is needed

Experience filming hobby, DIY, aesthetic, lifestyle, or product content is a strong plus

Ability to set up a clean and visually pleasing filming space or background

Good taste for detail, framing, and creating content that feels native but not messy

Creative Direction



The style should feel:



clean

aesthetic

authentic

user-generated, not overly commercial



No voiceover is needed.

We like content styles similar to PaintGem and Davincified.



How It Works

We send the product directly to you

We provide a clear creative brief and inspiration

You film and deliver the agreed content

You also send a photo with the finished result

Payment is made after the video is completed

If the content performs well, there is strong potential for ongoing work / rehire

Project Timeline



For this project, we are looking for 3 creators who can deliver 3 unique pieces of content before the end of April.



To Apply, Send Us

A short intro about yourself

A description of your filming setup and background/environment

Your usual turnaround time

Links to your portfolio or previous UGC/product content

Your rate per video or per package



Only apply if you can create clean, aesthetic UGC that still feels real and natural.

title: Kids Content Editor / Animator (Full-Time) – LEGO YouTube Channel
description:
Company: Republic Studs (YouTube)

Location: Remote (Worldwide)

Type: Full-Time, 40 hrs/week (8 hrs/day, Mon–Fri)



About Us



Republic Studs is a fast-growing LEGO-focused YouTube channel creating fun, family-friendly content for millions of viewers around the world. We specialize in LEGO storytelling, reviews, and creative animations that inspire kids and fans of all ages.



We’re looking for a full-time Kids Content Editor/Animator to join our team. If you have a passion for LEGO, animation, and kids’ entertainment — this is the role for you!



Responsibilities



Edit engaging kids-focused LEGO videos for YouTube.



Create LEGO-related 3D animations (preferably using Blender).



Develop graphics, thumbnails, and motion design for videos.



Collaborate with the team on new video concepts, storylines, and series ideas.



Ensure all content is fun, safe, and engaging for a young audience.



Requirements



Proficiency in video editing (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or equivalent).



Experience with graphic design (Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva, etc.).



Skills in 3D modeling & animation (Blender preferred, especially with LEGO assets).



Strong sense of pacing, humor, and storytelling for kids’ content.



Creativity and ability to adapt to evolving YouTube trends.



Bonus: Experience editing kids’ content even without animation skills — still apply!



Nice to Have



Familiarity with LEGO building, themes, and fan culture.



Knowledge of YouTube best practices (SEO, retention, audience engagement).



Prior work in children’s media, animation, or storytelling.



What We Offer



Full-time, stable work (8 hrs/day, 5 days/week).



Work remotely with a creative, collaborative team.



Opportunity to grow with one of the leading LEGO channels on YouTube.



A fun, imaginative environment where you’ll help bring LEGO stories to life for millions of fans.





? If you’re a talented kids content editor but not an animator — don’t worry, we’d still love to hear from you!

title: AI Agent Solutions Specialist (Advanced/Expert)
description:
DMN8 Partners is a leading marketing and automation agency dedicated to scaling service-based businesses. We don’t just "use" tools; we re-engineer how businesses operate. We are looking for an AI Agent Architect based in the Philippines who possesses a near-expert understanding of the modern AI ecosystem to build, deploy, and manage sophisticated autonomous agents for our diverse client base.



The Role

This isn't a prompt engineering job; it’s an architectural one. You will be responsible for designing and maintaining a fleet of AI Agents that handle high-level business functions. You must be able to think conceptually—understanding the "why" behind a workflow before building the "how."



Key Agents you will build and manage:



Sales Development Representatives (SDRs): Outbound prospecting and lead qualification.



CRM Management: Automated data hygiene, entry, and pipeline movement.



Website Monitoring: Real-time uptime checks and performance management.



Operational Improvement: Identifying bottlenecks and automating internal workflows.



Sales Follow-Up & Scheduling: Persistent, human-like outreach and calendar management.



Technical Requirements

Platform Mastery: Advanced experience building with Claude (Anthropic), OpenAI (GPT-4o/o1), and Manus.



Agentic Frameworks: Proven ability to build multi-agent systems that can "reason," use tools (APIs), and execute multi-step tasks.



Ecosystem Knowledge: Deep familiarity with automation platforms (
, Zapier) and how to bridge them with LLMs.



Monitoring & Maintenance: Experience in "Agent Ops"—consistently updating prompts and logic to ensure agents don't drift or fail as client needs evolve.



Who You Are

A Conceptual Thinker: You can visualize a complex business process and translate it into a logical AI workflow.



Experienced: You have a portfolio or a proven track record of deploying functional AI agents in a real-world business environment.



Time Zone Compatible: You are comfortable working primarily during Eastern Standard Time (EST) hours to collaborate with our US-based team and clients.



Reliable: Since there is no "fixed" punch-in schedule, you must be a self-starter who hits deadlines and monitors agent performance proactively.



Compensation & Benefits

Base Pay: Competitive hourly rate (based on experience).



Performance Commission: Earn additional income based on the success and efficiency of the agents you deploy.



Flexibility: While we require EST availability, we focus on outputs over hours. * Growth: Work at the bleeding edge of AI automation with an agency that is actively shaping the future of service business operations.



About DMN8 Partners

We are a high-growth agency focused on helping service businesses dominate their local markets. By combining elite marketing strategies with heavy-duty automation, we give business owners their time back and help them scale without the overhead.



To Apply: Please provide examples of AI Agents you have previously built and a brief explanation of the logic/tools you used to make them successful.

title: Wordpress Developer
description:
DMN8 Partners is seeking a highly skilled and reliable WordPress Developer based in the Philippines to join our team. This role is focused on the critical "under-the-hood" health of our web properties. If you are obsessed with Core Web Vitals, site hardening, and the nuances of the Divi ecosystem, we want to talk to you.



Role Overview

Location: Remote (Philippines-based).



Hours: Part-time (20 hours per week).



Schedule: Flexible daily task completion (Mon–Fri), but must be available for emergencies during US Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours.



Compensation: Competitive, based on experience.



Primary Responsibilities

Your main objective is to ensure our websites are fast, secure, and running without a hitch.



Speed & Performance Optimization: Audit and improve load times, optimize images, manage caching layers, and ensure high scores on Google PageSpeed Insights.



Security Management: Proactive monitoring, malware scanning, and implementing security best practices to prevent vulnerabilities.



Divi Mastery: Maintain and troubleshoot sites built on the Divi theme/builder, ensuring design integrity while optimizing for performance.



Plugin Management: Responsible for updating, auditing, and vetting plugins. You should know when a plugin is necessary and when it's just "bloat."



Daily Maintenance: Execute a daily checklist of site health tasks to ensure 100% uptime and functionality.



Requirements & Qualifications

Expert WordPress Knowledge: Deep understanding of the WP core, database optimization, and file structure.



Divi Power User: You must have extensive experience working with the Divi theme and builder.



Technical Proficiency: Strong understanding of HTML/CSS is highly preferred to make manual adjustments when builders fall short.



Availability: While you manage your own hours, you must be available to respond to emergency "site down" or critical security alerts within 2 hours during EST business hours.



Reliability: Proven ability to manage a daily task list independently without constant oversight.



Why Work With DMN8 Partners?

We value technical excellence and autonomy. You won't be micro-managed on when you work, as long as the daily tasks are completed, the sites are lightning-fast, and you are there when the "smoke alarm" goes off.



To Apply: Please submit your portfolio or list of sites you currently manage, specifically highlighting your experience with Divi and any performance benchmarks (before/after) you’ve achieved.



Note: A brief technical test involving a Divi performance audit may be required as part of the interview process.

title: AI Infrastructure Lead — E-Commerce (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
**About Us**



We're Intent Brands — a US-based e-commerce company running two growing brands on Shopify and Amazon. We're building an AI-first operations layer and need someone to own it.



This isn't a virtual assistant role. This is a technical leadership position where you'll design, build, and maintain the AI and automation systems that run our business — from customer workflows to marketing pipelines to internal tools.



We already use Claude and a suite of AI agents. We need someone who can take what we've started and make it run like a machine.



**What You'll Do**



- Design and build automated workflows using Claude and PaperClip

- Manage and improve our AI agent infrastructure (Claude-based agents, PaperClip AI hub)

- Connect our tools — Shopify, Amazon, Klaviyo, Apollo, Google Workspace — into intelligent, automated pipelines

- Write clear documentation and SOPs for every system you build

- Identify manual processes across the business and propose automation solutions

- Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize existing automations

- Stay current on AI developments and recommend tools/approaches that give us an edge



**What We're Looking For**



- Hands-on experience building automations with n8n, Make, or similar workflow tools

- Real working knowledge of AI/LLMs — not just "I've used ChatGPT," but understanding of prompting, agents, APIs, context management, and when to use what

- Comfortable working with REST APIs, webhooks, OAuth, and integrating third-party services

- Experience with e-commerce platforms (Shopify, Amazon, or similar) is a strong advantage

- Basic scripting ability (Python or JavaScript) — enough to write a webhook handler or parse JSON, not full-stack development

- Self-directed and organized — you'll have autonomy, and we expect you to use it well

- Strong written English — you'll be writing documentation, prompts, and internal communications daily



**Bonus Points For**



- Experience with OpenClaw, Claude Code, or Codex

- Familiarity with Shopify APIs, Liquid, or webhooks

- Knowledge of Klaviyo, 
, Semrush, or marketing automation tools

- Experience managing multi-agent AI systems

- Understanding of prompt engineering and system prompt design



**What We Offer**



- $1,500/month, full-time (40 hrs/week)

- 3-month probationary period, then permanent position

- Work directly with the founders — small team, big impact

- Access to cutting-edge AI tools (we invest in the best)

- Room to grow as our AI infrastructure scales



---



## Application Questions:



**IMPORTANT: Please answer ALL of the following questions in your application. Applications without answers will not be considered.**



1. **Describe a workflow or automation you built that you're proud of.** What was the business problem? What tools did you use? What was the result? (Be specific — "I automated social media posting" is not enough.)



2. **You need to connect a Shopify store to a 
 channel so that every time a customer places an order over $100, the team gets notified with the customer's name, order total, and whether they're a first-time or returning buyer. Walk us through how you'd set this up.** (We want to see your thinking process, not just "I'd use n8n.")



3. **What is the difference between using an AI agent and using a simple API call to an LLM? When would you choose one over the other?** (This tells us if you actually understand AI infrastructure or just use chatbots.)



4. **What is your experience with n8n and Claude Code specifically? OpenClaw Experience is good as well.** If none, what workflow/automation tool have you used most, and what's the most complex thing you built with it?



5. **Include the phrase "I build systems" somewhere in your application.** (This helps us confirm you read the full listing.)

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: Operations & Support Specialist
description:
The Role:

We are looking for a reliable Operations Support person to handle the essential daily tasks at Adventures in Speech Pathology. You will be the person behind the scenes making sure our systems are updated, and our customers get the help they need. It’s a vital, hands-on role in a small team where your attention to detail keeps the day-to-day moving.



Commitment & Growth: This is a long-term position for a committed professional, not a "gig" or short-term project. We are looking for someone to start in a part-time capacity, with the ability to scale as the business expands. Beyond the core areas listed below, you will also provide general operational support for other business needs as they arise.



Key Responsibilities:

High-Quality Customer Support (Help Scout)

Manage the team inbox with a focus on high-quality, empathetic service.

Triage 45–60 tickets per week, relating to our digital downloads shop, website, online courses, professional development events, our app, and more!

Handle technical account issues, including account merges, product access problems, password resets, and "My Account" resolutions.

Utilize saved replies where available.



E-commerce & Product Hygiene (WooCommerce):

Maintain our digital storefront to a high standard by performing regular shop audits, updating product descriptions/thumbnails, uploading product updates, and managing site-wide sales.

Update product SEO, delete old media files to keep the site lean, and ensure all product digital assets are correctly linked and functioning properly.



Event Coordination Support & Logistics:

Handle the digital management of professional development events.

Reconcile ticket sales against attendee lists and manage large volumes of automated
 communications.

Coordinate attendee dietary requirements and ensure professional certificates are generated and distributed accurately.



Online Course Operations & Student Support (Zenler):

Champion this growing area of our business from the support side.

Act as a dedicated advocate for our students' success, ensuring every learner has a seamless experience from enrollment through to completion.

Handle manual student enrollments and manage course access extensions while maintaining full oversight of automated
 communications triggered by the platform.

Work with our operations manager on building out online courses.



AI-Driven Systems & Data:

Utilize AI (Gemini and Claude) extensively to stay organized and efficient.

Act as a proficient AI user capable of advanced prompting and using these tools at a high level to troubleshoot workflows or refine data.

Extract CSV data from 
 and meeting notes for analysis to help identify new business opportunities and take action items from our boards to completion with an AI-assisted workflow.



Technical Stack & Tools

Central Hub: 
 (All work lives here)

Core Systems: Help Scout, WooCommerce, WordPress, Google Workspace, and Zenler

AI Tools: Gemini and Claude

Hardware you require: A computer with a dual-screen setup and good internet access is non-negotiable.



Candidate Profile:

Resourceful Problem Solver: You are a "figure-it-out" person who uses SOPs and AI at an advanced level to troubleshoot before escalating.

Meeting Culture: Punctual attendance at our high-frequency meetings on Australian time (initially Mon/Wed/Fri) is critical to maintaining our high standards and growth.

Autonomous Operator: You take ownership of action items on our boards and move them to completion without needing constant reminders.

Committed: You are looking for a long-term home where you can grow alongside the business and handle diverse operational tasks.

Must have WooCommerce skills and experience.



TO APPLY: Please reach out with your experience and follow these instructions exactly:



Include the word "RESOURCEFUL" in your subject line so I know you’ve read this through.

title: Marketing Specialist
description:
Position: Marketing Strategist / Specialist

Reports to: COO, ILX Travel



About ILX Travel 



ILX Travel is a premier luxury travel concierge company dedicated to designing bespoke travel experiences—resorts, private villas, yacht charters, cultural journeys, cruises, and wellness retreats. As a Virtuoso affiliate, ILX provides exclusive privileges, amenities, and insider access. 



Mission, Vision, Values & Brand Promise 



Mission: 

To design extraordinary, personalized travel experiences that enrich our clients’ lives through discovery, comfort, and authentic connection—delivered with exceptional service, expertise, and care. 



Vision: 

To become the most trusted luxury travel partner for discerning travelers seeking curated journeys, exclusive access, and seamless service. 



Values: 

Excellence • Integrity • Creativity • Client?Centered Service • Collaboration • Innovation • Continuous Improvement 



Brand Promise: 

Effortless luxury, thoughtfully curated. 



Role Purpose 



The Marketing Strategist leads the development, execution, and optimization of ILX Travel’s marketing strategy. This role blends strategic planning, creative brand development, and data?driven decision-making. Ideal candidates must have a deep understanding of the travel and luxury industries, strong marketing leadership, and the ability to guide execution across internal tea
mbers and external partners. 



Key Responsibilities: 

I. Marketing Strategy & Planning 

-Develop and maintain an annual marketing strategy aligned with ILX Travel’s business goals 

-Define target markets, luxury traveler personas, and positioning within the travel industry 

-Identify and prioritize high-impact marketing initiatives 



II. Brand, Messaging & Campaign Direction 

-Lead brand messaging, storytelling, and positioning for ILX Travel 

-Ensure consistent brand voice across website,
, social media, partnerships, and campaigns 

-Plan and oversee multi-channel marketing campaigns 



III. Performance, Data & Optimization 

-Define KPIs and success metrics for marketing initiatives 

-Monitor performance, analyze results, and optimize campaigns for ROI 

-Strengthen CRM workflows and marketing automation (Zoho CRM or similar) 



IV. Cross-Functional & Vendor Leadership 

-Partner with sales teams to convert MQLs. 

-Provide strategic direction to internal contributors, agencies, creators, and vendors 

-Manage marketing budgets and recommend resource allocation 



Required Qualifications: 

-Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or related field 

-5+ years of experience in marketing strategy, preferably within travel, hospitality, luxury services, or premium consumer brands 

-Experience in leading marketing strategy and decision-making  

-Strong understanding of digital marketing, SEO/SEM, paid media, and content strategy 

-Experience working with CRM and marketing automation platforms 

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills 



Preferred Qualifications: 

-Prior experience within the travel industry or luxury travel sector 

-Familiarity with Virtuoso or similar luxury travel networks

title: Job Search Operations Manager — Job Placement / 6 Client Accounts (Remote)
description:
Job Description:



Capital Career Club is a done-for-you job placement service based in Warsaw, Poland. We help international professionals land corporate jobs in Poland by running their entire job search for them — applications, recruiter outreach, and LinkedIn content. Our clients hand over their LinkedIn, their dedicated job-search
, and their strategy. We execute end to end. They show up to interviews. We make those interviews happen.



We are hiring one Operations Manager to own the daily execution of 6 active client job searches running at the same time.



ABOUT THE ROLE



You are not a typist. You are not a data entry clerk. You are the person who makes sure 6 professionals wake up to recruiter replies, interview invitations, and a job search that is visibly moving — every single day.



You use Claude AI and proven CCC templates to generate tailored cover letters, outreach messages, and LinkedIn posts fast. Then you send, log, track, and report with zero gaps.



We manage outcomes, not screen time. If the KPIs are hit and the quality is there, the work is done.



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY



Job Applications — This is the core of your day



Log into each client's LinkedIn and dedicated job-search
 every morning. Search for open roles using each client's confirmed keyword list and target company list. Use Claude AI to generate a tailored cover letter and application answers in the client's voice — under 3 minutes per role. Submit via LinkedIn Easy Apply, Pracuj.pl, or direct company career sites. Log every single application immediately with the company name, role title, platform, method, status, and follow-up date. No log means it did not happen. This rule is non-negotiable.



LinkedIn and
 Outreach



Identify recruiters, HR managers, and relevant employees at target companies. Use Claude to generate personalised LinkedIn DMs and
 outreach in batches. Send connection requests with a note and structured follow-ups at Day 5 if there is no reply. Log every single touch with the name, company, channel, date, reply status, and next step.



LinkedIn Content Support



Draft posts in each client's voice using their Brand Content Brief and Claude AI. Place all drafts into the Content Approval Dashboard with a suggested publish date. Publish only after explicit written approval — never auto-publish under any circumstances. Handle basic post engagement including likes and simple replies according to each client's guidelines.



Tracking and Reporting



Keep all 6 Application Tracking Sheets 100% updated before you log off every single day. No backlogs. Check each client's dedicated inbox multiple times daily and file all recruiter replies, assessments, interview invites, and offers into the correct folders. Prepare one structured weekly performance report per client using a provided template. All 6 reports must be submitted to the founder every Friday before 17:00 Warsaw time without exception.



Escalation



You never guess and you never improvise on high-stakes situations. You escalate to the founder within 30 minutes when a recruiter or hiring manager contacts a client directly, when an interview is confirmed or offered at any stage, when a job offer or draft contract appears, when a LinkedIn account is flagged or restricted, when a recruiter asks about salary or visa status or availability, and when a client goes silent for 48 hours or more or raises a serious concern. Prebuilt escalation scripts are provided for every one of these scenarios. You use them every time.



DAILY TARGETS WHEN ALL 6 ACCOUNTS ARE FULLY LIVE



Per client per day:



Around 22 tailored job applications submitted



10 to 12 personalised outreach messages sent



1 LinkedIn post drafted and submitted for approval (minimum 2 per week per client)



100% of all actions logged in the tracking sheet same day



Across all 6 clients per day:



Around 132 applications submitted



60 to 72 outreach messages sent



6 or more LinkedIn posts drafted for approval



Zero gaps in any tracking sheet



6 weekly reports submitted every Friday before 17:00 Warsaw time



You ramp up gradually. You are not handed 6 accounts on Day 1. The build-up is structured and fully supported by the founder.



TOOLS YOU WILL USE



Claude AI for cover letters, outreach messages, LinkedIn posts, and weekly reports. Full training is provided from Day 1.



LinkedIn for client profile management, job applications, outreach, and content publishing.



Gmail for dedicated job-search inboxes per client with structured folder systems.



Google Sheets for Application Tracking Sheets, performance dashboards, and the VA Operations Master Sheet.



Skool for DFY client resources and weekly group interview-prep sessions.



WhatsApp and
 for internal communication with the founder only. You never contact clients directly under any circumstances.



YOU ARE THE RIGHT PERSON FOR THIS ROLE IF



You are based in the Philippines or a closely aligned time zone with a stable and reliable internet connection. This is a hard requirement with no exceptions.



Your written English is strong. All work is in English serving international professionals and Polish corporate recruiters.



You have experience managing LinkedIn profiles, running outreach campaigns, or appointment-setting. This is a strong advantage.



You are comfortable working in Google Sheets and executing detailed SOPs precisely and consistently every day.



You are confident using AI tools or genuinely excited to learn fast. We train you on Claude fully but daily execution with it is your job from Week 1.



You can manage 6 client accounts in parallel and hold every detail across all of them without being chased.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



You need daily reminders to complete your tasks.



You go quiet when there is a problem instead of flagging it immediately.



You treat punctuality and deadlines as approximate.



You make excuses instead of finding solutions.



We hired for this role recently and parted ways early due to reliability issues. We are not looking for the most impressive background. We are looking for someone who shows up on time, hits their numbers, flags problems before they become fires, and takes genuine pride in clean and accurate work.



COMPENSATION



Months 1 and 2 — Training and Ramp-Up



Around $400 USD per month base while you learn the full system, tools, and SOPs with daily support and guidance from the founder.



From Month 3 — After Ramp-Up



Base salary reviewed and increased to $600 to $900 USD per month depending on reliability, quality, and KPI performance.



Performance Bonuses — Active From Day 1



$5 bonus for every confirmed interview booked for any client.

$20 bonus for every accepted job offer for any client.

$50 flat portfolio bonus when all 6 clients hit 80% or more of their weekly KPIs for 4 consecutive weeks.



Your upside grows directly with client results. The better you execute, the more you earn.



Example Month 1: $400 base + 12 interviews ($60) + 1 offer ($20) = $480

Example Month 2: $400 base + 20 interviews ($100) + 3 offers ($60) = $560



Payment is monthly via Wise or GCash on the 1st of each month.



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message with the following three things only:



Your name and location



Two short samples of outreach messages or LinkedIn posts you have written — or write fresh ones specifically for this application



One sentence on why this role fits you right now



Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a small paid trial task using Claude AI — generate a cover letter and outreach messages from a sample client brief. This replaces a traditional interview. We assess on execution, not conversation.



Job Type: Full-time

Schedule: Monday to Saturday, up to 8 hours per day

Hours: All tasks completed by 18:00 Warsaw time (CEST) daily

Location: Remote — Philippines strongly preferred

Start Date: Immediate

title: Appointment Setter (UK Market) – Calls, SMS & CRM Support

Opportunity for increased compensation based on performance

Full-time

Monday to Friday

9:00am – 5:00pm UK time

How to Apply (IMPORTANT):

Your name and location

Your experience with calls / customer service

Why you’d be a good fit for this role



Applications without a Loom video will NOT be considered.



How to Record Your Loom Video (If You’ve Never Used It):

Go to 

 and create a free account

Click “New Video”

Choose “Camera Only” (face recording)

Record your 60-second introduction

Click “Stop Recording”

Copy the video link

Paste the link in your application



???? Keep it simple — no editing needed. Just speak clearly and confidently.



Final Step:



Start your application with the word FOX so we know you’ve read everything.

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus

You will collaborate closely with the Operations Lead and internal support teams to ensure all customer data is accurately categorized and updated in real time. This role is centered on data accuracy, organization, and daily reporting — not customer interaction.

What We’re Looking For

- Ability to work independently using a structured daily workflow

- Consistent and reliable performance with high accuracy standards

- Comfortable following established processes and standard operating procedures

- Clear written communication for reporting and internal coordination

What This Role Is Not

What We Offer

title: Virtual Assistant — Health & Wellness Brand (Part-Time, Potential Full-Time)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a chiropractic and rehab clinic based in Lafayette, Colorado. We also run a growing digital health app called ReWire Kids, a subscription-based platform for parents and practitioners. We are building fast — launching a new app in May and expanding our coaching programs — and we need a reliable, detail-oriented VA to help us keep up with the pace.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a part-time position to start (10–20 hours per week) with the potential to grow into a full-time role. You will work closely with the clinic owner and be a key part of keeping content, admin, and digital operations running smoothly.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

— Content & Social Media

  • Schedule and post content across Instagram,
, and other platforms

  • Design graphics and visual assets in Canva for the ReWire Kids app and personal brand

  • Resize, format, and organize content for multiple channels



— Video Support

  • Light video editing for short-form social content (Reels, TikTok-style clips)

  • Upload and organize video files

  • Add captions or simple text overlays when needed



— CRM & Funnel Management

  • Build and update pages inside GoHighLevel using the drag and drop builder

  • Update funnels, landing pages, forms, and automations inside GHL

  • Manage contacts, pipelines, and basic workflows inside GHL

  • Build and edit pages using other drag and drop builders (ClickFunnels, Leadpages, Webflow, or similar)

  • Update pricing, bundles, and offer details across our digital platforms



— Admin & Operations

  • Manage and organize Google Drive files and folders

  • Track bug reports and feature requests for the ReWire Kids app

  • Help with
 drafts, follow-ups, and scheduling coordination



— Program Support

  • Help build and organize client training programs inside TrueCoach (training provided)

  • Organize exercise libraries, program templates, and client materials



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

— GoHighLevel experience is a strong plus — if you have built funnels, automations, or pages inside GHL we want to hear about it

— Comfortable with drag and drop page builders — you can build a clean landing page without needing a developer

— Strong Canva skills — you can design on-brand graphics without hand-holding

— Basic video editing experience (CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

— Organized and proactive — you follow up, you track things, you don't wait to be reminded

— Good written English

— Experience with any of the following is a bonus: TrueCoach, Google Workspace, Instagram scheduling tools, Jane App

— Health, fitness, or wellness background is a plus but not required

— Available for a short overlap with US Mountain Time (Colorado) a few days per week



WHAT WE OFFER

— $5–$8 per hour based on experience

— Consistent part-time hours with room to grow

— Clear tasks and systems — we will give you SOPs and checklists, not vague instructions

— A fast-moving, exciting environment — we are building something real and growing quickly

— Long-term opportunity for the right person



TO APPLY

Please send the following:

1. A short intro about yourself and your experience

2. Examples of Canva work or social media content you have created

3. Any GoHighLevel or funnel/page builder work you have done — screenshots or links

4. Any video editing samples if available

5. Your hourly rate or monthly rate expectation

6. Your availability and time zone



We move fast. If you are reliable, organized, and take initiative — this is a great fit.
