title: Designer for Ad Creatives & Landing Pages
description:
### Company Description



Founded in 2008, Impressive Click is a growth-focused digital marketing agency that specializes in website design and marketing strategies. With over 1,500 successful projects, we have helped businesses of all sizes achieve their goals. Our team of experts is dedicated to building, transforming, and marketing websites to maximize our clients' online presence. We have worked with a diverse range of clients, including Fortune 500 companies such as Colgate Palmolive, Philip Morris International, Altria Group, and Dover Corporation.



### Job Description



We are seeking a talented full-time remote Graphic Designer to join our creative team, focusing exclusively on designing ad creatives for social media platforms (
, Instagram) and visually compelling landing pages. The ideal candidate will possess a strong eye for detail, a passion for creating high-converting ad designs, and the ability to work closely with the marketing and development teams to bring concepts to life.



This role requires a deep understanding of design principles, user experience, and best practices for social media and landing page design, with a primary focus on driving conversions.



### Ideal Candidate Must Have Strong Knowledge Of:



- Graphic design principles

- Ad creative best practices for Meta 
/Instagram)

- User experience (UX) design for landing pages

- Branding and visual consistency

- Typography, color theory, and layout design

- Conversion-focused design

- Marketing funnels and CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization)

- Experience Working in Figma

- Responsive and mobile-friendly design

- Use of AI in workflows



### Must Have Industry Knowledge Of:



- Meta 
 & Instagram) ad formats and specifications

- A/B testing ad creatives and landing page designs

- Trends in social media marketing and landing page design

- Understanding of web design technologies (HTML, CSS) is a plus

- AI tools are a plus



### Key Responsibilities:



- Design eye-catching and high-converting ad creatives for Meta platforms, ensuring alignment with client goals and target audiences

- Create engaging, user-friendly landing pages that drive conversions and support digital marketing efforts

- Collaborate with the marketing team to understand campaign objectives and audience demographics, tailoring designs accordingly

- Ensure consistency in branding across all creatives and landing pages

- Optimize design assets for performance, ensuring fast load times and mobile responsiveness

- A/B test different versions of ad creatives and landing page designs to determine what drives the highest engagement and conversions

- Stay up-to-date on the latest trends and best practices in AI, digital design, advertising, and social media

title: Photo Editing QA and Customer Support
description:
ABOUT REAL TOURS



Real Tours is a fast-growing real estate media company delivering professional photography editing, virtual staging, 3D tours, and listing media to real estate agents and brokers. We pride ourselves on fast turnarounds, exceptional quality, and client relationships that keep agents coming back listing after listing.



ROLE OVERVIEW



We are looking for a versatile QA & Client Support Specialist who can operate across both quality assurance and client-facing support functions. In this hybrid role, you will review edited media for quality before delivery while also serving as a point of contact for client inquiries, re-edit requests, and order updates. This position is ideal for someone who is both a sharp visual reviewer and a confident communicator — someone who understands what great real estate media looks like and can represent that standard to clients.



QUALITY ASSURANCE RESPONSIBILITIES



Review edited real estate photo batches for exposure consistency, color accuracy, sky replacement quality, horizon alignment, and overall presentation

Do virtual staging deliverables for realistic staging, proper scale, material texture, and lighting match to the actual room

Do item removal edits for seamless surface reconstruction with no visible patching or artifacts

Inspecta and create Matterport, Zillow 3D Home, and CubiCasa floor plan and 3D tour

Revise rejected work for clients and their needs

Track and document recurring quality issues to support editor coaching and process improvement



CUSTOMER SUPPORT RESPONSIBILITIES



Serve as a primary point of contact for real estate agent clients via
, Slack, and internal platforms

Communicate order statuses, delivery timelines, and proactively notify clients of any delays

Process re-edit requests and relay precise client feedback to the editing team

Manage client expectations around same-day and next-day delivery SLAs

Escalate unresolved issues or pattern complaints to the appropriate team lead

Support new client onboarding and guide agents through the revision and delivery process



REQUIREMENTS



1+ years of hands-on experience in real estate photo editing, virtual staging, or media post-production — you must be able to identify AND fix common editing issues, not just flag them

Proficient in Adobe Photoshop — able to perform exposure corrections, sky replacements, color grading adjustments, and clean item removals independently when needed

Advanced virtual staging knowledge: understanding of furniture scale, perspective matching, lighting consistency, shadow realism, and material textures

Advanced item removal skills: ability to reconstruct floors, walls, ceilings, and surfaces convincingly with no visible patching, cloning artifacts, or texture mismatches

Familiarity with real estate photo editing standards: sky replacements, virtual staging, item removals, twilight edits, and exposure corrections

Strong written English communication skills — able to write clearly to both clients and editors

Highly self-managed and organized with the ability to juggle QA reviews and open client tickets simultaneously

Experience with Slack, 
, Notion, or similar remote work tools

Comfortable with fast-paced, high-volume workloads and same-day turnaround expectations



NICE TO HAVE



Direct experience with Aryeo, Matterport, CubiCasa, or Zillow 3D Home

Prior work with a real estate photography/media company

Experience with AI editing tools and awareness of AI artifact detection

Background in virtual staging review or advanced retouching QA



TOOLS YOU WILL USE



Adobe Photoshop / Lightroom

Aryeo

Matterport

Zillow 3D Home

CubiCasa

AI Editing Tools

Slack


 / Notion



Work Schedule:

Tuesday - Saturday | 8am - 5pm EST





HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please submit your resume and a brief cover note describing your relevant experience.

Include links to any relevant work samples, portfolios, or past projects where applicable.

description:

Your resume

title: Video Editor (YouTube + Reels)
description:
ABOUT US

Plaiground is an AI-powered venture studio. We build, launch, and scale AI products — fast. We move like a startup, think like investors, and build like engineers.

title: Vendor Management Specialist (Engineering Background Required)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Vendor Management & Procurement Specialist to support vendor sourcing, purchasing operations, and supplier relationships. This role plays a critical part in ensuring efficient procurement processes, cost optimization, and smooth coordination between the business and its vendors.



The ideal candidate has a strong engineering background, allowing them to better understand technical products, specifications, and vendor capabilities. This position is well-suited for someone who is both process-driven and a strong communicator, capable of balancing technical evaluation with vendor coordination and negotiation.



Key Responsibilities

1. Vendor Research & Selection (Primary Focus)

Sourcing & Evaluation

- Identify and research potential vendors and suppliers

- Evaluate vendor offerings based on technical specifications, quality, pricing, and reliability

- Compare products/services to support informed decision-making

- Assist in selecting vendors aligned with business requirements and budget



2. Vendor Communication & Coordination

Vendor Liaison

- Serve as the primary point of contact between the business and vendors

- Communicate inquiries, requirements, and updates regarding orders, pricing, and timelines

- Facilitate negotiations and ensure clarity on terms and expectations



3. Order Processing & Tracking

Procurement Execution

- Manage end-to-end order placement with vendors

- Ensure accuracy of order details, specifications, and quantities

- Track shipments and delivery timelines

- Resolve issues related to delays, discrepancies, or fulfillment



4. Price Negotiation & Cost Management

- Negotiation Support

- Negotiate pricing, terms, and discounts with vendors

- Ensure procurement decisions align with budget and cost-efficiency goals

- Identify opportunities for cost savings and value optimization



5. Invoice Management & Payment Coordination

Financial Coordination

- Review vendor invoices for accuracy and completeness

- Coordinate with internal teams for payment processing

- Address billing discrepancies and resolve issues promptly

- Maintain accurate records of financial transactions



6. Vendor Relationship Management

- Partnership Development

- Build and maintain strong, professional relationships with vendors

- Address concerns and ensure a positive working partnership

- Monitor vendor performance and reliability



7. Data & Documentation Management

Records & Reporting

- Maintain organized records of vendor information, contracts, and communication

- Track procurement activities, pricing history, and transactions

- Ensure proper documentation for audit and reporting purposes



8. Vendor Onboarding

- Onboarding & Compliance

- Assist in onboarding new vendors

- Ensure vendors understand business requirements, processes, and expectations

- Collect and organize necessary documentation and agreements



Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (required) – Industrial, Mechanical, Civil, or related field preferred

- Proven experience in procurement, vendor management, or supply chain operations

- Strong understanding of technical specifications, materials, or product evaluation

- Experience in vendor negotiation and cost analysis

- Familiarity with procurement tools, spreadsheets, and tracking systems

- Excellent communication and coordination skills

- Strong attention to detail and organizational ability



Work Style & Personality Fit

- Analytical and detail-oriented with strong problem-solving skills

- Proactive and able to manage tasks independently

- Strong communicator with negotiation confidence

- Organized and process-driven

- Able to balance technical evaluation with business priorities

What We’re Looking For



Required

Preferred

title: Digital Advertising Specialist| Remote | Flexible Hours | High-Impact Work

/Instagram), while also leveraging other platforms such as Google, TikTok, Craigslist, or programmatic channels where relevant.

title: Designer + Social Media Marketing (Part-Time, 3 Days/Week)
description:
Women with Altitude is a values-led community where women support, uplift, and champion each other. We run memberships, events, workshops and programs that help professional women grow in business and leadership.



We’re looking for a real designer who’s also strong in social media marketing—someone who can take the pressure off our team and bring consistency, creativity, and strategy to our content.



The role (what you’ll do)

• Create on-brand social media assets (static, carousel, stories, simple motion where needed)

• Edit short-form video content (Reels, Stories, LinkedIn snippets) from existing footage and/or simple new captures

• Help shape a practical social media strategy and content pillars we can stick to

• Repurpose content across platforms 
, Instagram, LinkedIn) while keeping it platform-appropriate

• Collaborate with our team to promote events, workshops, mentoring, and member stories

• Maintain tidy, shareable Canva files/templates so our team can reuse and build on your work

• Skills & experience required (must-haves)

• Proven graphic design capability (not “I can design” — you can show it)

• Strong Canva skills and good design fundamentals (layout, typography, hierarchy, brand consistency)

• Strong social media marketing experience (strategy + execution)

• Experience creating content for
, Instagram, and LinkedIn

• Video editing skills for short-form content (e.g., CapCut, Adobe Express, Premiere Rush, or similar)

• Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and meet deadlines

• Excellent communication and a proactive, solutions-focused approach



Bonus points (nice-to-haves)

Meta Ads experience (campaign setup, creative testing, basic reporting)

Experience working with membership communities, events, or purpose-led brands

Copywriting skills for captions (or the ability to collaborate tightly with someone who writes)



What matters to us (values + ways of working)

Women with Altitude is built on:

• Kindness and respect — we communicate like humans, even when things are busy

• Inclusivity and community — we create content that uplifts and welcomes

• Collaboration and abundance — we champion each other and share ideas openly

• High standards with a practical mindset — we want quality work, delivered consistently

• Ownership — you don’t wait to be chased; you bring solutions and follow-through

If you’re an all-rounder who enjoys both design craft and social marketing strategy, you’ll fit right in.



Role details

Part-time: 3 days per week

Hours: approx. 5 hours per day (around 15 hours/week)

Remote-friendly (Australia-based preferred, but not essential if you can work well with our time zones)

Important notes (please read)

To be considered, you must:



Be an actual designer with a portfolio that demonstrates real design skill

Be willing to share Canva files (or editable examples) so we can see how you build and structure designs

Have strong social media experience (this is essential)



How to apply

Women with Altitude is an equal opportunity community and we welcome applicants from diverse backgrounds.

title: Video Editor – Horror Compilation Channel (Long-Term)
description:
We're looking for a reliable video editor for a long-term position on a horror/paranormal YouTube channel.



What you'll be doing: You'll be editing videos of roughly 25–30 minutes each. You'll receive a voiceover and footage, and your job is to match everything together in a way that keeps the video engaging and well-paced. The final result should feel like a proper, finished video.



What we provide: A recorded voiceover and all necessary footage and clips.



What we expect: Each video delivered within 5 days. Sticking to this schedule is important as we upload consistently. Reliable communication if something comes up.



Example of the style we're going for: 



How to apply: Please send your portfolio along with your application. Before starting we ask for a short free trial edit of 1 minute using a voiceover we provide.



Pay: Each video pays $60.

When hired, we will work with bonuses: If you achieve 50K views you will get $20 extra If you achieve 100K views you will get $40 extra If you achieve 250K views you will get $60 extra



These bonuses stack. If a video hits 250K views you earn $60 + $20 + $40 + $60 = $180 in total for that video.



Please note that the bonuses only apply while you are actively working with us.

This is a 100% remote role



What We Avoid:

- Cold messaging uninterested prospects

- Aggressive prospecting in
 groups

- Long, ineffective pitches

- Your Responsibilities: Initiate meaningful conversations with followers who are actively seeking solutions.



Please Do Not Apply If:

- You have an inflated sense of self-importance.

- Team collaboration isn’t your strong suit.

- You lack a strong desire for excellence.

- You don’t believe in our mission to help others.

- You’re resistant to acquiring new skills.

- You’re not willing to put in extra effort to secure more calls.

- You’re not passionate about fitness and financial success.

- Requirements:

- Availability for at least 6-8 hours a day, 6 days a week

- Native English speaker

- Proficient typing skills with a conversational flow (comprehensive training provided)



Compensation:

Base salary plus bonus for each closed deal (Offer Price: 2k / 3k)

Estimated Earnings: $1.5k - $3k per month

We have high standards and are seeking serious, committed individuals!



If you’re up for the Challenge, message me your resume / cv with a 30-60s loom video explaining why you’d be a good fit



Any introductions that fill the role we will give you $300 if the person passes the probationary period

title: Social Media Manager – AI-Driven Content Creator
description:
We're building a DTC golf brand focused on performance and community. We're looking for someone who can own our social presence and drive organic traction through creative, AI-powered content.



You'll be our social media operator - creating content across
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. The core of this role is creative direction + AI execution. You're architecting a multi-platform content strategy that lands with our audience and drives organic growth. This means understanding what works on each platform and adapting your approach accordingly.



Key responsibilities:

- Generate social content (reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts, carousel posts, static posts) using AI tools (Sora, Kling, Midjourney, etc.)

- Develop creative concepts and narratives that resonate with golfers (men 35 years old +) across different platforms

- Adapt content strategy and messaging for each platform's algorithm and audience behavior

- Write copy and captions optimized for each platform

- Manage posting schedule across all platforms and optimize timing

- Monitor performance metrics on each platform and iterate based on what works

- Optimize/adapt based on trends we're seeing

- Collaborate with the team on brand direction and campaign ideas



What We're Looking For

- Strong creative instincts - you understand what makes content stop the scroll

- Proficiency with AI content tools (video generation: Sora, Kling; image: Midjourney, DALL-E; text: ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

- Ability to write for a specific demographic (our audience is experienced golfers, 35+, who care about performance)

- Comfortable with iteration and A/B testing different content approaches

title: Reddit-focused Virtual Assistant to manage and grow traffic for digital profiles.
description:
We currently manage multiple accounts and need someone who deeply understands how Reddit works and can generate traffic organically while avoiding restrictions and maximizing engagement.



We are not looking for someone who spams. We need a profile who understands Reddit culture, can integrate naturally into communities, and apply long-term effective strategies.



Responsibilities:



Identify and analyze relevant subreddits based on each profile

Publish content adapted to each community (titles, format, timing)

Engage with users (comments, replies, overall interaction)

Manage multiple Reddit accounts safely

Apply strategies to avoid blocks or limitations

Test different types of posts and optimize performance

Analyze what content performs best and scale it

Maintain consistent and natural activity across accounts



Requirements:



Proven experience working with Reddit

Strong understanding of karma, subreddit rules, and platform culture

Ability to manage multiple accounts safely

Strategic mindset focused on traffic and results

Proactive, consistent, and growth-oriented



Nice to have:



Experience working with high-engagement content or community management

Familiarity with tools or systems to scale Reddit activity

title: Video Editor for Social Media Ads and Organic Content
description:
We’re looking for a video editor who understands how to create strong short-form content for social media and online selling.



This role is focused on editing content for product marketing, brand awareness, and platform growth. You should be comfortable producing videos that are clean, fast-paced, and suited for today’s social media style.



What you’ll handle



Edit short videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and

Turn raw clips, product footage, and concepts into polished content

Add captions, cuts, transitions, pacing, and visual elements where needed

Help create promotional and conversion-focused content for ecommerce products

Work with our team to improve content quality over time



What we want



Strong video editing ability, especially for short-form content

Must fully master CapCut and Google Veo 3

Experience with CapCut or similar editing software

Good sense of social media pacing and current content style

Attention to detail and ability to follow direction

Reliable communication and consistent delivery

Graphic design sense is a plus



How to apply

Send:

"Video Pro"

one direct portfolio link

to your best short-form video work



Accepted platforms:

TikTok, YouTube, Instagram,
, Canva, or Behance



Please do not send Google Drive, Dropbox, or other file-sharing links.



About us

We are an ecommerce business selling through marketplaces such as Shopee, Lazada, eBay, and our own website. We are building for long-term growth and want someone who is serious about improving, contributing, and growing with the company.



Compensation can be reviewed after 12 months based on performance, consistency, and overall contribution.

title: Automation & CRM Systems Specialist
description:
Job Description: Automation & CRM Systems Specialist 

Location: Remote 

Engagement Type: Contract (Long-term)



Compensation 

Compensation is flexible and will be discussed during the interview process. 

• Structured either per project or as a monthly retainer, depending on scope and hours  

• Designed for long-term collaboration



Overview 

We are seeking a highly skilled Executive Tech Virtual Assistant (VA) to support the end-to-end 

implementation, management, and optimization of automation-driven systems for non-profit 

clients. 



This role is ideal for someone who combines technical automation expertise, CRM 

management, and digital marketing systems with a strong understanding of the non-profit 

ecosystem. You will play a critical role in building and maintaining scalable systems that drive 

funding, engagement, and operational efficiency. 

This is a long-term, project-based engagement, with most client contracts structured over a 6

month duration. 



Key Responsibilities 



1. Client System Setup & Implementation 

• Configure and deploy client systems based on defined growth plans  

• Set up and manage HubSpot CRM, including pipelines, contacts, and reporting  

• Build automation workflows using n8n / Zapier  

• Integrate multiple SaaS tools (HubSpot, Instantly, grant platforms, Google Ads, Zeffy,  Looker Studio)  

• Implement automation-assisted systems (grant writing, outreach, recruitment workflows)  

• Ensure 100% completion and functionality of all client systems within timelines  



2. Automation & Workflow Management 

• Design and optimize:  

o
 sequences (HubSpot, Instantly)  

o Lead nurturing workflows  

o Cross-platform data synchronization  

• Train and configure AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) for:  

o Grant proposals  

o LOIs  

o
 and social content  



3. Grant Research & Non-Profit Systems 

• Conduct targeted research using:  

o Candid  

o Grantable  

o GrantWatch  

• Identify qualified funding opportunities aligned with client missions  

• Support grant application processes through automation and content generation  



4. Monitoring, Reporting & Analytics 

• Monitor systems daily to ensure:  

o Workflow accuracy  

o Data integrity  

o System uptime  

• Build and manage dashboards in Google Looker Studio  

• Submit weekly performance reports with insights and recommendations  



5. Optimization & Troubleshooting 

• Identify and resolve:  

o Workflow errors  

o Integration issues  

o System inefficiencies  

• Perform ongoing system optimization and maintenance  

• Maintain clean and accurate CRM data  



6. Marketing & Outreach Systems 

• Manage cold outreach campaigns via Instantly  

• Support Google Ad Grants setup and troubleshooting  

• Manage donation platforms such as Zeffy  

• Assist with social media scheduling and campaign execution

  

7. Documentation & Strategic Support 

• Develop and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)  

• Provide technical insights for client strategy discussions  

• Support leadership (Nancy Worley) with reporting and system insights  



Must-Have Qualifications 



Technical & Automation 

• Hands-on experience with HubSpot CRM (Free Tier)  

• Strong expertise in automation tools (n8n, Zapier)  

• Experience integrating multiple SaaS platforms  



Marketing & Outreach 

• Experience with
 automation and cold outreach (Instantly)  

• Familiarity with Google Ad Grants  

• Experience with social media automation tools  



Data & Analytics 

• Proficiency in Google Looker Studio  

• Ability to analyze KPIs and optimize performance  



Non-Profit & Grant Tools 

• Experience with:  

o Candid  

o Grantable  

o GrantWatch  

• Understanding of non-profit funding and operations  



AI & Content Automation 

• Experience using ChatGPT / Claude for:  

o Grant writing  

o
 campaigns  

o Content creation  

• Strong prompt engineering skills  

Operations 

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills  

• Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously  

• Excellent organization and communication skills  



Nice-to-Have Qualifications 

• Background working with non-profit organizations  

• Advanced data visualization and analytics  

• Experience training custom automation bots  

• Content strategy experience across
, social, and blogs  

• Ability to manage multiple clients independently or within a VA team  



KPIs / Success Metrics 



System Delivery & Performance 

• Timely completion of implementation milestones:  

o Weeks 1–2: Grant research & targeting  

o Weeks 3–4: System build & automation setup  

o Weeks 5–6: Campaign launch & outreach activation  

o Week 7+: Optimization & scaling  

• Workflow accuracy (low error rates)  

• System uptime target: 99.5%  



Client Outcome Metrics (within 6 months) 

• 50% reduction in admin workload  

• 50% increase in qualified funding opportunities  

• 75% faster response times to inquiries  

• 25% increase in donor engagement  

• 25% increase in talent pipeline  

• 20% increase in brand visibility & partnerships  



Who This Role is For 

• Automation specialists who enjoy building systems, not just managing tasks  

• Tech-savvy VAs with strong execution and ownership mindset  

• Professionals passionate about supporting mission-driven organizations  

• Operators who thrive in fast-paced, multi-client environments



IF interested please send your resume/CV and an overview of your background

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant: FBA, Private Label Specialist
description:
Position: Amazon FBA Virtual Assistant

Our Business Model: Private Label (not Wholesale, Online Arbitrage)

Full-time. 40 hours each week. Please do not apply if you are holding other jobs.

Remote (Work-from-home)



REQUIREMENTS:

-FEMALE applicants only

-Must have proven work experience as an Amazon VA

-Must have a reliable, fully functional computer suitable for daily work

-Must have a stable internet connection with a minimum speed of 20 Mbps

-Strong communication skills, with proficiency in written and spoken English

-Strong research and analytical skills, with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven improvements

-Detail-oriented and highly organized, with a high level of accuracy

-Strong time management skills, with the ability to consistently meet deadlines

-Proactive, resourceful, and able to work independently while collaborating with a team

-Willing to learn, adapt, and take on new responsibilities over time



RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Manage daily Amazon Seller Central operations, including customer service, case management, account health monitoring, and resolving account or listing issues

-Perform keyword and competitor research to create and optimize high-converting Amazon listings (titles, bullet points, backend search terms) using tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or DataDive

-Create and improve Amazon listing images and Premium A+ Content using Photoshop, Canva, and AI creative tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Google AI Studio

-Create and edit high-quality product videos using Filmora, CapCut, Premiere Pro, and AI video tools such as Sora and Flow Veo

-Monitor and manage inventory levels, shipments, and stock replenishment to avoid stockouts or overstock

-Experience with Amazon PPC (campaign setup and optimization) is a strong plus



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

1. Asia working hours

2. Work-from-home setup

3. Bonus: 13th Month

4. Bonus: Year end

5. Long-term opportunity with career growth

6. Supportive and collaborative team



HOW TO APPLY:

If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please submit your applications with the following in the correct order:

1. Cover Letter

2. CV with your education and work experience in chronological order.

3. Attach your work portfolio: relevant work samples

Join our team and grow with us!

title: Graphic Designer (and GHL)
description:
We are a growing company looking for 2 Graphic Designers

one with GHL experience, and one just a regular Graphic Designer

title: Help Me Fix n8n Workflows and Connect Them to GoHighLevel

You know how to use GoHighLevel

Help with lead follow-up systems

Help with

How to Apply

Please send:



Your experience with n8n

Your experience with GoHighLevel

Examples of automations you built

Your price

Example of the style we're going for:

title: CATALOG EXPERT UK
description:
Full-Time Multi-Channel eCommerce Operations Expert (Product Upload & Listing Manager)



High-Level Role · BASE SALEY WITH HUGE Performance-Based Growth · Long-Term Position · Serious Applicants Only



We are looking for an absolute expert in multi-channel eCommerce operations to manage and upload products across all of our sales channels.



This is a high-responsibility role for someone who knows exactly how to handle complex product data, large-scale uploads, and multi-platform listings accurately, efficiently, and without constant supervision.



You will be responsible for managing product listings across multiple platforms and ensuring everything is uploaded, updated, and optimised correctly across the board.



?



???? This role is NOT for beginners



???? We do NOT want anyone half-experienced or without true expertise



We are looking for someone with full, high-level hands-on experience across multiple eCommerce systems.

If you are not already highly experienced in this exact type of work, this is not the role for you.



?



???? What You Will Be Responsible For

 • Managing and uploading products across all sales channels

 • Handling bulk uploads using CSV systems

 • Working with Amazon flat files for product listings

 • Managing listings through the Mirakl platform

 • Uploading and managing products on TikTok Shop

 • Managing and updating products within Shopify

 • Ensuring all listings are accurate, consistent, and error-free

 • Troubleshooting upload issues, errors, and inconsistencies

 • Maintaining product data, pricing, variations, and descriptions across platforms

 • Keeping everything organised, clean, and scalable



?



???? Required Experience



You MUST have strong, proven experience with:

 • CSV product upload systems

Real Estate Property Management VA



About the Role



Are you organized, confident, and ready to take on a key role in property management?



Smartland is seeking a skilled Real Estate Property Management VA / Property Manager Assistant who thrives in a fast-paced environment, communicates with ease, and keeps operations running smoothly. Excellent spoken English



Strong time management and organizational skills

Ability to work independently and follow processes accurately



Why Join Smartland?



Competitive pay with room for growth



Supportive, professional team



Valuable experience in U.S. real estate property management



Long-term career advancement opportunities

title: Customer Service Member
description:
Remote Customer Service Member (Work from Home)

Independent Contractor



A prominent and growing North American facilities services organization is expanding its remote operations support and is seeking dependable, detail-oriented customer support professionals. This is a work-from-home contractor engagement supporting commercial and retail clients across Canada.



This is an independent contractor engagement, paid weekly upon receipt of invoice. The schedule is 9-hour shifts, five (5) days per week. Occasional Saturday shifts (approximately once per month) may be required. Shifts align with Eastern Standard Time: 8:00–5:00, 9:00–6:00, or 10:00–7:00 EST.



Role Overview

This is a dynamic, high-energy administrative and customer support position where every day brings new experiences and opportunities for professional growth. The role involves real-time coordination via Zoom and other internal systems to progress various tasks.



As an independent contractor working with our Customer Service Team, you’ll play a key role in maintaining the efficient flow of work orders through our systems and processes. 



Based on your skills and interests, you’ll be assigned to one of our specialized sub-teams:



•
ing Team: Monitor and manage an inbox with thousands of daily incoming
s, sort and flag urgent or high-priority
s, and collaborate with relevant teams.

• Scheduling Team: Dispatch and schedule work orders with technicians to ensure timely completion.

• Compiling Team: Handle compiling tasks, including before/after photos, invoices, sign-offs, assisting with month-end closures, and answering phones.

• Check-In/Out Team: Sign in technicians as they arrive on-site for jobs, address any issues or scope changes, and ensure smooth operations while technicians are on location.



Each sub-team works collaboratively to deliver exceptional service while minimizing bottlenecks in our workflows.



Requirements for Home Office Set Up:

• Windows PC preferred, running Windows 11

• Minimum 300 Mbps internet speed; Fibre connection strongly preferred

• Multiple monitors required (single monitor setups not suitable)

• High-quality headset with a microphone and a Reliable webcam

• Quiet, professional workspace suitable for full-day Zoom collaboration

Traits We Are Seeking:

Organization: You can handle high
 volumes, prioritize tasks, and keep everything on track.

Problem-solving: You take initiative, think independently, and easily resolve issues.

Collaborative Communicator: You work confidently with others, fostering accountability and motivation. You are a positive, self-motivated individual with clear communication.

Composed Under Pressure: You enjoy working within tight deadlines and fast-paced environments. 

Proven work history: You are looking for a long-term opportunity and have a proven track record. Experience in virtual assistance, remote administrative roles, or customer service preferred.

Strong technical Skills: You have in-depth technical skills with the ability to work in several systems and databases at one time

Preferred

This includes:

Uploading and publishing new products in Shopify

Writing and updating product titles, descriptions, and SEO content

Creating and maintaining SKUs, pricing, and inventory accuracy

Ensuring all listings are optimised for Google Shopping & performance marketing

Making ongoing updates to improve clarity, consistency, and conversion

Start your application with the word BLUE so we know you have read the full description.

Product and Brand Quality

Beyond data entry, you’ll play a key role in maintaining the look and feel of the storefront:

Ensure all product pages are clean, minimal, and on-brand

Experience listing products for e-commerce brands (fashion preferred)

Product titles

SKUs

Pricing

Variants & inventory

Comfortable working independently and maintaining high standards



Tools and skills required 

Shopify (required)

Google Merchant Center / Google Ads (preferred)

Kopy or similar tools for product listing

AI tools (e.g. Gemini / ChatGPT) for content and image generation

Basic understanding of SEO for e-commerce



About the role

This is a full-time position.

You’ll first be onboarded into:

Company’s  brand tone and positioning

Product structure and listing standards

Our workflow for product uploads and optimisation

How to apply

Amount of days/week availability

title: Operations & Programme Assistant (Part-time, Remote)
description:
I’m an executive coach and programme creator running a small, growing body of work (coaching, training programmes, writing, and a podcast). I’m looking for a sharp, organised, and proactive assistant to help me stay on top of things and keep key projects moving.



This is not a pure admin role. I’m looking for someone who can bring structure, anticipate what’s needed, and act as a steady point of coordination across my work.



You’ll work closely with me to:



Keep me organised and focused

Help shape weekly priorities

Track key tasks and follow-ups

Gently but consistently keep things moving

Support programme delivery 

Manage participant communications (reminders, logistics)

Track bookings and engagement

Ensure nothing slips through the cracks

Act as a point of coordination across projects

Help organise and track work across:

coaching programmes

course creation

writing (articles / book development)

Hold a simple, clear view of what’s in motion

Light marketing and content support

Format and schedule posts (LinkedIn, Substack)

Support podcast/admin tasks

Help maintain consistency of output

General admin and operations

Scheduling and diary management

Document organisation

Light research where needed



What I’m looking for



Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

Comfortable working with some ambiguity (but able to create structure)

Proactive—able to spot what needs doing without being told every step

Clear written English and good communication

Experience supporting a founder, coach, or small business is a plus

Familiar with tools like Google Workspace, Zoom, and ideally Notion or similar



This role will suit someone who enjoys bringing order to moving parts, and who takes quiet satisfaction in helping things run well.



Practicalities



Part-time (~10–15 hours per week to start)

Fluency in English - typed and spoken - is essential 

I am seeking someone proactive, confident working independently once shown the ropes

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Online Sales Agent
description:

title: Social Media Video Editor (Premiere Pro Only) [Ongoing Work]
description:
We are seeking a skilled video editor to join our team for long-term, contract-based work focusing on high-quality social media content. This role involves editing professionally shot footage, often in LOG format, requiring professional editing and polished color grading. You should understand modern social media trends and be able to deliver engaging edits based on provided examples and creative direction.



Technical Requirements & Workflow

All work must be completed exclusively in Adobe Premiere Pro. We operate collaboratively, so you must maintain well-organized project files that can be shared for revisions. You will be handling short-form content and managing large, high-quality video files. We work with large Sony FX30 (S-Log3) files. Having a high-speed internet connection is mandatory; please include a screenshot of a recent speed test with your application.



Communication & Language

Strong communication is essential for this partnership. We prefer fluency in English as you will be responsible for creating grammatically accurate captions. If English is not your first language, you must be proficient with tools like Google Translate to ensure total accuracy. We are a small business and value building long-term working relationships based on trust and clear, direct communication. This role will include occasional video calls to brainstorm ideas or walk through project details.



Production & Sourcing

Work is typically delivered in batches of 10 to 24 videos. Along with your editing skills, please let us know your experience with sourcing assets. Do you currently have access to professional stock music or b-roll libraries (such as Epidemic Sound, Artlist, etc.)? Please clarify if you are used to sourcing music and graphics independently to fit the brand’s vibe.



How to Apply

Experience with Sony footage is a significant asset. To apply, please share a portfolio or reel of your best social media work with a short note on your editing style and availability. To ensure you’ve read this entire post, please start your application with the word "BLUE" in the first line.

title: SEO Link Builder
description:
*Link Builder – Full Time (Remote)*



We're looking for an experienced, high-output link builder to join our SEO outreach team.



*What we need from you:*



• Proven experience in link building — end to end. This means identifying relevant, niche-appropriate websites, finding the right contact, writing compelling outreach
s, and converting conversations into placements



• A strong work rate. Quality matters, but volume matters too — link building is a numbers game and we need someone who understands that and thrives in it



• Clean, professional written English in all outreach communications



• Comfortable working to weekly output targets and reporting clearly on activity, responses, and results



• Reporting into our team leader, taking briefs on each campaign and feeding back progress regularly



*What good looks like:*



• You take ownership of your pipeline and don't need chasing

• You track everything — sent, replied, declined, placed

• You know the difference between a quality placement and one that will hurt a site





*How to apply*



We will not consider any application that does not include a short video. This is non-negotiable.



• Record a 2–3 minute video answering the following questions. Speak clearly and in your own words — this is how we assess your English and your experience:



• Walk me through how you find relevant websites to target for a specific niche — what's your process?

• How do you find the right contact
 for a website owner or editor?

• What do you write in a cold outreach
 — what makes someone actually respond?

• How many outreach
s do you typically send per day, and how do you track them?

• What tools have you used for link building and outreach?

• When would you be available to start the role? Do you have your own equipment, And can you work to UK time 9-5pm GMT Monday - Friday. 



Upload your video to YouTube, Google Drive, or Loom and include the link in your application. Applications without a video link will be automatically rejected.

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant – Family, Business, Student & ADHD Support
description:
Hours: Full Time (40 hrs/week)

Timezone: Eastern Standard Time (EST)

Compensation: $350–$500/month

Start: Immediate



About This Role

A busy single-parent household looking for an exceptional VA to become the organizational backbone of our entire life — business, nonprofit, properties, job applications, and daily support for a gifted, kind, friendly teen with ADHD.

This is not a standard VA role. We are building systems from scratch and need someone who can assess, design, and implement structure — not just follow instructions. 



What You Will Handle



Personal calendar, admin, bills, and logistics

Airbnb calendar management for multiple properties

Administrative support for a nonprofit (Platform Justice)

Job application tracking in legal and compliance fields

Daily academic support and homework accountability for a 13-year-old student with ADHD (kind and polite)



Who You Are



Experienced VA — this is not an entry level position

Background in education, legal/compliance, or psychology preferred

Teaching or learning specialist background strongly preferred

Experience working with neurodiverse or gifted students is a significant advantage

Experience supporting high achieving students in competitive academic environments a strong plus

Experience working with ADHD individuals — essential, not optional

Notion proficient

Warm, patient, organized, proactive, and discreet

Comfortable building systems independently



Schedule

This is a rough schedule but will d
 later. Split shift across EST. Three blocks daily with breaks in between:



6AM–9AM EST

3PM–6PM EST

7PM–10PM EST



Actual working hours 6 to 8 per day. Common for Filipino VAs on US hours.



To Apply

Send a brief introduction covering:



Your relevant experience

One specific experience supporting someone with ADHD and what worked

Your Notion experience

Your available start date



We are hiring immediately.

title: Senior Salesforce Administrator
description:
Senior Salesforce Administrator 

 

Dominion Financial Services (DFS)



Dominion Financial Services (DFS) is a fast-growing national real estate lender specializing in Short-Term Bridge Loans and Long-Term Rental Loans for investors across the country. As we scale, we are looking for a Senior Salesforce Administrator who will take ownership of our CRM ecosystem and help transform it into a true driver of operational efficiency and business growth.

 

This is not a maintenance-only role. We are seeking someone who thinks like a builder and operator—someone who proactively identifies opportunities, improves systems, and drives impact across the organization.

 

As a Senior Salesforce Administrator, You Will

 

Oversee, maintain, and continuously improve DFS’s Salesforce platform to support company operations and internal teams. You will assist users with troubleshooting and technical inquiries, create and maintain automation using both declarative and programmatic Salesforce tools, and manage user profiles and permissions to ensure secure system access.

 

The role includes building and maintaining analytical dashboards to support data-driven decision-making, cleaning and managing data using tools such as Excel and SQL, and implementing data models aligned with evolving business needs. You will also update document templates using Conga Composer, document technical processes, and optimize marketing lead distribution workflows.

 

In addition, you will support system-related projects and initiatives as the organization grows—playing a key role in scaling infrastructure, improving efficiency, and enabling revenue-driving teams to perform at a higher level.

 

What Success Looks Like

Salesforce evolves into a scalable, high-performance system that supports rapid growth

Teams rely on you as a problem-solver and strategic partner, not just support

Automation and workflows increase efficiency and reduce manual work

Reporting and dashboards provide clear, actionable business insights

You consistently identify and implement improvements that drive impact



Required Skills & Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in a related field

5+ years of experience as a Salesforce Administrator in a professional environment

Salesforce Administrator Certification (required)

Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word

Familiarity with databases and working knowledge of SQL

Extensive experience working with CRM systems as an administrator or advanced user

Strong analytical, problem-solving, and systems-thinking abilities

title: Shopify Product Page Designer & Store Builder (E-commerce / DTC Brand)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION

Who we are:

We're a fast-moving DTC (direct-to-consumer) brand that sells physical products in the health and beauty space. We run paid ads on Meta and drive traffic to Shopify. We need our product pages to convert — not just look good.

What you'll be doing:

Your main job is to build high-converting Shopify product pages and, when we launch new products, build out full Shopify stores from scratch. This is not a general VA role. This is a specialized position for someone who understands e-commerce and knows why a good product page sells.

Specifically:



Build and optimize Shopify product pages that are designed to convert paid traffic

Set up full Shopify stores when we launch new products (theme selection, navigation, pages, collections, apps)

Write or format product descriptions, bullet points, and page copy based on briefs we give you

Install and configure Shopify apps (reviews, upsells, bundles, etc.)

Work with image assets we provide and lay them out cleanly

Make CRO improvements based on data (we'll share what's working and what's not)

Keep the store clean, fast, and functional



What we're NOT looking for:



Someone who just knows how to install a theme and change colors

Someone who needs to be taught what a product page is

General virtual assistants who "also know Shopify"





Requirements:



Minimum 2 years of Shopify experience (not general web design — specifically Shopify)

Must be able to show us live Shopify stores or product pages you have built

Strong eye for design — you understand what makes a page look trustworthy and professional

Basic understanding of what makes a DTC product page convert (above-the-fold, social proof, CTA placement, mobile-first)

Comfortable working with Shopify themes (Debut, Dawn, Impulse, or similar)

Experience with Shopify apps: Klaviyo, 
, ReConvert, Vitals, or similar

Can work independently from a brief — you don't need someone to hold your hand

Fluent in written English (you will be formatting copy we write)

Able to communicate clearly and meet deadlines



Nice to have (not required):



Experience with Liquid (Shopify's coding language) for small customizations

Experience building stores for ads-driven brands (not just organic/SEO stores)

Canva or basic image editing for asset preparation





How to apply — important:

We receive many applications. To be considered, your application MUST include:



Links to 2–3 Shopify stores or product pages you built. Not stores you "helped with" — stores you actually built. We will look at them.

One sentence describing what you would change or improve about one of those pages if you built it today.

The word "ROTUNDUS" somewhere in your application. This tells us you read the full post.



Applications without all three of these will not be reviewed.



Job type: Part-time to start (10–20 hours/week), potential to grow to full-time

Rate: $5–12/hour depending on experience and portfolio

Hours: Flexible — async is fine, but you need to be reachable during European business hours at least 3x per week

title: Director of Customer Acquisition DTC
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.

Ready to build something that shapes the future?

Every parent wants to give their child the best start. They want to see curiosity light up their eyes. They want confidence, not constant screen time. They want learning to feel joyful again.



At Hadley Designs, we create screen-free tools that help families rediscover connection through hands-on learning. We are scaling quickly. We are building boldly. And we are looking for a leader who can turn vision into profitable growth.



That’s where you come in.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand redefining early education through creativity, beauty, and connection. What began at a kitchen table has grown into a nationally loved brand trusted by millions of parents, grandparents, and teachers.



We believe learning should be fun and engaging.



We don’t just sell products, we shape futures.



We believe in screen-free, hands-on learning that builds confidence and connection. Beautiful design creates better learning.



Our mission is simple and powerful. Design screen-free products parents can trust to help their children learn, grow, and reach their full potential with confidence.



Our vision is bold. Build the most trusted children’s brand in the world. Reach $100M in revenue by 2030. Become a household name passed down for generations.



Now we are scaling our direct-to-consumer ecosystem. Shopify and TikTok Shop are our next major growth engines.



About the Role

As our Director of Customer Acquisition DTC, you are the General Manager of Shopify and TikTok Shop. You own the P&L. You own the strategy. You own the results.



Your Core Focus



-Scale Shopify and TikTok Shop to $20M+ in combined revenue within 18 months

-Achieve ?15% net margin on Shopify and ?5% on TikTok Shop

-Maintain Meta ROAS ? 2.0 and TikTok Shop ROAS ? 3.5

-Launch one new high-converting bundle-based funnel per month

-Drive
 and SMS to contribute ?25% of Shopify revenue

-Remove the CEO from daily ecommerce execution by owning strategy, systems, team, and outcomes



You are not here to manage tasks. You are here to architect a repeatable growth engine.



What You’ll Do



Traffic and Acquisition



-Partner with affiliate and UGC teams to scale winning creative

-Stay ahead of platform trends, formats, and policy updates

-Coordinate launches with Amazon for halo effects



Offers, Funnels, and CRO



L-aunch one new bundle-based funnel every month tied to educational outcomes

-Optimize CVR, AOV, CAC, LTV, upsells, and overall funnel economics weekly

-Oversee homepage, product pages, and collection merchandising

-Refactor and relaunch underperforming funnels with new hooks and offers

-Lead seasonal promotions including Back-to-School and Holiday campaigns

-Build and maintain funnel SOPs and testing roadmaps



Customer Nurture and LTV



-Lead lifecycle marketing through Klaviyo and Postscript

-Optimize welcome, cart abandonment, post-purchase, and win-back flows

-Build ascension paths from posters to workbooks to busy books

-Develop blog and SEO strategy to drive organic education-based traffic



Performance and Forecasting



-Review weekly P&Ls for Shopify and TikTok Shop

-Analyze AOV, CVR, CAC, LTV, ROAS, GP to CAC, and lifecycle revenue share

-Deliver weekly scorecards and monthly strategic growth plans

-Forecast performance and identify scaling levers



Team Leadership



-Lead and coach a cross-functional ecommerce pod of 6+ tea
mbers

-Establish clear ownership and weekly operating rhythms

-Hire and develop talent as funnel velocity increases

-Manage freelancers and specialized contractors

-Model Extreme Ownership, Relentless Innovation, and Integrity

Above All



How Success Is Measured



-$20M+ DTC revenue within 18 months

-Consistent margin and ROAS targets achieved

-One profitable funnel launch per month


 and SMS driving at least 25% of Shopify revenue

-Documented systems that scale without founder dependency

-A high-performing team executing without burnout



Requirements



Who You Are



You think like a General Manager, not just a marketer.



You thrive in ownership. You love numbers. You respect creative. You build systems that make growth inevitable.



You align deeply with our values:



-Extreme Ownership. You solve problems and close loops without excuses.

-Relentless Innovation. You test boldly, learn fast, and iterate constantly.

-Integrity Above All. You report numbers accurately and tell the truth even when it is hard.



Experience That Sets You Apart



-5 to 10+ years in DTC ecommerce, especially Shopify and paid social

-Proven track record scaling ecommerce brands past $20M

-Experience owning revenue and profitability targets

-Deep expertise in Meta and TikTok Ads

-Hands-on experience with Klaviyo, Postscript, and Shopify CMS

-Strong background in bundles, upsells, and LTV optimization

-Ability to write and review high-converting landing pages

-Comfortable leading a fully remote team with clear weekly cadences



You are analytical and creative. Strategic and operational. Visionary and accountable.



You care about building something that lasts.



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working Here



-You will have real ownership. Real trust. And real impact.

title: GoHighLevel Expert — Reputation Management Agency Setup & Automation
description:
I run a reputation management agency helping local US businesses get more Google reviews and improve their online rating using automated systems. I am looking for an experienced GoHighLevel specialist who can set up and manage client accounts from start to finish with minimal supervision.



This is a technical operations role. Your job is to build and maintain GoHighLevel systems for each client we sign. When a new client joins I will send you their business details and you will handle everything inside GoHighLevel from that point forward. I do not need to be involved in the technical setup — I need someone who can work independently and get systems live quickly.



Here is exactly what this role involves:



New Client Setup — When a new client is confirmed you will create a new sub-account inside our GoHighLevel agency account for that specific client. Each client gets their own separate workspace. You will set up their review request automation including SMS and
 sequences that automatically send to their customers after a visit asking them to leave a Google review. You will connect their Google Business Profile to GoHighLevel so we can monitor their reviews in real time. You will set up their reporting dashboard showing review count, star rating progress, and automation activity. You will test everything before confirming it is live. Target turnaround is 24 to 48 hours per new client setup.



Ongoing Monthly Management — Once a client is live you will monitor their GoHighLevel account daily. You will respond professionally to any new Google reviews that come in within 24 hours. You will ensure all automations are running correctly and flag any issues immediately. On the first of each month you will pull a report for each active client showing new reviews received, current star rating, number of review requests sent, and response rate. You will send those reports to me so I can forward them to clients.



White Label Setup — You will help set up our GoHighLevel account with our agency branding so clients see our agency name and logo rather than GoHighLevel when they log into their dashboard.



Quality Control — Before any client account goes live you will run a full test of the automation sequence. You will confirm review request messages are sending correctly, Google Business Profile is connected, and the reporting dashboard is pulling accurate data.



Communication — You will send me a brief update when each new client setup is complete. You will flag any technical issues immediately rather than waiting. You will keep a simple log of all active client accounts and their current status.



What I am looking for:

Hands on experience building inside GoHighLevel specifically — not just familiarity with the platform

Proven experience setting up GoHighLevel sub-accounts for multiple clients

Experience building SMS and
 automation workflows inside GoHighLevel

Experience connecting Google Business Profiles inside GoHighLevel

Experience with GoHighLevel reputation management features specifically

Ability to work independently without step by step supervision

Strong attention to detail — errors in client setups affect real businesses

Reliable and responsive communication

Experience working with US based clients or agencies is a strong plus



This starts as a 5 day paid trial. During the trial I will ask you to demonstrate your GoHighLevel skills by setting up a sample client sub-account, building a review request automation workflow, and walking me through what you built either via a short screen recording or written explanation. This tells me immediately whether you have real hands on experience or just surface level knowledge of the platform.

After the trial this becomes an ongoing part time role with consistent weekly pay every Friday. As we grow and sign more clients your hours will increase accordingly.



Please apply with a description of your GoHighLevel experience specifically. Tell me what you have built inside the platform, what types of clients or agencies you have worked with, and describe a specific GoHighLevel project you completed. Applications without specific GoHighLevel experience described will not be considered.
salary: $5 to $7 per hour based on experience

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR)
description:
A Sales Development Representative (SDR) at Exponential Freedom is responsible for starting conversations with high-income professionals and identifying those who could benefit from advanced tax mitigation strategies.



This role sits at the very front of the sales process. Your job is not to close deals—it’s to create opportunities. You’ll reach out to prospects through calls, texts, and
s, spark interest, ask the right questions, and qualify whether they’re a good fit. From there, you book them into a 15-minute introductory call with a senior advisor.



Day-to-day, the role is highly activity-driven. You’ll be making a high volume of outbound calls, handling objections in real time, and following up consistently. Success in this position comes down to discipline, resilience, and communication skills.



The people who perform best in this role are competitive, coachable, and comfortable with rejection. They treat it like a performance-based environment where effort directly impacts income and growth.



At its core, the job is simple:

Start conversations ? qualify prospects ? book appointments ? repeat at a high level.

title: Full-Stack Engineer
description:
About the Role



We at JVDB Studios are looking for a Full-Stack Developer to lead the end-to-end development of a mobile-first workforce management platform. This is a hands-on role where you will own the full technical build—from architecture to deployment.



You’ll be working on a product designed to replace multiple operational tools (scheduling, HR, quality control, invoicing) with a single integrated platform, with future plans to scale into a white-label SaaS solution.



This is a high-impact opportunity to build a product from the ground up with a direct European company, offering strong compensation and flexible working conditions.

User profiles and onboarding system

Internal testing and iteration

title: Video Editor
description:
About the role



We’re looking for a detail-obsessed Junior Video Editor to help us turn raw footage, images, and transcripts into scroll-stopping content. You’ll cut videos, create Reels/Shorts/TikToks, optimise transcripts/captions, and build simple social videos from images and B-roll. Expect fast feedback loops, tight deadlines, and lots of variety across platforms.



MUST HAVE - Licensed Video Editing Software, ability to work with BRAW files, Fast Internet Access, Da Vinci Resolve Experience



What you’ll do (day-to-day)



Edit video: Assemble rough cuts, polish fine cuts, add lower thirds, end cards, music, and basic sound design.



Short-form social: Create platform-native clips (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn) with strong hooks, on-screen captions, and brand styling.



Captioning & transcripts: Generate and tidy transcripts (e.g., Descript/Whisper), produce SRT/VTT, burn-in captions when needed, and repurpose transcripts into descriptions, chapter markers, and timestamps.



Image-to-video: Build motion slideshows from images and graphics; add zooms, pans, light motion graphics, and transitions.



Versioning & formats: Deliver 9:16, 1:1, 4:5, and 16:9 variants; export optimised files per platform specs.



Quality control: Colour balance, audio levelling, noise reduction, consistency with brand guidelines, and final checks before publishing.



Asset management: Keep projects tidy (naming conventions, proxy workflows), maintain libraries of music, SFX, LUTs, and templates.



Publishing support: Prepare thumbnails, titles, tags, and metadata; collaborate on upload schedules and content calendars.



Stock & B-roll: Source rights-cleared footage, images, and music; track licences.



Performance awareness: Review retention graphs/analytics with the team; iterate cuts to improve watch time and engagement.



Nice to have



Basic motion graphics (simple keyframing, mask reveals, animated stickers).



YouTube workflow experience (chapters, end screens, cards, descriptions).

title: Fractional Bookeeper
description:
We're a fast-moving real estate portfolio company— spanning RV parks, Mobile Home Parks, Single Family and commercial operations. We're looking for a sharp, organized bookkeeper who can keep our books clean, our accounts reconciled, and our reporting sharp — without needing to be hand-held. If you thrive in a lean, entrepreneurial environment and know your way around real estate financials, we want to talk.



What you'll own:

Monthly reconciliation across multiple LLCs and entities

QuickBooks Online management — categorization, journal entries, clean chart of accounts

Tracking income and expenses by property and asset class

Producing monthly P&Ls and cash flow summaries for each entity

Supporting tax prep — coordinating with our CPA at year-end

Managing accounts payable and vendor payments

Light payroll coordination (we have a small team)



You're a fit if you:

Have 3+ years of bookkeeping experience, ideally in real estate or a multi-entity environment

Are fluent in QuickBooks Online — you set it up, you fix it, you train others if needed

Understand real estate terminology: NOI, cap rate, depreciation, cost segregation, etc.

Are detail-obsessed but fast — you catch errors before anyone else notices them

Communicate proactively and can work asynchronously with a busy operator

Are comfortable juggling 5–10 entities with different revenue models



Nice to have:

Experience with RV parks, hospitality, or short-term rental properties

Familiarity with construction draws or development project tracking

Experience setting up accounting systems from scratch

QuickBooks ProAdvisor certification

Key Responsibilities

1. Photograph Editing (Home Listings)

• Use AI tools to remove clutter and clean up rooms

• Deliver high-resolution, listing-ready images

• Apply color grading, lighting, and exposure corrections

• Ensure images look bright, spacious, and premium

• Maintain consistent quality across image sets



2. Video Editing (Short & Long-Form Content)

• Review and cull footage

• Select strong images and use AI to clean, enhance, and prepare (clutter removal, lighting, composition)

• Convert images into moving footage (parallax, zoom, motion)

• Apply AI virtual staging and animate furniture pop-ups

• Combine footage + images into before ? after transformation videos

• Craft voiceover-led intros and outros

• Add captions, motion graphics, sound design, and transitions



Short-Form (Reels / TikTok / Shorts)

• 60–90 seconds per video

• Strong hooks, pacing, and storytelling

• Structure: hook ? transformation ? reveal ? payoff



Long-Form (YouTube / Walkthroughs)

• 10–15 minutes per video

• More detailed walkthrough with smoother pacing and narrative flow



_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Deliverables

• ~16 reel / videos + photo sets per month (4 sets per week)



Turnaround Time:

• Short-form (60–90s): 1–2 days per video

• Long-form (10–15 min): 2–4 days per video

+ Deliver photos alongside videos when required



Photo Output Guide:

• Half day: 12–15 photos (2–3 rooms + 1–2 exteriors)

• Full day: 25–30 photos (5–6 rooms + 3–4 exteriors)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



What We’re Looking For

• 2–5 years in video + photo editing (real estate/interiors preferred)

• Strong in home listing photo editing (lighting, color, cleanup)

• Proven AI clutter removal & virtual staging experience

• Able to create engaging transformation videos with strong pacing

• Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Lightroom

• Hands-on with AI tools for image and video transformation

• Reliable, responsive, and able to meet fast timelines

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Examples (Target Style)











Only apply if you can match this style with precision and consistency.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



This Role May Not Be the Best Fit If…

• You prefer working only on video or only on photos

• You’re not comfortable with AI cleanup, staging, and color grading

• You rely on templates instead of crafting transformations

• Fast turnaround and feedback loops are challenging

• You prefer execution-only roles without creative input

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



How to Apply



Send to 



• Portfolio / showreel (video + photo edits)

• 2–3 examples of before/after edits, AI cleanup, or staging work



Shortlisted candidates will have a short interview, followed by a paid trial ($20 USD per reel + photo set).

mber based in the Philippines

title: Video Editor Ecommerce
description:
Video Editor Job for a Luxury Perfume Brand 

Position: Performance Video Editor (E-commerce Ads)

(Luxury Perfume Oils – Scaling to US Market)

Type: Part
-time Remote

Budget: $
/month (based on speed + quality)

Start: Immediately

???

About Us

We're a perfume oil brand expanding to the US. We need to produce 100+ ad creatives per month to test and scale on Meta and TikTok.

You'll be our creative production engine.

Website: 

???

The Role

Turn raw footage into scroll-stopping ads. Fast.

Your job:

• Receive 5-10 raw video clips per week (UGC-style, product demos, testimonials)

• Create 5-8 variations of each clip (different hooks, cuts, music, text overlays)

• Deliver 25-30 finished ads every week

• Iterate quickly based on performance data

This is NOT:

• Slow, cinematic brand videos

• Overthinking one perfect edit

• Waiting for feedback for days

This IS:

• High-volume, fast-turnaround production

• Testing 10 different hooks from the same footage

• Making winners, killing losers, repeat

???

What You'll Create

Format: Vertical video ads (9:16) for Meta/TikTok/Instagram

Length: 15-30 seconds

Volume:
ads per month

Style: UGC/native content (NOT overly polished)

Example variations from one clip:

1. Hook: "I used to spend €200 on perfume..."

2. Hook: "This smells EXACTLY like Baccarat Rouge but costs €35"

3. Hook: "POV: You smell expensive but you're not broke"

4. [Same footage, different music, no voiceover, text-only]

5. [Same footage, zoomed-in product shots, fast cuts]

You get the idea. Speed + volume = more winners.

???

Requirements

Must have:

• 1-2+ years editing short-form video (ads, TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts)

• Expert in Premiere Pro or Final Cut (CapCut is fine if you're fast)

• Portfolio of e-commerce/DTC ads (beauty, fashion, lifestyle)

• Can deliver 25+ ads per week consistently

• Fast learner—you'll get feedback and iterate daily

Bonus:

• Experience with beauty/fragrance brands

• Knowledge of what performs on Meta/TikTok ads

• Motion graphics/text animation skills (not required but helpful)

• You've worked with UGC content before

Mindset:

• You value high quality and speed over perfection

• You test 10 ideas instead of perfecting 1

• You don't get emotionally attached to edits—data d

• You can take direct feedback and turn it around in hours, not days

???

The Test Task (Paid)

We'll send you:

• 1 raw video clip 

• A brief with  different hook angles

Your job:

• Create 5 different 15-20 second ad variations

• Deliver within 48 hours

• Payment: $20 upon completion

What we're looking for:

• Speed (can you really hit our volume needs?)

• Variety (are the 5 ads actually different, or just tweaks?)

• Native feel (does it look like a TikTok, not a commercial?)

• Does your editing style match a luxury perfume brand?



???

Compensation & Growth

Starting: $
/month (depending on test task performance)

After 30 days: Performance review

• Hitting 100+ quality ads/month consistently? ? salary increase

• Quality + speed both high? ? salary increase + bonuses

After 90 days:

• Proven track record? We'll bring on a junior editor and promote you to lead

• More responsibility = more pay

Bonuses:

• When an ad you create becomes a "winner" (scaling spend), you get $20-50 bonus per ad

• We track which editor's work performs best—top performers get rewarded
