title: Amazon Product Research & Excel-Savvy
description:
We are a growing Amazon FBA business looking for a skilled Amazon Product Research & Excel-Savvy to join our team.



This role is ideal for someone who understands the Amazon marketplace inside and out — including product research, competition analysis, and how to work with data in Excel.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Analyze products, listings, and competitors on Amazon

Use product research insights to support pricing decisions

Update and manage pricing using SellerSnap

Perform bulk pricing updates via Excel uploads

Ensure accuracy and consistency across our catalog



What We’re Looking For:



Strong experience with Amazon product research

Familiarity with tools like Keepa, Jungle Scout, ASIN Zen, or similar

Solid understanding of Amazon listings and competitive landscape

Detail-oriented and data-driven mindset

Strong Excel skills (formulas, bulk data handling, etc.)

Experience with SellerSnap is a plus (not required)



To streamline the hiring process and reduce back-and-forth communication via
, we ask that all applicants submit a short video introduction explaining:



Your experience with Amazon product research and tools

Your experience with Excel

Why you believe you are a strong fit for this role



Please send your video to 
 without a video introduction will be ignored. This is the only way to move forward to the next stage of the interview process.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: eCommerce Growth Executive
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Growth Executive to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Growth Executive is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: eCommerce Virtual Expert
description:
Help Keep a Fast-Growing eCommerce Business Running Smoothly!



Hadley Designs is seeking a Virtual Expert to support core operational functions across the business. This role is designed for dependable, detail-oriented support professionals who thrive in structured environments and take ownership of clearly defined responsibilities.



You will own specific processes within one or more functional areas and be trusted to execute them accurately, consistently, and on time with minimal oversight. This role emphasizes reliability, follow-through, and clear accountability within defined responsibilities.



Over time, you will also contribute to improving workflows and documentation within your scope, helping strengthen operational consistency as the business grows.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

- Depending on your background and strengths, responsibilities may include:

- Customer support and order management

- Account health monitoring and basic reporting

- Inventory tracking and light supply chain coordination

- Data entry, reconciliation, and system updates

- Basic accounting or finance support

- Maintaining SOPs and internal documentation

- Executing assigned processes accurately and consistently while identifying issues early and proposing solutions



Are you ready to make an impact in a thriving eCommerce company? Apply here:

title: Amazon Brand Executive
description:
Ready to dominate Amazon as part of a winning crew?



At Hadley Designs, we’re all about filling lives with beauty and inspiration through products that unlock people’s best selves. Amazon’s our fortress—70-80% of our revenue—and we need a Brand Executive to own a multi-million dollar portfolio and take it to the next level. This isn’t just a solo hustle; it’s your chance to join a tight-knit team, learn our proven playbook, and still crush the competition while shaping our future.



While we’re scaling across all channels, Amazon’s where our bread is buttered. We’re looking for a pro who’s hungry to scale portfolios, optimize like a champ, and spot golden opportunities, someone who’s coachable yet ready to drive millions in revenue with profitability locked in. If you’ve conquered Amazon before, love data-driven wins, and can gel with a team that’s got your back, this is your shot. No red tape, just big resources, a CEO who bets on bold, and a crew ready to help you shine.



What Winning Looks Like:



Six months in, your category’s unstoppable: sales are up, profits are peaking, and new products are killing it. You’ve mastered our optimization game, revitalized legacy items, and pitched expansions that have competitors sweating—all while syncing with the team to make Hadley Designs’ Amazon presence a juggernaut. You’re hitting targets, balancing inventory like a pro, and proving you can hustle hard and learn fast.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: E-Commerce Assistant
description:
About Us & Your Role

We’re building and scaling high-velocity DTC brands.



The pace is fast. The standards are high. The upside is massive.



We’re hiring a Marketing Operations Assistant to become the executional backbone of the marketing team.



You’ll own the systems that keep everything running:

Ad scheduling

Tracking sheets

Reporting

Comment extraction

Day-to-day marketing operations



You’ll also take on new initiatives and ad hoc projects:

UGC sourcing & coordination

Influencer outreach

Competitor research

One-off high-priority projects



Anything that falls outside a clear owner — you take it and run with it.



You’ll work directly with our Head of Meta, acting as their right-hand.



The goal is simple:

Take things off their plate. Execute them fully. 



We’re looking for someone who:

Figures things out

Moves fast

Solves problems

Improves systems



If you’re organized, resourceful, and take pride in being the person who gets things done without being chased — you’ll thrive here.



If you need constant direction, prefer predictable work, or move slowly — this won’t be the right fit.



We’re building something rare.



If you want in, let’s talk.



Key Responsibilities

Own and manage the day-to-day marketing operations — ensuring core systems like ad scheduling, tracking, reporting, and comment extraction run smoothly and on time.

Build and own the UGC and influencer pipeline from scratch — sourcing creators, managing outreach, coordinating deliverables, and turning it into a repeatable, scalable system.

Execute high-priority and ad hoc projects end-to-end — taking ideas or tasks and fully running with them without needing constant direction.

Conduct ongoing competitor and market research — identifying new creative angles, trends, and insights to support the marketing team.

Support campaign execution on Meta — assisting with launches, adjustments, and resolving operational issues when needed.

Coordinate across the marketing team to ensure projects, deliverables, and campaigns move forward without delays or breakdowns.

Identify inefficiencies and improve workflows — finding ways to make processes faster, cleaner, and more reliable, including leveraging AI or automation where applicable.



Requirements

3+ years of experience in an operations, marketing, or execution-focused role (e-commerce or DTC experience is a strong plus).

Highly resourceful and able to figure things out independently without step-by-step instructions.

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks, systems, and priorities at once.

High attention to detail — able to catch small errors and maintain accuracy across tasks, data, and deliverables.

Fast executor — able to move quickly, handle high workload, and complete tasks without unnecessary delays.

Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to accelerate workflows, research, and problem-solving.

Clear and responsive communicator — able to work effectively with different tea
mbers and keep things moving.



Why Us

High-Growth Environment: We’re scaling fast, and as we grow, so will your role. There’s real opportunity to take on more responsibility and evolve beyond a typical “assistant” position.

Massive Learning: You’ll work across multiple areas of marketing — operations, UGC, campaigns, systems, and more — gaining hands-on experience that most roles don’t offer.

Performance Incentives: Your impact won’t go unnoticed. High performers are rewarded based on output and contribution.

Real Impact: Your work directly affects how fast and how efficiently we scale. You won’t be doing busy work — what you do matters immediately.

High-Performance Culture: You’ll work alongside a team that moves fast, takes ownership, and holds a high standard across everything.



Interested? Apply below:

title: Recruiting Sourcer
description:
Recruiting Sourcer

Spirit Consulting



Application Procedure

Applicants who do not strictly follow these instructions will be automatically disqualified.



Please submit at this URL – [INSERT LINK] – a customized resume that begins with the following three sections:



1. Cover Letter

Include a 2–3 paragraph cover letter explaining:

- Why you are interested in recruiting and executive search

- What makes you effective at identifying and engaging top talent



2. Candidate Outreach Samples

- Outreach Message 1 (LinkedIn or
 – include copy)

- Outreach Message 2 (LinkedIn or
 – include copy)



3. Referral Request Message (include copy)



About Us

Spirit Consulting is a boutique executive search firm that partners with healthcare organizations and high-growth companies to hire transformational leaders. We specialize in placing executives, physicians, and senior leadership who drive measurable impact and organizational growth.



Why Join Us

- Learn executive recruiting at a high level—working directly on retained searches

- Work alongside experienced recruiters and leadership, including direct exposure to clients

- Be part of a high-performance, fast-growing firm with strong revenue growth

- Clear path for advancement into Recruiter, Consultant, and Client Lead roles

- Develop highly transferable skills in sales, strategy, and relationship-building



Requirements

- Access to your own LinkedIn Recruiter Account

- Experience using LinkedIn Recruiter, Loxo, or similar ATS/CRM tools

- Exposure to Boolean search techniques or candidate sourcing strategies

- Strong interest in recruiting and talent sourcing

- Strong written communication skills in English (especially outreach messaging utilizing sales techniques)

- Proven ability to research and identify talent (LinkedIn, databases, or similar tools)

- High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple priorities

- Self-starter mentality with a strong internal drive to hit goals

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment



Preferred Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree (or in progress) in Business, Communications, or related field



Key Responsibilities

- As a Sourcer, you will be responsible for building and driving candidate pipelines across multiple executive and physician searches.

- Conduct market research to identify target companies and candidates

- Build candidate pipelines through LinkedIn, databases, referrals, and outbound outreach

- Execute high-volume, high-quality outreach to generate candidate interest

- Qualify candidates against role requirements and cultural fit

- Schedule candidates for recruiter and client interviews

- Track all candidate activity in the company’s CRM (Loxo)

- Partner with recruiters to refine search strategy and improve pipeline quality

- Generate referrals and expand candidate networks within target markets

- Contribute to search strategy discussions with research and insights



What Success Looks Like (First 45 Days)



First 14 Days:

- Learn Spirit Consulting’s search process, tools, and client expectations

- Understand active searches, target profiles, and key markets

- Begin building initial candidate lists and outreach campaigns

- Shadow recruiter calls and candidate screens



Days 14–30:

- Consistently generate candidate responses and interest

- Build strong pipelines for multiple roles simultaneously

- Demonstrate effective outreach messaging and follow-up strategy

- Begin contributing insights on candidate market trends



Days 30–45:

- Deliver qualified, interview-ready candidates to recruiters

- Show ability to independently manage sourcing workflows

- Consistently hit outreach and pipeline generation targets

- Improve efficiency and quality of candidate identification



Compensation & Performance Incentives

Competitive hourly rate or base compensation (based on experience)



Performance-based incentives tied to:

- Number of qualified candidates submitted

- Successful placements supported



Growth opportunity:

- Promotion path into Full-Cycle Recruiter 

- Increased compensation tied to performance and revenue contribution

title: Technical Systems Architect & Automation Engineer
description:
JOB TITLE: Technical Systems Architect & Automation Engineer (Project Contract)



GEIZER GLOBAL is a boutique screening and intake agency. We do not wait for incoming inquiries. Instead, we identify, source, and qualify potential legal matters through our own structured processes. We vet each case through a strict qualification framework and prepare clean, accurate case files for law firms. We do not generate leads or operate as a marketing company; we provide a finished, vetted case file that has already passed through our internal standards. Our focus is accuracy, professionalism, and delivering high?quality case opportunities to firms that rely on consistent intake support. GEIZER GLOBAL operates with strict confidentiality and a commitment to clean, compliant processes.



GEIZER GLOBAL is hiring a Technical Systems Architect on a project contract to build a complete, human?exhaustive law?firm discovery and data?organization engine. This system must identify, cross?reference, verify, and organize every potential law firm in the United States that fits GEIZER GLOBAL’s business model. You are building the system, not operating it. Once the project is delivered and verified, the contract is complete. Estimated project completion time is 30 to 40 hours.



RESPONSIBILITIES

• Build a full law?firm discovery engine using public directories, state bar listings, firm websites, hiring patterns, intake indicators, digital footprints, marketing signals, and business filings.

• Create cross?referencing logic that removes duplicates, verifies legitimacy, identifies practice areas, and flags firms with high intake capacity.

• Build a buyer?probability scoring model based on hiring signals, marketing activity, digital presence, and growth indicators.

• Deliver a CRM?ready database and a user?friendly dashboard (Airtable, Retool, or similar) that allows for searching, filtering, and exporting.

• Provide full technical documentation so the system can be operated independently.



WHAT THIS IS NOT

This project does not involve calling law firms, screening cases, intake work, sales, outreach, or marketing. This is a pure technical build.



REQUIRED SKILLS

• Python, scraping automation (Playwright/Puppeteer/Selenium), and API integrations.

• Advanced data cleaning and database architecture.

• Experience bypassing sophisticated anti?scraping measures.

• Ability to build clean, intuitive UI for data visualization.



COMPENSATION

$500–$800 range based on speed, quality, and complexity.

A $150–$300 performance bonus may be awarded if the syste
ets or exceeds all technical benchmarks and passes final verification.



TO APPLY

Send one message to 
 with:



1. A 3–5 sentence summary of the most complex automation system you’ve built.

2. A link to a GitHub repo or code sample.

3. A 60?second Loom video explaining your technical approach to building this discovery engine.

4. Your confirmed project rate.





---

title: SEO Specialist
description:
Hiring Immediately.

Full Time.

East Coast US working hours.

$5/hr to start

90 day review period



About Us:

We are a strategy led, content first SEO company serving local, regional and national US service based businesses with select e-commerce clients.



We do not chase spammy backlink tactics.

We do not rely on outdated SEO tricks.

We win by building real authority through structured content, strong technical foundations with disciplined execution.

We have a clear system.



We are hiring someone to execute that system with precision.



If you believe backlinks are the primary driver of rankings, this is not the right fit.





Role Overview:

This is an execution focused role inside a defined SEO framework.



- You will not be responsible for creating overall SEO strategy.

- You will be responsible for implementing our strategy and directions correctly.



You will work closely with leadership, copywriters and developers to execute technical SEO, on page optimization and site structure improvements across multiple client accounts.



The top goal of this role is disciplined and precise execution that protects and improves rankings over time.





Core Responsibilities:

Implement on page SEO across service & ecommerce sites, blog posts and landing pages based on provided strategy



Execute technical SEO tasks including:

- Internal linking structure

- Schema implementation

- Metadata optimization

- Site architecture improvements

- Indexation monitoring

- Core Web Vitals improvements in collaboration with dev



- Conduct deep keyword research to support content mapping and page optimization

- Perform competitor analysis to identify structural and content gaps

- Monitor Google Search Console, GA4 and tracking dashboards daily for performance issues or opportunities

- Identify technical errors and escalate when needed

- Support local SEO initiatives including GBP optimization and location page structure

- Prepare clean monthly reporting with performance highlights and insights

- Maintain organized documentation inside ClickUp and internal systems





What This Role Is Not - You are NOT responsible for:

- Creating overall SEO strategy direction

- D
 which clients we take on

- Selling services

- Writing long form content

- Running spam backlink campaigns



You are responsible for executing with excellence inside an established process.





Qualifications:

2 to 4 years hands on SEO experience



Strong understanding of:

- Technical SEO fundamentals

- On page optimization

- Content driven ranking principles

- Internal linking strategy

- Schema basics

- Local SEO structure





Experience with:

- Google Search Console

- GA4

- Ahrefs or SEMrush

- Screaming Frog

- ClickUp

- WordPress

- Shopify

- Wix/SquareSpace



- Ability to follow SOPs precisely while thinking critically when issues arise

- Comfortable managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

- Clear written communication skills

- Detail oriented and process driven





What Success Looks Like:

- Client sites are technically clean

- Pages are optimized correctly

- Internal links are structured with intent

- Ranking improvements are steady and measurable

- Issues are identified before clients notice them

- You take ownership of the sites assigned to you and treat them like assets.





Cultural Fit - We value:

- Ownership

- Precision

- Clear communication

- Discipline

- Long term thinking over shortcuts



If you are looking to build your own SEO brand or experiment with random tactics, this is not the role.



If you want to master real SEO inside a proven system, you will thrive here.
